Joshua10:21 amyu masha ni mahkra gaw, Makeda dap de Yawshu kaw apyaw sha bai wa ma ai: Israela kashu kasha ni a man e grang dakat lu ai wa langai mi muk n nga ma ai." 
Joshua10:22 Shaloi Yawshu gaw, “Dai ginlawng hku hpaw nna, dai hkawhkam manga hpe shapraw nhtawm ngai hpang de woi wa marit,” ngu nna hkang dat wu ai." 
Joshua10:23 Shanhte mung hpaw nna, Yerusalem hkawhkam, Hebron hkawhkam, Yarmut hkawhkam, Lahkisha hkawhkam, Eglon hkawhkam ngu ai, dai hkawhkam manga hpe ginlawng hku na shi hpang de shaw wa wu ai." 
Joshua10:24 Ya shanhte gaw dai hkawhkam ni hpe Yawshu hpang de woi wa ma ai rai nna, Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni mahkra hpe shaga la nna, shi hte rau gasat sa ai hpyen du ni hpe, “Sit wa marit, ndai hkawhkam ni a du kabye ya maru,” ngu wu ai: shanhte mung sit sa nna, dai hkawhkam ni a du kabye ya mu ai." 
Joshua10:25 Shing rai Yawshu gaw, “Nanhte gasat ai hpyen ni nlang hpe Yehowa ning di na wu ai rai nna, hkum hkrit myit, myit hkum kaji myit; n-gun da ting nna n-gun shaja mu,” ngu nna shanhte hpe shalan wu ai." 
Joshua10:26 Shing nga tsun ngut jang, Yawshu gaw dai hkawhkam ni hpe htau kau nna, hpun manga hta noi da mu ai: shanhte hpe shana de du hkra noi da mu ai." 
Joshua10:27 Jan du jang she, Yawshu hkang dat nna, shanhte hpe hpun na jahkrat nhtawm, shanhte makoi nga ai ginlawng hku hta kabai bang kau nna, ginlawng hku mahka e nlung kaba hte pat da mu ai: shing rai dai ni du hkra rai nga ai." 
Joshua10:28 Dai shani e Yawshu gaw Makeda mare hpe gasat la wu ai rai nna, mare hte de a hkawhkam hpe nhtu hte hpya sat kau wu ai: mare hta rawng ai masha nlang hte hpe, langai mi muk n ngam hkra, shi atsai awai shamyit kau wu ai; Yerihko hkawhkam hpe di ai hte maren, Makeda hkawhkam hpe mung di wu ai." 
Joshua10:29 Bai Yawshu gaw Israela masha mahkra hte rau Makeda dap nna Libna mare de htawt nhtawm, Libna hpe gasat wu ai:" 
Joshua10:30 Yehowa gaw dai mare hte hkawhkam hpe Israela masha ni a lata de ap kau wu ai rai nna, mare hte dai hta rawng ai masha nlang hpe, langai mi muk n ngam hkra nhtu hte hpya sat kau mu ai: Yerihko hkawhkam hpe di ai hte maren, de a hkawhkam hpe mung di wu ai." 
Joshua10:31 Bai Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni mahkra hte rau Libna mare nna Lahkisha mare de htawt nhtawm, Lahkisha de dap jung nna gasat ma ai:" 
Joshua10:32 Yehowa gaw Lahkisha mare hpe mung, Israela masha ni a lata hta ap ya wu ai rai nna hpang shani e dang la kau mu ai: Libna hpe di ai hte maren, dai mare hte dai hta rawng ai masha nlang hte hpe nhtu hte hpya sat kau mu ai." 
Joshua10:33 Dai shaloi e Gezera hkawhkam Horam gaw Lahkisha mare hpe karum na nga lung wa ai hpe, Yawshu gaw dai hkawhkam hte shi a masha ni nlang hpe mung, langai mi muk n ngam hkra, hkap sat kau wu ai." 
Joshua10:34 Bai Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni mahkra hte rau Lahkisha mare nna Eglon de htawt nhtawm, dai de dap jung nna gasat ma ai:" 
Joshua10:35 dai shani jang dai mare hpe shanhte dang la lu ma ai rai nna, nhtu hte hpya sat kau mu ai; Lahkisha mare hpe di ai hte maren, dai mare hta rawng ai ni nlang hte hpe lani jan sha hta atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai." 
Joshua10:36 Bai Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni mahkra hte rau Eglon mare nna Hebron de htawt nhtawm dai de gasat ma ai: 
Joshua10:37 dai mare hpe shi dang la nna, dai mare hte, de a hkawhkam hpe mung, dai hte seng ai mare ginwang ni hpe mung, dai hta rawng ai masha nlang hte hpe mung nhtu hte hpya sat kau mu ai: Eglon hpe di ai hte maren, dai mare hte dai hta rawng ai ni nlang hte hpe, langai mi muk n ngam hkra atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai." 
Joshua10:38 Bai Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni mahkra hte rau, Debira mare de nhtang wa nna gasat ma ai:" 
Joshua10:39 dai mare hte, de a hkawhkam hpe mung, dai hte seng ai mare ginwang ni hpe mung dang la lu nna, nhtu hte shanhte hpe hpya sat ai hte mare ni hta rawng ai masha nlang hte hpe langai mi muk n ngam hkra atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai: Hebron yan Libna mare hte de a hkawhkam hpe di ai hte maren, Debira mare hte de a hkawhkam hpe di nu ai." 
Joshua10:40 Shing rai Yawshu gaw dai bum ga hte Dingda ga, pa ga hte kadit ga mahkra hte de a hkawhkam ni hpe hpya sat kau mu ai: langi mi hpe mung jahkrung da wu ai n rai; Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa hkang da ai hte maren, hkrung mahkrung hpe atsai awai shamyit kau wu ai." 
Joshua10:41 Kadesha-barnea kaw nna Gaza du hkra, Goshen ga ting Gibeon du hkra, Yawshu gasat la wu ai." 
Joshua10:42 Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw, Israela masha ni hpang maga gasat ya nga ai majaw, dai mung mahkra hte de a hkawhkam ni nlang hpe, Yawshu gaw lang lata sha dang kau wu ai." 
Joshua10:43 Shing rai Israela masha ni mahkra gaw Yawshu hte rau Gilgala dap de bai wa ma ai. 
Joshua11:1 Ya, Hazora hkawhkam Yabin gaw dai na jang, Madon hkawhkam Yobab hte, Shimron hkawhkam, Ahkashap hkawhkam ni hpe mung;" 
Joshua11:2 dingdung bum ga na hkawhkam ni hpe mung, Genesaret nawng a dingda maga na pa ga hte kadit ga, sinna maga na Dora kawng na hkawhkam ni ngu ai," 
Joshua11:3 sinpraw sinna de na Hkanani masha ni hte, bum ga e nga ai Amori, Hiti, Perizi, Yebusi masha, Mizpa mung na Hermon bum makau e nga ai Hiwi masha ni hpe mung, shaga wu ai rai nna," 
Joshua11:4 dai hkawhkam ni gaw, nammukdara hkin-gau na zaibru zawn law la ai luksuk laba ni hte, gumra hte hpyen leng law law hte pru sa ma ai." 
Joshua11:5 Dai hkawhkam ni mahkra rau hpawng nna, Israela masha ni hpe gasat na matu Meron hka nawng makau e shara hta sha dap jung nga ma ai." 
Joshua11:6 Shaloi Yehowa gaw Yawshu hpe, “Shanhte hpe hkum hkrit et; shanhte mahkra hpe hpawt ni ndai hkying hta Israela masha ni a man e chyasi ngai ap na we ai; gumra ni a lahkap nang dan kau nna leng ni hpe nat kau na rai ndai,” ngu wu ai." 
Joshua11:7 Shing rai Yawshu hte shi kaw na hpyen masha ni nlang, Merom hka nawng makau de lung wa nna, shanhte hpe akajawng sha htim gasat dat mu ai." 
Joshua11:8 Yehowa mung shanhte hpe Israela masha ni a lata de ap wu ai rai nna, shanhte hpe gasat jahtaw dat ai hte Sidon kaba hta Misrehpot-ma-im du hkra mung, sinpraw maga Mizpa kadit du hkra mung hkan shachyut nna, langai mi muk n lawt hkra sat kau mu ai." 
Joshua11:9 Yehowa Yawshu hpe tsun da sai hte maren, shi shanhte hpe di mu ai: gumra ni a lahkap shi dan kau nna, leng ni hpe nat kau wu ai." 
Joshua11:10 Shaloi Yawshu gaw, dai aten e bai wa nna, Hazora mare hpe gasat la nhtawm, de a hkawhkam hpe htau kau wu ai: moi shawng nna Hazora mare dai gaw dai mungdan mahkra ni a daju rai nga ai." 
Joshua11:11 Dai hta rawng ai masha mahkra hpe shanhte nhtu hte sat kau nna, langai mi hpe muk n jahkrung da ai sha atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai; Hazora mare hpe mung nat kau wu ai." 
Joshua11:12 Dai hkawhkam mare ni mahkra hte de a hkawhkam ni hpe Yawshu gasat la nna, Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe hkang da ai hte maren, nhtu hte atsai awai sat shamyit kau wu ai." 
Joshua11:13 Rai timung, kawng ntsa e de ai mare ni hta, Hazora mare hta kaga, gale ni hpe chyawm gaw Israela masha ni n nat kau ma ai: Hazora hpe chyu sha Yawshu nat kau wu ai." 
Joshua11:14 Dai mare hkan na lanep rai ni hte yamnga yawng mayawng hpe chyawm gaw Israela masha ni tinang a matu magawn la ma ai; masha hkrung mahkrung hpe sat kau lu ai du hkra shanhte nhtu hte shamyit kau mu ai; langai mi hpe mung jahkrung tawn mu ai. n rai. 
Joshua11:15 Yehowa shi a shangun kasa Mawshe hpe hkang da wu ai hte maren, Mawshe gaw Yawshu hpe hti da wu ai: Yawshu mung shing di galaw wu ai; Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai lam yawng mayawng, langai mi muk n yawm hkra shatup wu ai." 
Joshua11:16 Shing rai Yawshu gaw, Seira bum de lung wa ai lam na Halak bum kaw nna, Hermon bum makau Lebanon kadit na Bala-Gad du hkra," 
Joshua11:17 bum ga nlang hte Dingda ga ting, Goshen mung ting, layang ga hte pa ga, Israela bum ga hte dai hte seng ai layang ga mahkra hpe, kabye la lu wu ai rai nna, de a hkawhkam ni nlang hte hpe rim la nhtawm sat kau mu ai." 
Joshua11:18 Yawshu mung, ndai hkawhkam ni mahkra hpe tsawmra wa na hkra hpyen gasat nga ai." 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon mare na Hiwi masha ni hta kaga, Israela masha ni hte jinghku hku ai mare langai mi muk n nga ai: yawng mayawng hpe adip gasat la wu ai." 
Joshua11:20 Kaning rai nme law, Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai hte maren, dai masha amyu ni hpe kachyi mi muk matsan n dum ai sha, atsai awai sat nna shamyit kau lu na matu, Israela masha ni hpe hkap daw gasat gwi hkra, Yehowa gaw shanhte a myit hpe shaja ya da mu ai." 
Joshua11:21 Dai hte yang Yawshu sa nna, Anak masha ni hpe bum ga hkan na mung, Hebron, Debira hte Anab mare na mung, Yuda bum ga hkan na mung, Israela bum ga hkan na mung, jahtum kau wu ai: Yawshu gaw shanhte hte shanhte a mare ni hpe atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai." 
Joshua11:22 Israela kashu kasha ni a mungdan hta naw ngam ai Anak masha ngu na langai mi muk n nga sai: Gaza, Gahta, Ashdod mare ni hta sha nga sai." 
Joshua11:23 Yehowa Mawshe hpe tsun da ai hte maren Yawshu gaw dai mung ting kabye la nna, Israela masha ni a amyu lakung langai hte langai hpe Sali ga karan ya wu ai. Dai mungdan mung majan sim mat ai." 
Joshua12:1 Ya, Israela kashu kasha ni, gasat nna kabye la lu ai Arnon hka kaw nna Hermon bum du hkra hte na pa ga yawng lawm ai Yawdan hka, Jan pru maga na hkawhkam ni gaw ndai yan rai ma ai:" 
Joshua12:2 Hesbon e dung ai Amori hkawhkam Sihon; dai wa a mungdan gaw, Arnon hkaraw ka-ang ngu na hkin-gau e de ai Aroera mare kaw nna, Gilead mung chyen, Amon kashu kasha ni a lamu ga jarit Yabok hka du hkra;" 
Joshua12:3 bai, sinpraw hkran Genesaret nawng kaw nna, Bet-yeshimot hprang ai lam pa ga na Jum Nawng du hkra pa ga nlang hte hte, Pisga bum lagaw garet ai dingda lamu ga jarit du hkra, rai nga ai:" 
Joshua12:4 bai, Rehpim amyu hta na hkrat ai, Ashtarot hte Edri e dung ai Bashan hkawhkam Oga:" 
Joshua12:5 dai wa a mungdan gaw, Hermon bum hte Saleka kaw nna, Bashan mung ting, Geshuri hte Mahkahti masha ni a lamu ga jarit du ai, Heshbon hkawhkam Sihon a lamu ga jarit tai ai Gilead mung chyen mi lawm hkra rai nga lu ai." 
Joshua12:6 Dai yan hpe Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe hte Israela kashu kasha ni sat kau nna, Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe gaw shan a mung hpe, Rubin amyu, Gad amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen ni e, Sali ga matu jaw kau wu ai." 
Joshua12:7 Bai, Yawdan hka sinna hkran rai yang, Lebanon kadit na Bala-Gad mare kaw nna, Seira bum de lung wa ai lam e nga ai Halak bum du hkra; bum ga ting hte layang ga, pa ga hte kadit ga, nam mali hte dingda ga hkan e nga ai," 
Joshua12:8 Hiti, Amori, Hkanani, Perizi, Hiwi hte Yebusi masha ni a lamu ga ngu ai, Yawshu hte Israela kashu kasha ni kabye la nna, Israela amyu langai hte langai hpe Sali ga matu Yawshu karan jaw kau ai mungdan ni hta na, Yawshu hte Israela kashu kasha ni sat kau lu ai hkawhkam ni gaw:" 
Joshua12:9 Yerihko hkawhkam; Behtela makau na Ai hkawhkam: 
Joshua12:10 Yerusalem hkawhkam; Hebron hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:11 Yarmut hkawhkam; Lahkisha hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:12 Eglon hkawhkam; Gezera hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:13 Debira hkawhkam; Gedera hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:14 Horma hkawhkam; Arad hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:15 Libna hkawhkam; Adulam hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:16 Makeda hkawhkam; Betela hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:17 Tapura hkawhkam; Hehpera hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:18 Ahpek hkawhkam; Lasharon hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:19 Madon hkawhkam; Hazora hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:20 Shimronmeron hkawhkam; Akshahpa hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:21 Tanak hkawhkam; Megido hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:22 Kedesha hkawhkam; Hkarmela bum na Yokneam hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:23 Dora kawng ga e nga ai Dora hkawhkam; Gilgala e nga ai Goim hkawhkam; 
Joshua12:24 Tirza hkawhkam rai nga ma ai: nlang hte gaw hkawhkam sumshi langai rai nga ma ai. 
Joshua13:1 Ya Yawshu gaw aprat kaba nna dingla wa sai: dai rai nna Yehowa gaw shi hpe, Ya, nang aprat kaba ai hte dingla nit dai: kabye la na lamu ga mung naw law nga ai." 
Joshua13:2 Naw nga ai mung hte gaw: Hpilisti hte Geshuri ginwang ting ngu ai," 
Joshua13:3 Egutu maga na Shihora hka kaw nna, Hkanani mung hta lawm ai dingdung man de na Ekron mare du hkra nga ai, Gaza, Ashdod, Ashkelon, Giti, Ekron masha ni a hkawhkam manga ngu na Hpilisti ga hte Awim mung ting;" 
Joshua13:4 dingda man kaw nna Amori mung a lamu ga jarit Ahpek shara du ai; Hkanani masha ni a mung ting hte Sidon hta lawm ai Meara du hkra; 
Joshua13:5 Jan praw maga Hermon bum lagaw na Bala-Gad kaw nna, Hamot mare du ai Gebali masha ni a mung hte, Lebanon mung ting rai nga ai:" 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon bum kaw nna, Misrehpot-ma-im du hkra nga ai, bum ga na masha ni nlang ngu ai Sidon masha mahkra hpe Israela masha ni a man na ngai shachyut kau na we ai: dai re ai majaw, ngai nang hpe hkang da ai hte maren, Israela masha ni hpe dai lamu ga Sali karan ya nu." 
Joshua13:7 Dai lamu ga hpe, dai amyu jahku hte Mawshe amyu chyen mi hpe ya karan ya u." 
Joshua13:8 Dai Manashe chyen mi hte Rubin amyu Gad amyu ni gaw Yawdan hka sinpraw hkran de Mawshe jaw da sai rai nna, tinang a lamu ga Sali lu chyalu rai masai, ngu wu ai. Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe shanhte hpe jaw da ai lamu ga gaw:" 
Joshua13:9 Arnon hkaraw hkin-gau e de ai Aroera mare hte hkaraw ka-ang e nga ai mare kaw nna, Madeba hte Dibon layang ga ting;" 
Joshua13:10 Amon kashu kasha ni a lamu ga jarit du hkra, up ai, Heshbon e dung ai Amori hkawhkam Sihon a mare ni nlang;" 
Joshua13:11 Gilead mung, Geshuri hte Mahkahti masha ni a mung, Hermon bum ting hte Saleka du hkra Bashan mung ting;" 
Joshua13:12 Rehpim amyu hta na hkrat ai Ashtarot hte Edri e dung ai Bashan hkawhkam Oga mungdan ting rai nga ai: shanhte hpe Mawshe gasat nna shachyut kau mu ai. 
Joshua13:13 Rai timung, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Geshuri hte mahkahti masha ni hpe shachyut kau mu ai n rai: Geshuri hte Mahkahti masha ni, dai ni du hkra Israela masha ni hta nga nga ma ai." 
Joshua13:14 Lewi amyu hpe chyawm gaw lamu ga Sali n jaw wu ai: Yehowa shanhte hpe tsun da ai hte maren, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe wan hte nawng jau ai hkungga gaw, shanhte a sali rai malu ai." 
Joshua13:15 Mawshe gaw Rubin amyu lakung langai hte langai hpe lamu ga sali karan jaw da mu ai. 
Joshua13:16 Shanhte a lamu ga gaw: Amon hkaraw hkin-gau e de ai Aroera mare hte hkaraw ka-ang e nga ai mare kaw nna Medeba layang ga ting; 
Joshua13:17 Heshbon hte dai pa na mare yawng; Nibon, Bomat-Bala, Bet-meon;" 
Joshua13:18 Yahat, Kedemot hte Mepat;" 
Joshua13:19 Kir-yatim, Sebma hte hkaraw na kawng e de ai Zeret-Shahara;" 
Joshua13:20 Bet-peora, Pisga manep, Bet-yaeshimot hte" 
Joshua13:21 pa na mare ni yawng hte hpawn, Heshbon e dung ai, Sihon hkawhkam a mungdan ting rai nga ai; dai Sihon hkawhkam hpe shi a npu na, Ewi, Rekem, Zura, Hura, Reba ngu ai Midian du ni hte hpawn Mawshe sat kau wu ai." 
Joshua13:22 Beora a kasha lakle sara Balam hpe mung, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, dai ni hte rau, nhtu hte sat shalawm kau mu ai," 
Joshua13:23 Dai rai nna Rubin kashu kasha ni a lamu ga jarit gaw Yawdan hka hte de a hka kau ga rai nga ai. Dai gaw Rubin a kashu kasha ni a lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali wunli kahtawng mare ni rai nga malu ai. 
Joshua13:24 Bai Mawshe gaw, Gad amyu hpe, amyu lakung langai hte langai lamu ga sali karan jaw da mu ai." 
Joshua13:25 Shanhte a lamu ga gaw, Yezera kaw nna Gilead mare ni nlang hte Raba ang na Aroera du hkra Amon a kashu kasha ni a lamu ga chyen mi;" 
Joshua13:26 Heshbon kaw nna Ramatmizpa hte Betonim du hkra; Mahanim kaw nna Debira du hkra; 
Joshua13:27 kadit ga e rai yang, Bet-haram, Bet-nimra, Suhkot, Zahpon mare ni ngu ai, Yawdan hka sinpraw hkran, dai hka kau dingdung Geneseret nawng htum hkra, Heshbon hkawhkam Sihon a lamu ga ngam ai hte nlang rai malu ai." 
Joshua13:28 Dai gaw Gad a kashu kasha ni a lakung lama hkan nna, lu la ai sali wunli kahtawng mare ni rai nga malu ai." 
Joshua13:29 Bai, Mawshe gaw Manashe amyu chyen mi hpe sali karan jaw da wu ai: dai gaw Manashe amyu chyen mi a kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai." 
Joshua13:30 Shanhte a lamu ga gaw, Mahanim kaw nna Bashan ngu ai, Bashan hkawhkam Oga a mungdan ting; Bashan mung hta lam ai Ya-ira mare kru shi yawng;" 
Joshua13:31 Gilead mung chyen mi hte, Bashan mung hta Oga up lawm ai Ashtarot hte Edri mare ni gaw Manashe a kasha Mahkira kashu kasha chyen mi a lakung lama ni a matu rai nga malu ai." 
Joshua13:32 Dai hte gaw Mawshe Yawdan hka sinpraw hkran Yerihko hte tawtap na Moba pa e karan ya ai sali ga rai malu ai. 
Joshua13:33 Lewi amyu hpe chyawm gaw Mawshe sali n jaw wu ai; Yehowa shanhte hpe tsun dan mu ai hte maren, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw shanhte a sali wunli rai nga ai." 
Joshua14:1 Ndai gaw Israela kashu kasha ni Hkanan mung e lu la ai sali ga ni rai nga ai; hkinjawng Eleaza, Nun a kasha Yawshu hte Israela kashu kasha amyu du agyi ni gaw," 
Joshua14:2 Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da wu ai hte maren, hpaida hte dai amyu jahku hte chyen mi hpe karan ya mu ai." 
Joshua14:3 Amyu lahkawng hte chyen mi hpe gaw, Yawdan hka wora hkran de Mawshe jaw da nu ai: Lewi amyu hpe gaw sali ga karan ai hta n shalawm mu ai." 
Joshua14:4 Yawsep a kashu kasha ni mahtang Manashe hte Ehprim amyu lahkawng rai ma ai majaw; Lewi masha ni a matu nga nga na mare hte, shanhte a yamnga hte arai tawn da na mare ginwang hta kaga, sali shaje n jaw mu ai." 
Joshua14:5 Shing rai Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai hku hkan nna, lamu ga sali karan la ma ai." 
Joshua14:6 Shaloi Yuda a kashu kasha ni gaw Gilgala dap e Yawshu kaw sa nna, Kenizi lakung Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb gaw, “Yehowa, Kadesha-barnea e nang hte an a lam Karai Kasang a shangun kasa Mawshe hpe tsun wu ai ga hpe nang chye nga ndai." 
Joshua14:7 Ndai mung hpe kin-yu sa yu na Kadesha-barnea kaw nna Karai Kasang a shangun kasa Mawshe ngai hpe shangun dat ai shaloi, nye a asak mali shi ning rai li ai; ngai mung, ngai myit lu ai hte maren wa tsun dan nngai." 
Joshua14:8 Ngai hte rau lung wa ai hpunau manang ni amyu masha ni a myit hten na lam tsun ma timung, ngai chyawm gaw nye a Karai Kasang Yehowa ahkang htep lahti hkan ni ai." 
Joshua14:9 Dai shani e Mawshe gaw, Nang nye a Karai Kasang Yehowa ahkang htep lahti hkan nit dai majaw, gaja wa teng teng, nang kabye du sai ga gaw nang hte na a kashu kasha ni a matu prat dingsa na sali wunli tai nga na salit dai, nga nna shaka da ni ai." 
Joshua14:10 Ya, yu u, Israela masha ni nam mali hkan e kayin hkawm nga ai nhtoi hte ting hta, Yehowa Mawshe hpe shing nga tsun ai shani kaw nna ya du hkra, Yehowa a ga hte maren, mali shi manga ning tup nye a asak hpe jahkrung da ya ni ai rai nna, dai ni nye a asak matsat shi manga ning du sali ai." 
Joshua14:11 Rai timung Mawshe ngai e shangun ai shani e n-gun lagaw ja nngai zawn, dai ni mung naw ja nga nngai: dai shaloi e hkawm sa hkawm wa lu ai hte majan gun dang lu ai zawn, ya mung n-gun ja nga nngai." 
Joshua14:12 Dai rai nna, dai shani e Yehowa tsun ai bum ndai ngai hpe jaw e; dai bum hta Anak masha ni nga ai mung, mare bunghku ngang ai mare kaba ni nga ai mung, dai shani nang na nit dai: Yehowa ngai hte rau nga nga yang gaw, Yehowa a ga hte maren ngai shanhte hpe shachyut kau lu na a dawng,” ngu nna Yawshu hpe hpyi wu ai." 
Joshua14:13 Yawshu mung shi hpe shaman ya ai hte, Hebron ga hpe Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb a sali wunli matu jaw kau wu ai." 
Joshua14:14 Dai rai nna, Kenizi lakung Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb gaw, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa a hpang htep lahti hkan nang ai majaw, Hebron ga gaw dai ni du hkra shi a sali wunli ga tai wa ai." 
Joshua14:15 Hebron mare a shawng na amying gaw, Kiriat-arba rai nga ai: Arba ngu ai gaw Anak kashu kasha ni hta na grau kaba ai wa rai nga ai. Dai mungdan mung majan sim mat ai." 
Joshua15:1 Yuda amyu a kashu kasha ni, tinang a lakung lama hkan nna, hpaida hta jaw ai sali ga gaw, dingda maga rai yang, Edum ga hte yep, Zin nam mali du hkra rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:2 Dingda maga na shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw, Jum Nawng htum ai shingjut kaw nna," 
Joshua15:3 dingda de dun hkrat wa ai Akrabim bum hkan nna, Zin mali e byawn; bai, Kadesha-barnea dingda maga kaw nna Hezron hprang, Adara e byawn, Karka e hkrawn, kayin wa nna," 
Joshua15:4 Azmon hku garet nhtawm, Egutu hka e hkrawn, Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai: dai gaw shanhte a lamu ga dingda jarit rai na, rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:5 Sinpraw de rai yang, dai Jum Nawng gaw, Yawdan hka htumpa du hkra, lamu ga jarit rai nga ai. Dingdung man de na jarit gaw, Yawdan hka htumpa, Nawng shingjut kaw nna," 
Joshua15:6 Bet-hogla hku lung wa nhtawm, Bet-Araba lahta hku hprang, Rubin a kasha Bohan a nlung mahtan du hkra rai nga ai;" 
Joshua15:7 bai, Ahkora kadit lahta hku kaw nna, Debira e hprang, hka dingda na Adumim kadawng lam tawtap na Gilgala e hkrawn; Enshemesha hka hpawk hprang," 
Joshua15:8 Enregola shara e byawn; bai, Yebusi masha ni nga ai Yerusalem mare a lawu maga na, Hinom a kasha hkaraw hku hkrawn, Hinom hkaraw a sinna maga, Rehpim hkaraw ntsa na bum pungding e hkroi;" 
Joshua15:9 dai bum na bai yu nhtawm, Nepto hka hpawk hku hkrawn, Ehpron bum na mare ni de hprang, Kiriat-yarim ngu ai Bala de byawn;" 
Joshua15:10 bai Bala sinna ang hku, Yearim ngu ai Hkesalon bum lahta hku hprang Seira bum garet nna, Bet-shemesha e hkrawn, Timma e hprang," 
Joshua15:11 Ekron lahta e byawn; bai dai kaw nna, Shikeron hku hprang, Bala bum hkrawn, Yabnela e byawn rai nna Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:12 Sinna maga na jarit gaw, Nammukdara kaba hte de a hkin-gau rai nga ai. Dai hte gaw, Yuda amyu lakung ni a lamu ga jarit grup yin rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:13 Yehowa, Yawshu hpe hkang da ai hte maren, shi gaw Yuda kashu kasha ni hta, Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb a matu Hebron ngu ai Anak a kawa Arba a mare jaw kau wu ai." 
Joshua15:14 Hkaleb gaw dai mare na Anak a kasha masum, Sheshai, Ahiman, Talamai hte hpe shachyut kau nhtawm," 
Joshua15:15 dai kaw nna Debira masha ni hpe lung gasat mu ai: dai Debira gaw shawng e Kiriat-sehpera mying ai rai nga ai. 
Joshua15:16 Shaloi Hkaleb gaw, “Kiriat-sehpera gasat la lu ai wa hpe, ngai shayi sha Aksa ya sha na,” ngu wu ai." 
Joshua15:17 Dai rai nna, Hkaleb a kanau Kenaza a kasha Otniela gaw dai mare gasat la wu ai rai nna, Hkaleb gaw dai wa hpe shi a shayi Aksa ya sha wu ai." 
Joshua15:18 Dai numsha gaw rawt wa ai shaloi e, kawa kaw yi hpyi na lam madu wa hte bawng nna, lawze dinghkung na yu hkrat wu ai: shaloi Hkaleb gaw, “Nang hpa ra n ta?” ngu wu yang," 
Joshua15:19 Shi gaw, “Chyeju shaman ya e; nang ngai e Dingda ga e tawn da nit dai majaw, hka hpawk mung, naw jaw e law,” ngu nna hpyi wu ai. Kawa mung lahta hka hpawk hte lawu hka hpawk shi e jaw wu ai." 
Joshua15:20 Da ndai gaw, Yuda kashu kasha lakung lama ni a sali ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:21 Edom mung hte tut, Dingda jahtum na Yuda amyu kashu kasha ni madu la lu ai mare ni gaw, Kabzela, Edera, Yagura," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedesha, Hazora, Itnan;" 
Joshua15:24 Zihpa, Telem, Bealot;" 
Joshua15:25 Hazora-hadata, Hazora ngu ai Keriat-hezron;" 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema, Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 Hazara-gada, Heshmon, Bet-palet;" 
Joshua15:28 Hazara-shuala, Ber-sheba, Biziotia;" 
Joshua15:29 Bala, I-im, Ezem;" 
Joshua15:30 Elatola, Hkesila, Horma;" 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmana, Sansana;" 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Shilahim, Ain hte Rimon rai nga ai: dai mare ni mahkra gaw, tinang a kahtawng ni hte hpawn hkun jahku rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:33 Layang ga na mare ni gaw, Eshtaola, Zora, Ashna;" 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa; En-ga-nim, Taupa, Enam;" 
Joshua15:35 Yarmut, Adulam, Sahko, Azeka;" 
Joshua15:36 Sharim, Adihtim, Gedera, Gederohtim, rai nga ai: kahtawng hte hpawn mare nlang shi mali rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:37 Bai, zenan, Hadasha, Migdala-gad;" 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mizpe, Yokhtela;" 
Joshua15:39 Lahkisha, Bodkat, Eglon;" 
Joshua15:40 Hkabon, Lamam, Hkitlisha;" 
Joshua15:41 Gederot, Bet-dagon, Nama Makeda rai nga ai: kahtawng hte hpawn mare nlang shi kru rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:42 Bai, Libna, Ehtera, Ashan;" 
Joshua15:43 Iphta, Ashna, Nezeb;" 
Joshua15:44 Kila, Akzib, Maresha rai nga ai: kahtawng hte hpawn mare jahku rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron hte dai hte seng ai kahtawng mare ni: 
Joshua15:46 Ekron kaw nna Nammukdara du hkra, Ashdod hte htep na kahtawng mare ni:" 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod hte de a kahtawng mare ni: Egutu hka hte Nammukdara kaba hkin-gau du hkra Gaza hte de a kahtawng mare ni mung lawm ma ai. 
Joshua15:48 Bai, bum ga de nga ai mare ni gaw, Shamira, Yatira, Sohka;" 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Debira ngu ai Kiriat-sana;" 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Eshtemo, Anim;" 
Joshua15:51 Goshen, Holon, Gilo rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn, mare shi langai rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:52 Bai, Araba, Duma, Eshan;" 
Joshua15:53 Yanim, Bet-tapua, Ahpe ka;" 
Joshua15:54 Humta, Hebron ngu ai, Kiriat-arba, Ziora rai nga ai; kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare jahku rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:55 Bai, Maon, Hkarmela, Zihpa, Yuta;" 
Joshua15:56 Yezrela, Yokdam, Zanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 Ka-in, Gibea, Timna, rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare shi rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:58 Bai, Hahula, Bet-zura, Gedora;" 
Joshua15:59 Marat, Bet-anat, Elatekon, rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn, mare kru rai nga ai." 
Joshua15:60 Bai Kiriat-yarim ngu ai Kiriat-bala hte Raba rai nga ai; kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare lahkawng rai nga ma ai. 
Joshua15:61 Bai, nam mali hkan e nga ai mare ni gaw, Bet-araba, Midin, Sehkahka;" 
Joshua15:62 Nebshan, dai Jum mare hte Engedi rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn, mare kru rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua15:63 Yerusalem mare e nga ai Yebusi masha ni chyawm gaw Yuda kashu kasha ni shachyut kau lu ai n rai; dai rai nna Yebusi masha ni gaw Yerusalem mare hta, Yuda kashu kasha ni hte rau, dai ni du hkra nga nga ma ai." 
Joshua16:1 Ya Yawsep a kashu kasha ni a matu hpai da hta jaw ai sali ga gaw, Yawdan hka kau Yerihko mare a sinpraw maga na, Yerihko hka kaw nna, nam mali bum lam hkan nhtawm Betela mare e byawn;" 
Joshua16:2 bai Behtela kaw nna Luza hku hprang, Arhki masha ni a lamu ga jarit hku ret, Atarat e byawn;" 
Joshua16:3 bai, dai kaw nna sinna de rai wa yang, Yahpleti masha ni a lamu ga jarit hku ret, lawu Bet-horon hprang, Gezera e byawn rai nna, Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai." 
Joshua16:4 Shing rai Yawsep a kasha Manashe yan Ehprim gaw tinang a sali ga lu la ma ai. 
Joshua16:5 Ehprim kashu kasha ni tinang lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai lamu ga gaw: sinpraw maga rai yang, Atarot-ada kaw nna lahta Bet-horon du hkra;" 
Joshua16:6 bai, dingdung maga na Mikmehta kaw nna, lamu ga jarit gaw sinna de rai wa ai; bai, lamu ga jarit gaw sinpraw de yawng nna, Tanat-shilo hku hprang, Yanoa sinpraw maga de hkrawn," 
Joshua16:7 Yanon kaw nna Atarat hte Nara hprang, Yerihko e byawn rai nna Yawdan hka e htuk rai nga ai." 
Joshua16:8 Bai, Tapua kaw nna dai lamu ga jarit gaw, sinna de rai wa nna Kana hka shi du nhtawm Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai." 
Joshua16:9 Dai gaw Manashe a kashu kasha ni lu la ai sali ga hta, Ehprim kashu kasha ni a matu karan tawn ai kahtawng mare ni hte hpawn, Ehprim amyu kashu kasha ni tinang lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua16:10 Gezera e nga ai Hkanani masha ni hpe shanhte n shachyut kau mu ai majaw, Hkanani masha ni Ehprim a lamu ga hta dai ni du hkra nga nga nna shabrai sha ai nchyang tai ma ai." 
Joshua17:1 Ndai gaw Manashe amyu a matu hpaida hta jaw ai sali ga rai malu ai; shi gaw Yawsep a kasha alat rai nga ai. Manashe a kasha alat Gilead kawa Mahkira chyawm gaw hpyen masha rai nga ai rai nna, Gilead hte Bashan mung lu la lu ai." 
Joshua17:2 Manashe a kashu kasha kaga ni ngu na, Abieza lakung, Helek lakung, Asreela lakung, Shehkem lakung, Hehpera lakung hte Shemida lakung ni mung, tinang lakung lama hkan nna hpaida hta jaw ai lamu ga naw lu la ma ai: dai ni gaw Yawsep a kasha Manashe lakung a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
Joshua17:3 Rai timung, Manashe, Mahkira, Gilead, hte Hehpera hta na hkrat ai Zelohpa gaw, shadang sha n lu ai, shayi sha hkrai rai lu ai: shi a shayi sha ni a amying gaw Mala, Noa, Hogla, Milhka, Tirza hte rai ma ai." 
Joshua17:4 Shanhte gaw hkinjawng Eleaza, Nun a kasha Yawshu hte du gyi ni a man de sit sa nna, “An nau ni hpe hpunau ni hte rau sali ga jaw na lam, Yehowa, Mawshe hpe hkang da nu ai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai: dai re ai majaw Yehowa hkang da ai hte maren, shi shanhte hpe kawa a kahpu kanau ni hte rau sali ga jaw mu ai." 
Joshua17:5 Shing rai Manashe a shayi sha ni shadang sha ni hte rau sali ga lu la ai majaw," 
Joshua17:6 Yawdan hka wora hkran na, Gilead hte Bashan mung hta kaga, Manashe a matu ni gaw hkambum shi tai ma ai. Gilead mung chyawm gaw, Manashe a kasha kaga ni a lamu ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua17:7 Manashe a lamu ga jarit gaw, Ashera mare kaw nna Shehkem tawtap na Mikmehta hku hprang; hkra maga hku hkan nna En-tapua masha ni nga ai shara e byawn rai nga ai." 
Joshua17:8 Tapua ginwang gaw Manashe hte seng nga ai: rai timung, Manashe mung jarit na Tapua mare gaw Ehprim masha ni a rai nga ai." 
Joshua17:9 Bai, dai lamu ga jarit gaw Kana hka shi dingda daw hkan nna, Manashe ga hte Ehprim mare kau mi lawm timung, hka dingdung maga gaw Manashe ga rai wa nna Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai." 
Joshua17:10 Dingda de Ehprim ga, dingdung de Manashe ga rai nna, Nammukdara sinna jarit rai nga ai; dingdung man de Ashera ga, sinpraw man de Isahka ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua17:11 Bai Manashe gaw Isahka hte Ashera mung hta, Bet-shean hte de a mare ni, Iblam hte de a mare ni; Dora masha ni hte de a mare ni, En-dora masha ni hte de a mare ni, Tanak masha ni hte de a mare ni, Megido masha ni hte de a mare ni madu nga lu ma ai; shing rai kawng masum ngu ai mung mi shanhte lu la ma ai." 
Joshua17:12 Rai timung Manashe kashu kasha ni gaw, dai mare ni hpe n dip la lu ma ai rai nna, Hkanani masha ni dai yang nga nga ma ai." 
Joshua17:13 Shing rai, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw n-gun ja nga timung, Hkanani masha ni hpe atsai awai n shachyut kau ai sha, shanhte hpe amu bungli gun hpai shangun ma ai." 
Joshua17:14 Shaloi Yawsep a kashu kasha ni Yawshu hpe, “Yehowa ngai hpe shaman ya ai hte, amyu kaba rai nga nngai she rai yang me, hkambum ga langai sha ngai e a jaw ai gaw, hpa majaw rai ta?” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
Joshua17:15 Yawshu shanhte hpe, “Nang amyu kaba rai nga nna, Ehprim bum ga nau gyip lit yang gaw, maling ga de lung nna, Perizi hte Rehpim masha ni a mung e wa hkyen la mu law,” ngu nna htan wu ai." 
Joshua17:16 Bai Yawsep a kashu kasha ni gaw, “Dai bum ga gaw anhte matu n law mali ai: dai pa ga na Bet-shean hte de a mare ni hte, Yezrela pa hkan e nga ai Hkanani masha ni nlang hte gaw hpri leng lu ai hkrai rai ma ai,” ngu nna bai tsun mu ai." 
Joshua17:17 Shaloi Yawshu gaw, Ehprim hte Manashe amyu ngu ai Yawsep a kashu kasha ni hpe, “Nang amyu kaba rai nna, n-gun ja ndai majaw, hkambum langai sha madu lu na n rai:" 
Joshua17:18 bum mi naw madu lu na ndai; dai hta maling htat timung, nang hkyen kau nna dai gaw htum hkra na a rai na rai nga ai; Hkanani masha ni n-gun ja ai hte hpri leng lu ma timung, nang shanhte hpe shachyut kau lu na rai nga ai,” ngu nna tsun wu ai." 
Joshua18:1 Ya Israela kashu kasha shawa hpung ting gaw, Shilo mare e zuphpawng nna, dai yang e dai shawa sum sharawt mu ai: mung ting gaw shanhte a man e grit mat ma ai." 
Joshua18:2 Dai shaloi e Israela kashu kasha ni hta sali ga garai n madu ai amyu sanit naw nga ma ai. 
Joshua18:3 Dai rai nna Yawshu Israela kashu kasha ni hpe “Nanhte a nji nwa ni a Karai Kasang Yehowa jaw ai mungdan hpe n madu la ai, gaten du hkra ganung nga na myit ta?" 
Joshua18:4 Nanhte hta amyu mi na marai masum sum san tawn ya mi; shanhte hpe ngai shangun dat nna, dai mung ting de shanhte jawt hkawm nhtawm, lu la ang ai sali ga hpe ka matsing la nna ngai hpang de wa maru ga." 
Joshua18:5 Dai mungdan hpe hkambum sanit di karan na rai mu ai: Yuda gaw dingda maga shi a shara e nga nga na rai wu ai; Yawsep amyu masha ni gaw dingda maga shi a shara e nga nga na rai wu ai. 
Joshua18:6 Nanhte gaw dai mungdan hpe hkambum sanit di ka karan nna, dai ka da ai laika ngai hpang de la wa na rai myit dai: shaloi ngai gaw anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa a man e nanhte a matu hpaida da na nngai." 
Joshua18:7 Lewi masha ni chyawm gaw nanhte zawn hkambum lu la na n rai; Yehowa a hkinjawng aya gaw shanhte a sali rai nga ai: Gad amyu, Rubin amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen mi gaw Yawdan hka sinpraw hkran de, Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe jaw da ai hte maren sali ga lu la masai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
Joshua18:8 Ya dai masha ni rawt nna sa wa ma ai: Yawshu gaw dai mung ka matsing sa ai ni hpe, “Mung ting jawt hkawm wa nna, dai hpe ka matsing la nhtawm ngai hpang de wa marit: shaloi ngai nang Shilo e Yehowa a man e nanhte a matu hpaida da ya na nngai,” ngu nna hkang dat wu ai." 
Joshua18:9 Dai ni mung pru nna, mung ting hpe jawt hkawm let, mare kahtawng lam hkan nna, hkambum sanit, di karan nhtawm, laika hta ka la nna, Shilo a dap de Yawshu kaw bai du wa ma ai." 
Joshua18:10 Shaloi Yawshu gaw Shilo e Yehowa a man e shanhte a matu hpaida da nna, Israela masha ni hpe, amyu langai hte langai a matu lamu ga karan ya wu ai." 
Joshua18:11 Shing rai Ben-yamin a kashu kasha ni tinang a lakung lam hkan nna hpaida hta jaw ai ga gaw, Yuda kashu kasha ni hte Yawsep a kashu kasha ni a lapran e ang nga lu ai." 
Joshua18:12 Dingdung maga nna jarit gaw, Yawdan hka kaw nna, Yerihko lahta hku hprang, sinna maga na bum hta hkrawn, Bet-aven mali e byawn rai wa ai." 
Joshua18:13 Dai kaw nna dai jarit gaw dingda de rai wa nna, Betela ngu ai Luza mare makau hprang, lawu Bet-horon dingda maga na bum lagaw ret Atarot-ada e byawn rai nga ai." 
Joshua18:14 Dai kaw nna, lamu ga jarit gaw sinna maga na kayin nna, Bet-horon tawtap e nga ai bum hkan let, dingda de shang wa ai rai nna, Yuda kashu kasha ni a mare Kiriat-yarim ngu ai Kiriot-Bala e byawn rai nga ai: dai gaw sinna jarit rai nga ai." 
Joshua18:15 Dingda maga na jarit gaw, Kiriat-yarim kaw nna, sinna de shang nhtawm, Nephto hka hpawk e byawn;" 
Joshua18:16 bai, Rehpim kadit dingdung de nga ai Hinom a kasha a kadit tawtap na bum lagaw hkan nhtawm, Yebusi masha ni a mare dingda na Hinom kadit hku hkrawn, En-rogela e byawn;" 
Joshua18:17 dai kaw nna, dingdung de lung wa nhtawm, En-sheme de hprang, Adumim kadawng tawtap na Gelilot e byawn; bai Rubin a kasha Bohan a nlung mahtan hku hprang," 
Joshua18:18 Araba dingdung maga na pa hku hkrawn, Araba de lup rai nga ai;" 
Joshua18:19 bai, Bet-hogla lahta hku ret, Jum Nawng dingdung shingjut na Yawdan hka htumpa e htuk rai nga ai: dai gaw dingda jarit rai nga ai." 
Joshua18:20 Yawdan hka gaw sinpraw maga na jarit rai nga ai. Dai gaw, Ben-yamin kashu kasha ni tinang lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga a grup yin lamu ga jarit rai nga ai." 
Joshua18:21 Ya, Ben-yamin amyu kashu kasha ni tinang a lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai mare ni gaw, Yerihko, Bet-hogla, Emek-kezi;" 
Joshua18:22 Bet-araba, Zemarim, Betela;" 
Joshua18:23 Awim, Para, Ohpra;" 
Joshua18:24 Hkehpa-amoni, Ohpni, hte Geba rai nga ai: kahtawng hte hpawn mare shi lahkawng rai nga ai." 
Joshua18:25 Bai, Gibeon, Rama, Rerot;" 
Joshua18:26 Mizpe, Hkehpira, Moza;" 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, lrapela, Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Elep, Yerusalem ngu ai Yebusi mare, Gibat, hte Kiriat rai nga ai: kahtawng hte hpawn mare shi mali rai nga ma ai. Dai gaw Ben-yamin amyu kashu kasha ni tinang a lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:1 Lahkawng lang na hpaida hta jaw ai gaw, Simun kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai: shanhte a lamu ga gaw Yuda kashu kasha ni a sali ga hta lawm nga ai." 
Joshua19:2 Shanhte a sali ga hta lawm ai mare ni gaw, Ber-sheba, ngu ai Sheba, Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 Haza-shuala, Bala, Ezem;" 
Joshua19:4 Elatola, Behtula, Horma;" 
Joshua19:5 Zilkla, Bet-marahkabot, Haza-susa;" 
Joshua19:6 Bet-lebaot hte Sharuhen rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn, mare shi masum rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:7 Bai, A-in, Rimon, Ehtera, hte Ashan rai nga ai: kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare mali rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:8 Dingda maga Rama ngu ai Balat-bera du hkra, ndai mare ni a grup yin kahtawng ni mung lawm nga ai. Dai gaw Simun a kashu kasha ni, tinang a lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:9 Simun a kashu kasha ni a sali ga gaw, Yuda kashu kasha ni a hkambum hta na shaw la ai rai nga ai: kaning rai nme law, Yuda a kashu kasha ni a hkambum gaw nau kaba malu ai majaw, shanhte a kata e Simun a kashu kasha ni sali ga madu la ma ai." 
Joshua19:10 Bai, masum lang na hpaida hta jaw ai gaw Zebulun kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai: shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw Sarid du hkra rai nga ai;" 
Joshua19:11 dai kaw nna sinna de rai wa nhtawm, shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw Marala e hprang, Dabeshet e byawn, Yokanam mare makau na hka e htuk rai nga ai;" 
Joshua19:12 bai Sarid kaw nna sinpraw de rai wa nhtawm, Hkislot-tabora e hkrawn, Daberat hku hprang, Yahpia e byawn rai nga ai:" 
Joshua19:13 dai kaw nna sinpraw de rai wa nhtawm, Gat-hehpera hte Et-kazin hku hprang, Nea hte htep na Rimon e byawn rai nga ai;" 
Joshua19:14 bai dingdung maga garet nna Hanahton hku hprang, Iphtela kadit e dak rai nga ai," 
Joshua19:15 Kata, Nahala, Shimron, Idala, hte Betlehem mare ni lawm nga ai: de a kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare shi lahkawng rai nga ai:" 
Joshua19:16 Dai gaw Zebulun a kashu kasha ni, tinang a lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga kahtawng mare ni rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:17 Bai, mali lang na hpaida hta jaw ai gaw, Yeshahka kashu kasha lakung ni a matu rai nga ai:" 
Joshua19:18 shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw, Yesrela, Hkesulot, Shunem;" 
Joshua19:19 Hahparim, Shion, Anaharat;" 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Kishon, Ebe;" 
Joshua19:21 Remet, En-ga-nim, En-hada, Bet-paze mare ni hte hpawn," 
Joshua19:22 Tabora, Shahazuma, hte Bet-sheme e byawn rai nna Yawdan hka e htuk rai nga ai: de a kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare shi kru rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:23 Dai gaw Yeshahka a kashu kasha lakung lama hkan nna, lu la ai sali ga kahtawng mare ni rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:24 Bai, manga lang na hpaida hta jaw ai gaw, Ashe a kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:25 Shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw, Helkat, Hali, Beten, Akshap;" 
Joshua19:26 Alamelek, Amad hte Mishala mare ni hte hpawn, sinna maga de Hkarmela hte Shihora-libnat du hkra rai nga ai;" 
Joshua19:27 bai Jan praw maga kayin nna, Bet-dagon hku hprang, Zebulun ga jarit ret, Iptaela kadit hku hkrawn rai nna, dingdung de rai wa nhtawm, Bet-emek hte Niela hku hprang, pai maga de rai yang, Hkabula;" 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rehoba, Hamon, Kana hku hkan nna Sidon kaba e byawn;" 
Joshua19:29 bai dai jarit gaw, Rama hku kayin nna, bunghku kum ai Turu mare hku hprang, Hosa e byawn Akziba ginwang hkan e Nammukdara e htuk rai nga ai:" 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Ahpek hte Rehoba mare ni mung lawm ma ai: de a kahtawng ni hte hpawn mare hkun lahkawng rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:31 Dai gaw Ashe kashu kasha lakung lama hkan nna, lu la ai sali ga kahtawng mare ni rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:32 Bai, kru lang na hpaida hta jaw ai gaw, Naphtali a kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:33 Shanhte a lamu ga jarit gaw, Helep hte Zananim shara na wamyi hpun kaw nna, Adamikab, Yebnela hte Lakum hku hprang, Yawdan hka e htuk rai nga ai;" 
Joshua19:34 bai sinna de kayin nna Azanot-tabora hku hprang, Hukok e byawn; dingda maga gaw Zebulun hte tut, sinna maga gaw Ashe hte tut, Jan praw maga gaw Yuda mare du hkra Yawdan hka jarit rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:35 De a bunghku kum ai mare ni gaw, Zidim, Zera, Rakat, Hkineret;" 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hasora;" 
Joshua19:37 Kedesha, Edrai, En-hazora;" 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdalela, Horem, Bet-anat hte Bet-sheme rai nga ma ai: de a mare ni hte hpawn, mare shi jahku rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua19:39 Dai gaw Naphtali a kashu kasha lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga a kahtawng mare ni rai nga ma ai. 
Joshua19:40 Bai, sanit lang na, hpaida hta jaw ai gaw, Dan a kashu kasha lakung lama ni a matu rai nga ai." 
Joshua19:41 Shanhte a sali ga mare ni gaw, Zora, Eshtaola, Irasheme;" 
Joshua19:42 Shalabin, Aiyalon; Itla;" 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timna, Ekron;" 
Joshua19:44 Elateka, Gibehton, Balat;" 
Joshua19:45 Yehuda, Bene-berak, Gat-rimon;" 
Joshua19:46 Me-jakon, Rakon hte Yopa tawtap na ga du hkra lawm nga ai." 
Joshua19:47 Dan a kashu kasha ni a lamu ga gaw nau gyip malu ai majaw, shanhte gaw Leshem mare de sa gasat nna madu la nhtawm, dai de sa nga nga ai; shanhte amyu a kawa daju Dan amying hkan nna, dai Leshem mare hpe Dan mare ngu nna lai shamying mu ai." 
Joshua19:48 Dai gaw Dan a kashu kasha lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai sali ga a kahtawng mare ni rai nga ma ai. 
Joshua19:49 Shing rai shanhte gaw dai mungdan hpe ga jarit tawn nna, sali ga karan na shangut ma ai: Israela kashu kasha ni mung, Nun a kasha Yawshu hpe shanhte a lamu ga hta na sali ga jaw mu ai:" 
Joshua19:50 Ehprim bum ga na, shi hpyi ai Timnat-sera mare, Yehowa hkang da ai hte maren shi hpe jaw mu ai; dai mare shi de nna nga nga ai." 
Joshua19:51 Dai hte gaw hkinjawng Eleaza, Nun a kasha Yawshu hte Israela kashu kasha ni hta na lakung lama ni a du gyi ni, Shilo mare hta, Yehowa a man e, shawa sum chyinghka lam e, hpaida hte karan ya ai lamu ga sali ni ra nga ai. Shing rai shanhte gaw dai mungdan hpe karan ai amu shangut ma ai." 
Joshua20:1 Bai, Yehowa Yawshu hpe tsun wu ai gaw," 
Joshua20:2 Israela kashu kasha ni hpe ning ngu tsun u: “Ngai Mawshe hpe tsun da sai hte maren, masha wa hpe sat kau mayu ai myit n rawng ai sha, n dum shami hkala sat ai wa hprawng shingbyi lu na mare ni lata san da mu:" 
Joshua20:3 dai ni gaw matai htang ai wa a lata na lawt lu na matu hprawng shingbyi na mare tai na rai nga ai. 
Joshua20:4 Dai wa gaw mare langai ngai de hprawng nna, mare chyinghka e tsap nhtawm, dai mare na salang ni hpe shi a lam tsun dan na rai wu ai: shaloi dai ni gaw shi hpe mare kata de shawn la nhtawm, shanhte kaw nga nga shangun na rai mu ai." 
Joshua20:5 Matai htang ai wa hkan du timung, shi a lata de dai masha sat ai wa hpe ap ya lu na n rai: kaning rai nme law, dai wa gaw shi a manang wa hpe n dawng ai majaw n rai, ndum shami hkala kau ai she rai lu ai." 
Joshua20:6 Dai wa gaw, shawa hpung a man e dawdan ai shani du hkra rai yang, rai, dai prat na hkinjawng agyi wa si ai du hkra rai yang, rai, dai mare hta anga nga lu na rai nga ai: dai hpang e she, shi bai wa nna, shawng na hprawng kau da ai mare, tinang a buga, ndum nta de, anga nga lu na rai nga ai,” nga nna tsun wu ai." 
Joshua20:7 Shing rai shanhte gaw, Galile mung, Naphtali bum ga na, Kedesha mare, Ehprim bum ga na Shehkem mare, Yuda bum ga na, Kiriat-arba ngu ai Hebron mare hte hpe san da mu ai." 
Joshua20:8 Bai, Yawdan hka wora hkran, Yerihko tawtap Rubin ga hta, nam mali pa na Bezera mare, Gad ga hta Gilead mung na Ramat mare, Manashe ga hta, Bashan mung na Golan mare hte hpe san da mu ai." 
Joshua20:9 Mare dai ni gaw, Israela kashu kasha ni mahkra hte shanhte kaw shingbyi nga ai tsasam manam a matu san da mu ai rai nna, n dum shami masha sat hkrup ai wa, shawa hpawng a man e garai n tsap yang, matai htang ai wa a lata na lawt hkra hprawng shingbyi na mare ni rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:1 Dai shaloi Lewi amyu lakung lama ni a du gyi ni gaw, Eleaza yan Nun a kasha Yawshu hte Israela kashu kasha lakung lama ni a du gyi ni hpang de sit sa nna," 
Joshua21:2 “Anhte nga na matu mare mung, yamnga rem na ginwang ga mung anhte hpe jaw na lam, Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da nu ai,” nga nna hkanan mung Shilo mare e sa tsun mu ai." 
Joshua21:3 Dai rai nna Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Yehowa hkang da sai hte maren tinang nang a sali ga hta na mare hte ginwang ga Lewi masha ni hpe, jaw mu ai." 
Joshua21:4 Kohat lakung lama ni matu hpaida hta jaw nna, lu la ai sali ga hta Lewi masha hkinjawng Arun a kashu kasha ni hpaida hta jaw ai mare ni gaw, Yuda amyu, Simun amyu hte Ben-yamin amyu ni hta na, mare shi masum rai nga malu ai." 
Joshua21:5 Naw nga ai Kohat kashu kasha ni gaw Ehprim amyu, Dan amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, hpaida jaw ai hte mare shi lu la ma ai." 
Joshua21:6 Gershon kashu kasha ni mung hpaida hta jaw nna, Yishahka amyu, Ashe amyu, Naphtali amyu hta na hte Bashan mung e Manashe amyu chyen mi kaw na mare shi masum lu la ma ai." 
Joshua21:7 Merari kashu kasha ni mung tinang lakung lama hkan nna, Rubin amyu, Gad amyu hte Zebulun amyu hta na mare shi lahkawng lu la ma ai." 
Joshua21:8 Shing rai Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da wu ai hte maren, ndai mare ni hte mare ginwang ni hpe, hpaida hte, Lewi masha ni hpe jaw mu ai." 
Joshua21:9 Shanhte gaw, Yuda amyu kashu kasha ni hte Simun amyu kashu kasha ni hta na, ndai ngu shamying ai mare ni hpe jaw mu ai rai nna," 
Joshua21:10 dai hte gaw Lewi amyu Kohat lakung na Arun a kashu kasha ni a matu rai nga ai: kaning rai nme law, shawng na hkambum gaw shanhte a rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:11 Dai ni gaw, Yuda bum ga na Kiriat-arba ngu ai Hebron mare hte dai hte seng ai ginwang ga shanhte hpe jaw mu ai: (dai Arba chyawm gaw Anak a kawa rai nga ai)" 
Joshua21:12 Rai timung dai mare a yi hkauna ni hte de a kahtawng ni chyawm gaw, Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb hpe sali ga jaw da mu ai." 
Joshua21:13 Shing rai hkinjawng Arun a kashu kasha ni hpe, masha hkala sat hkrup ai wa a shingbyi mare tai na matu Hebron hte de a ginwang ga, Libna hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:14 Yatira hte de a ginwang ga, Eshtemoa hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:15 Holon hte de a ginwang ga, Debira hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:16 Ain hte de a ginwang ga, Yuta hte de a ginwang ga, Bet-sheme hte de a ginwang ga jaw mu ai: dai gaw dai amyu lahkawng hta na, mare jahku rai nga ma ai;" 
Joshua21:17 bai, Ben-yamin amyu hta na, Gibeon hte de a ginwang ga, Geba hte de a ginwang ga," 
Joshua21:18 Anahtot hte de a ginwang ga, Alamon hte de a ginwang ga, ngu ai mare mali jaw mu ai." 
Joshua21:19 Shing rai Arun a kashu kasha hkinjawng ni lu la ai mare yawng gaw, ginwang ga hte hpawn hpawn, mare shi masum rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:20 Naw ngam ai Kohat kashu kasha lakung lama Lewi masha ni a hkambum mare ni gaw Ehprim amyu hta lawm nga ai. 
Joshua21:21 Shanhte hpe jaw ai mare dai ni gaw, masha hkala sat hkrup ai wa a shingbyi mare na matu, Ehprim bum ga na Shehkem mare hte de a ginwang ga, Gezara mare hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:22 Kibzim hte de a ginwang ga; Bet-horon hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai. 
Joshua21:23 Bai, Dan amyu hta na, Elateke hte de a ginwang ga, Gibehton hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:24 Aiyalon hte de a ginwang ga, Gat-rimon hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:25 Bai, Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, Tanak hte de a ginwang ga, Gat-rimon hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare lahkawng rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:26 Shing rai naw ngam ai Kohat kashu kasha lakung lama ni lu la ai mare hte ginwang ga gaw, mare shi rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua21:27 Bai, Gershon a kashu kasha lakung lama Lewi masha ni hpe jaw ai mare ni gaw, masha hkala sat hkrup ai wa a shingbyi mare tai na matu, Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, Bashan mung e Golan hte de a ginwang ga, Be-eshtera hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare lahkawng rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:28 Yishahka amyu hta na Kishon hte de a ginwang ga, Daberat hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:29 Yarmut hte de a ginwang ga, En-ga-nim hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:30 Bai, Ashe amyu hta na, Mishala hte de a ginwang ga, Abdon hte de a ginwang ga," 
Joshua21:31 Helakat hte de a ginwang ga, Rehob hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:32 Bai, Naphtali amyu hta na, masha hkala sat hkrup ai wa a shingbyi mare tai na matu, Galile mung e Kedesha hte de a ginwang ga, Hammot-dora hte de a ginwang ga, Kartan hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare masum rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:33 Shing rai Gershon a kashu kasha ni tinang lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai mare hte ginwang ga gaw, mare shi masum rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:34 Bai, naw ngam ai Lewi masha, Merari kashu kasha lakung lama ni hpe jaw ai mare ni gaw, Zebulun amyu hta na, Yoknam hte de a ginwang ga, Karta hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:35 Dimna hte de a ginwang ga, Nahala hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:36 Bai, Rubin amyu hta na, Bezera hte de a ginwang ga, Yahaza hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot hte de a ginwang ga, Mepat hte de a ginwang ga ngu ai mare mali rai nga ai. Bai, Gad amyu hta na, masha hkala sat hkrup ai wa a shingbyi mare tai na matu, Gilead mung Ramot hte de a ginwang ga, Mahanim hte de a ginwang ga;" 
Joshua21:38  
Joshua21:39 Heshbon hte de a ginwang ga, Yazera hte de a ginwang ga, ngu ai mare mali tup rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:40 Shing rai, naw ngam ai Lewi amyu, Merari kashu kasha ni, tinang lakung lama hkan nna lu la ai hkambum mare ni gaw, mare shi lahkawng rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:41 Israela kashu kasha ni a kata e Lewi masha ni nga nga lu ai mare ni yawng gaw, ginwang ga ni hte hpawn hpawn, mare mali shi matsat rai nga ai." 
Joshua21:42 Dai mare ni mahkra gaw, langai hte langai grup yin e ginwang ga lawm ai hkrai rai nga ma ai." 
Joshua21:43 Shing rai, Ngai jaw na, nga nna Yehowa shanhte a kaji kawa ni hpe shaka da ai mungdan yawng mayawng, Israela kashu kasha ni hpe jaw nu ai rai nna, shanhte madu la lu ai hte dai hta nga nga masai." 
Joshua21:44 Yehowa kaji kawa ni hpe ga shaka da ai hte maren, grup yin shara shagu hta ban sa shangun mu ai rai nna, shanhte a man e kadai masha hpyen wa mung n tsap lu ma ai; Yehowa shanhte hpe masha hpyen ni yawng a lata na shaw la mu ai." 
Joshua21:45 Yehowa Israela masha ni hpe tsun da ai chyeju lam langai mi muk yawm ai n rai: yawng mayawng byin tup wa sai. 
Joshua22:1 Shaloi Yawshu gaw, Rubin masha ni, Gad a masha ni hte Manashe chyen masha ni hpe shaga la nna," 
Joshua22:2 “Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe nanhte hpe hkang da mada hte maren, nanhte hkan galaw nna, ngai nanhte hpe hkang da mada mung, nanhte madat manit dai:" 
Joshua22:3 dai ni du hkra, ndai hte na wa ai laman e, nhpu nnau ni hpe nanhte n kau da ai sha, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte hpe hkang da ai lam nanhte hkan shatup manit dai." 
Joshua22:4 Ya chyawm gaw, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa ga ndat nga ai hte maren, nanhte a nhpu nnau ni hpe ban sa shangun mu ai: dai re ai majaw nanhte nhtang nna, Yawdan hka wora hkran e Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe nanhte hpe jaw da ai, nanhte a ndum nta, nanhte madu lu ai sali ga de, bai wa manu." 
Joshua22:5 Rai timung, Yehowa a shangun kasa Mawshe hkang da ai ga hte jep ai tara hpe hkan shatup nna, nanhte a myit masin mahkra hte kraw lawang mahkra hte, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe tsawra nna, shi a lam shagu hkan nang let, shi hkang da ai ga madat, shi hta shamyet shanat nna, shi a magam gun hpai lu na, shaja nga mu,” ngu nna tsun wu ai." 
Joshua22:6 Shing rai Yawshu gaw shanhte hpe shaman ya nna dat dat wu ai: shanhte mung tinang ndum nta de bai wa ma ai. 
Joshua22:7 Manashe amyu chyen mi a matu sali ga gaw Bashan mung hta Mawshe jaw da sai; bai chyen mi a matu gaw Yawdan hka sinna hkran de shanhte a hpunau ni hte rau Yawshu jaw nu ai. 
Joshua22:8 Dai hta kaga Yawshu shanhte hpe ndum nta de dat dat yang, Ya, nanhte sutgan law law, yamnga law law, aja gumhpraw ahpri magri hte hpun palawng law law wa lu la manit dai rai nna nanhte a ndum nta de wa manit: masha hpyen ni kaw na kashun la lu ai lanep rai ni hpe nhpu nnau ni hte karan la mu, nga nna tsun let shanhte hpe shaman ya mu ai." 
Joshua22:9 Shing rai Rubin kashu kasha ni, Gad a kashu kasha ni hte Manashe amyu chyen mi gaw, Yehowa Mawshe a n-gup hta hkang da ai hte maren, shanhte a madu lu ai ga, Gilead mung de nhtang wa na nga, Hkanan mung Shilo mare e, Israela kashu kasha ni kaw na pru wa ma ai." 
Joshua22:10 Ya shanhte Hkanan mung na Yawdan hka ginwang du jang, Rubin kashu kasha ni, Gad kashu kasha ni hte Manashe amyu chyen ni gaw, Yawdan hka makau e dan hkung ai tawn hkungri kaba gaw tawn ma ai." 
Joshua22:11 Shing rai, Yu mu, Rubin a kashu kasha ni, Gad a kashu kasha ni hte Manashe amyu chyen ni gaw, Hkanan mung hte tawtap, Yawdan ginwang hta, Israela kashu kasha ni hte hkran hpra e, tawn hkungri gaw tawn masai, nga ai shi Israela kashu kasha ni na ma ai." 
Joshua22:12 Israela kashu kasha ni dai shi na jang, shanhte hpe sa gasat na nga, Israela kashu kasha ni a shawa hpung ting Shilo mare e zuphpawng nga ma ai." 
Joshua22:13 Ya, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, hkinjawng Eleaza a kasha Hpineha hte Israela amyu lakung shagu hta na du kaba ni ngu ai, Israela masha mun mun hkying hkying hta na du agyi marai shi hte hpe san la nna," 
Joshua22:14 Rubin amyu, Gad amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen ni nga ai Gilead mung de shangun dat mu ai." 
Joshua22:15 Shaloi shanhte gaw Rubin amyu, Gad amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen ni nga ai Gilead mung du nna," 
Joshua22:16 Yehowa a shawa hpung ting ning nga ma ai, “Nanhte dai ni Yehowa hpe gumlau na nga tawn hkungri gaw da nna, Yehowa a lam hpe dai ni kau da ai hte Israela Karai Kasang hpe tawt lai myit dai gaw, hpa lam rai nga malit ta?" 
Joshua22:17 Nanhte dai ni Yehowa a lam n hkan ai dam mat wa na gaw, Peora a majaw hkrum ai yubak, anhte a matu garai n ram a ni? Yehowa a shawa hpung hta ana zinli du ai pyi, dai hpe anhte dai ni du hkra garai n shasan lu ga ai:" 
Joshua22:18 nanhte dai ni Yehowa hpe gumlau ai majaw, hpawt ni Israela shawa hpung ting hta shi a pawt ai sindawng du na ra ai." 
Joshua22:19 Nanhte madu ai lamu ga n san n seng malit yang, Yehowa madu nna Yehowa a shawa sum nga ai mung de rap nhtawm, anhte hte rau wa madu la maru: shing n rai timung, anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa a tawn hkungri hta kaga, tinang a matu tawn hkungri shaje gaw da nna Yehowa hpe hkum gumlau myit, anhte hpe mung hkum gumlau myit," 
Joshua22:20 Zera kasha Ahkan mung machyai kau sai rai hta shut ai majaw, Israela shawa hpung ting a ntsa e pawt sindawng du ai n rai ni? Dai wa shut ai majaw shi hkrai si sum ai n rai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
Joshua22:21 shaloi Rubin a kashu kasha ni, Gad a kashu kasha ni hte Manashe amyu chyen ni gaw Israela masha mun mun hkying hkying a du gyi ni hpe," 
Joshua22:22 Hpung shingkang rawng ai Karai Kasang Yehowa, Hpung shingkang rawng ai Karai Kasang Yehowa shi nan chye nga ai: Israela masha ni mung chye lu na marin dai: Anhte gumlau mayu nna, Yehowa hpe tawt lai myit rawng nna, Yehowa a lam hta na dam mat wa na ngu nna tawn hkungri galaw ai she rai saga yang gaw, dai ni jang hkrum sha n ga:" 
Joshua22:23 dai tawn hkungri hta wan nat hkungga, shadung kumhpa hte mahku hkungga nawng na myit ga ai rai yang gaw, Yehowa shi nan sawk yu mi ga:" 
Joshua22:24 htawm hpang prat e nanhte a kashu kasha ni mahtang, Rubin kashu kasha ni hte Gad kashau kasha ni e, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa hte nanhte hpa daw myit ta?" 
Joshua22:25 Yehowa gaw nanhte hte anhte a lapran e Yawdan hka din da nu ai: “Yehowa hte nanhte hpa n daw myit dai,” nga nna anhte a kashu kasha ni hpe tsun na ra ai majaw, anhte a kashu kasha ni Yehowa hpe n hkrit n kang ai nga mat shangun na hpe anhte tsang ai majaw she ndai galaw ga ai n rai ni?" 
Joshua22:26 Dai rai nna, “Anhte tawn hkungri galaw saga,” ngu nna bawng ga ai: wan nat hkungga nawng na ngu ai mung n rai;" 
Joshua22:27 htawm hpang prat e nanhte a kashu kasha ni anhte a kashu kasha ni hpe, “Nanhte gaw Yehowa hte hpa n daw myit dai,” n nga lu mu ga ngu nna mung, anhte Yehowa man e wan nat hkungga hte mayu hkungga nawng jau let amu gun hpai lu n ga ngu nna mung, anhte hte nanhte a lapran e ndai tawn hkungri gaw anhte a hpang na shu mashi shu masha prat dingsa sakse tai nga u ga,” ngu nna she gaw tawn ga ai." 
Joshua22:28 Shing rai, htawm hpang prat e shanhte gaw anhte hte anhte a kashu kasha ni hpe shing nga tsun jang, anhte mung, “Anhte a ji wa ni gaw da ai Yehowa a tawn hkungri hkrang hpe yu yu mu; dai gaw wan nat hkungga nawng na matu n rai, mayu hkungga nawng na matu mung n rai; anhte hte nanhte a lapran e sakse tai na matu she gaw tawn ai re ai, nga nna tsun lu shara rawng nga u ga, ngu nna bawng ga ai." 
Joshua22:29 Anhte Yehowa hpe gumlau nna, shawa sum a man na anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa a tawn hkungri hta kaga, tawn hkungri shaje galaw nna wan nat hkungga, shadung kumhpa hte mayu hkungga nawng jau ai hte Yehowa a lam hta na dai ni dam mat wa na gaw anhte hte tsan nga u ga law,” ngu nna htan mu ai." 
Joshua22:30 Hkinjawng Hpineha hte shi hte rau nga ai shawa hpung a du gyi ni ngu ai Israela masha mun mun hkying hkying a du gyi ni gaw, Rubin kashu kasha, Gad kashu kasha ni hte Manashe kashu kasha ni a ga na jang, shanhte grai kabu nga ma ai." 
Joshua22:31 Shaloi hkinjawng Eleaza a kasha Hpineha gaw, “Nanhte Yehowa hpe n shut myit dai majaw, Yehowa anhte hta nga nga ai gaw dai ni anhte chye saga ai: nanhte Israela kashu kasha ni hpe Yehowa a lata na ya hkye la manit dai,” ngu nna Rubin kashu kasha ni, Gad kashu kasha ni hte Manashe kashu kasha ni hpe tsun mu ai." 
Joshua22:32 Shing rai hkinjawng Eleaza a kasha Hpineha hte du gyi ni gaw, Rubin kashu kasha ni hte Gad kashu kasha ni nga ai Gilead mung nna, Israela kashu kasha ni nga ai Hkanan mung de bai wa nna dai shiga wa tsun shana wu ai." 
Joshua22:33 Israela kashu kasha ni dai ga na jang kabu nga ma ai: Israela kashu kasha ni mung Karai Kasang hpe shakawn kungdawn nna, Rubin kashu kasha ni hte Gad a kashu kasha ni nga ai mung hpe hpya kau na matu, shanhte hpe hpyen rawt na lam, naw n tsun masai." 
Joshua22:34 Rubin kashu kasha ni hte Gad kashu kasha ni mung dai tawn hkungri hpe ‘Eda', ngu shamying mu ai: kaning rai nme law, Yehowa, Karai Kasang rai nga ai gaw, ndai tawn hkungri anhte a lapran e sakse rai nga ai, nga ai rai malu ai." 
Joshua23:1 Ya, Yehowa gaw, grup yin na hpyen ni yawng hpe manga kau ai hte Israela kashu kasha ni hpe ban sa shangun ai tsawmra na wa nna, Yawshu aprat kaba nna dingla wa sayang;" 
Joshua23:2 Yawshu gaw Israela masha ni yawng hte shanhte a salang ni, du gyi ni, tara agyi ni hte bu ni hpe shaga la nna, “Ngai gaw aprat kaba ai hte dingla ni ai:" 
Joshua23:3 nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte a matu ndai amyu masha ni yawng hte hta galaw ai lam magup hpe nanhte hkum nan chye myit dai: nanhte hpang maga majan gasat ya ai gaw, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa rai nga ai." 
Joshua23:4 Yu mu, Yawdan hka kaw nna, sinna maga Nammukdara kaba du hkra, ngai shamyit kau sai masha amyu nlang hte, ndai ngam nga ai amyu ni a mungdan hpe nanhte amyu ni a sali wunli tai na matu, ngai karan ya masade ai." 
Joshua23:5 Nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa ga ndat nga ai hte maren, ndai amyu ni hpe nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa shachyut kau nna, nanhte a myi man na shaden kau na hte, shanhte a lamu ga nanhte madu la na marin dai." 
Joshua23:6 Dai re ai majaw, nanhte myit nden shaja nna Mawshe a laika hta ka da mada hte maren, pai de hkra de n yit ai sha, hkan nang nga mu;" 
Joshua23:7 nanhte hta naw ngam nga ai ndai amyu ni hte n kanawn, shanhte a Hpara amying n gang, de a amying hte n dagam, shanhte hpe n jaw n jau, n naw n ku ai sha;" 
Joshua23:8 dai ni du hkra hkan nga manit dai zawn, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hta shamyet shanat nga mu." 
Joshua23:9 Kaning rai nme law, Yehowa nanhte a man na galu kaba ai hte n-gun ja ai amyu ni hpe shaden kau ya sai rai nna, dai ni du hkra nanhte a man e kadai n tsap lu masai." 
Joshua23:10 Nanhte hpe tsun da sai hte maren, nanhte hpang maga gasat karum ai wa nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa rai nga ai majaw, nanhte hta na marai langai sha masha hkying mi hpe jahtaw kau lu na marin dai." 
Joshua23:11 Dai re ai majaw, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe tsawra nga na, grai sadi nga mu." 
Joshua23:12 Dai n rai, nanhte loi mi sha htak mat wa nna, ya nanhte hta naw ngam nga ai ndai amyu ni hte makyit mahkai let, num la num ya rai nna, shanhte hte kanawn mazum myit yang gaw, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa htawm hpang de ndai amyu ni hpe nanhte a man na shaden kau ya sa na n rai:" 
Joshua23:13 nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte hpe jaw sai, ndai kaja ai mungdan hta na nanhte n htum mat dingsa, shanhte gaw nanhte a dawnggawng hte ndaw mahkam, nanhte a garep hta lasik, nanhte a myi hta aju tai na mara ai gaw, gaja wa teng teng chye da nga mu law." 
Joshua23:14 Yu mu, ngai mi chyawm gaw, ga ntsa n-gawn shawa yawng wa ai lam de, dai ni wa ni ai: nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte a matu tsun da ai chyeju lam langai mi muk n yawm ai sha, nlang hte hpring tup wa sai gaw, nanhte nan tinang kraw, tinang myit hta chye nga myit dai." 
Joshua23:15 Nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa, nanhte hpe tsun da sai chyeju lam shagu nanhte hta hpring tup wa sai zawn, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte hpe jaw ai ndai mungdan kaja hta na nanhte n htum mat dingsa, nanhte a ntsa e ari hkum sumhpa mung Yehowa dat dat na ra ai." 
Joshua23:16 Nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa nanhte hpe hkang da ai ga shaka lam hta na nanhte tawt lai nna, Hpara shaje ni hpe sa jaw jau ai hte nawku nga myit yang gaw, Yehowa a pawt ai sindawng nanhte hta du nna, shi nanhte hpe jaw da ai ndai mungdan kaja hta na nanhte alawan htum mat wa na marin dai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
Joshua24:1 Ya, Yawshu gaw, Israela amyu yawng hte hpe Shehkem mare e jahpawng nna, Israela salang ni, du gyi ni, tara agyi ni hte bu ni hpe shaga la wu ai: shanhte gaw Karai Kasang a man de sa pru ma ai." 
Joshua24:2 Shaloi Yawshu Israela masha ni mahkra hpe, tsun wu ai gaw, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa ning nga ai: “Abraham hte Nahora a kawa Htera ngu ai nanhte nji nwa ni, moi prat e dai Hka nu wora hkran e nga nga ma ai rai nna, shanhte Hpara kaga nawku ma ai." 
Joshua24:3 Shaloi nanhte a kawa Abraham hpe Hka wora hkran na ngai shaga nna, Hkanan mung ting shi e woi hkawm let shi a amyu matu shalaw jahtam ai hte Isak hpe jaw we ai." 
Joshua24:4 Isak hpe mung Yaku hte Esaw ngai jaw nna, Esaw hpe Seira bum madun se ai: Yaku hte shi a kashu kasha ni chyawm gaw Egutu mung de yu wa ma ai." 
Joshua24:5 Dai de Mawshe yan Arun hpe ngai shangun nna, Egutu masha ni hta galaw ai lam hte maren Egutu mung hpe sharim kau nna, dai hpang nanhte hpe shaw woi wa made ai." 
Joshua24:6 Shing rai, nanhte a nji nwa ni hpe Egutu mung na ngai shaw woi wa nna, nanhte gaw dai nawng de du wa myit dai: Egutu masha ni mung, leng hte gumra jawn ai hpyen hte rai nna dai Hkyeng ai nawng du hkra nanhte a nji nwa ni hpe hkan shachyut ma ai." 
Joshua24:7 Shanhte Yehowa hpe jahtau jang, nanhte hte Egutu masha ni a lapran e nsin madin shi din da nna, shanhte a ntsa e dai hka shalim dat ai hte shanhte hpe galup kau mu ai: shing rai, Egutu mung hta ngai galaw ai lam hpe nanhte myi chye mu yu manit dai: nam mali hkan e mung nhtoi tsawmra wa na hkra nanhte nga kau manit dai." 
Joshua24:8 Dai hpang, Yawdan hka wora hkran e nga ai Amori masha ni a mung de ngai nanhte hpe woi shawn nna, shanhte nanhte hpe hkap gasat ma ai: shaloi shanhte hpe nanhte a lata de ngai ap kau ai rai nna, shanhte a lamu ga nanhte madu la lu myit dai; shanhte hpe mung nanhte a man na ngai shamyit kau mase ai." 
Joshua24:9 Shaloi Moba hkawhkam, Zipora kasha Balak mung rawt nna, Israela hpe gasat wu ai: nanhte hpe matsa sat na matu mung, Beora kasha Balam hpe shaga wu ai:" 
Joshua24:10 ngai chyawm gaw Balam a ga n madat ya we ai; dai majaw shi nanhte hpe a shaman ya nga nna, shi a lata na ngai nanhte hpe hkye la masade ai." 
Joshua24:11 Bai, nanhte Yawdan hka rap nna Yerihko de du wa myit dai: Yerihko masha ni ngu ai, Amori, Perizi, Hkanani, Hiti, Girgashi, Hiwi hte Yebusi masha ni nanhte hpe hkap gasat ma timung, shanhte hpe nanhte a lata de ngai ap kau mawe ai." 
Joshua24:12 Shing rai, na a nhtu hte n rai, na a ndan hte n rai, nanhte a shawng e git shang ngai shangun dat nna, dai Amori hkawhkam lahkawng hpe shaden kau ya masade ai." 
Joshua24:13 Nanhte n shaja da ai lamu ga, nanhte n de ai mare, ngai nanhte hpe jaw nna, dai hta nanhte nga nga lu myit dai; nanhte n hkai ai tsabyi sun hte tsanlun sun hta na nanhte sha lu myit dai,” nga nna Yehowa tsun nga ai." 
Joshua24:14 “Dai re ai majaw, Yehowa hpe hkrit hkungga nna, sadi sahka re ai hte tengman ai hku shi hpe jaw jau nga mu: Hka wora hkran na hte Egutu mung e nanhte a nji nwa ni jaw jau ai Hpara ni hpe kau da nna, Yehowa hpe jaw jau nga mu." 
Joshua24:15 Shing n rai, Yehowa hpe jaw jau na nanhte n ra myit yang gaw, Hka wora hkran na nanhte a nji nwa ni jaw jau ai Hpara ni hte ya nanhte nga ai mung na Amori masha ni a Hpara ni hta, gara hpe mahtang jaw jau na gaw, dai ni jang lata la mu: ngai hte nye a nta masha ni chyawm gaw Yehowa hpe jaw jau na ga ai law,” ngu nna tsun wu ai." 
Joshua24:16 Shaloi amyu masha ni gaw, “Yehowa hpe kau da nna, Hpara shaje sa jaw jau na gaw anhte hte tsan nga u ga law;" 
Joshua24:17 Egutu mung a mayam nta na anhte hte anhte a ji wa ni hpe shaw woi wa nna, ndai lamik kumla kaba anhte a man e madun dan ai hte, anhte hkawm wa ai lam dingdung hkan e, anhte ga hkawm wa ai masha amyu ni hta anhte hpe bau sin ai gaw, anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa sha rai nga ai:" 
Joshua24:18 ndai mungdan hta nga ai Amori amyu ni mahkra hpe anhte a man na shaden kau ya ai mung, Yehowa rai nga ai: dai re ai majaw, anhte mung Yehowa hpe jaw jau na ga ai; shi chyu sha anhte a Karai Kasang rai nga ai law,” nga nna htan ma ai." 
Joshua24:19 Bai, Yawshu gaw amyu masha ni hpe, “Nanhte Yehowa hpe n jau lu na myit dai: shi gaw chyoi pra ai Karai Kasang rai nga ai; nsu nnawn loi ai Karai Kasang mung rai nga ai: shi gaw nanhte a shut hpyit ai amu hte nanhte a yubak hpe raw dat kau lu na n rai." 
Joshua24:20 Nanhte Yehowa hpe kau da nna, Hpara tsasam ni hpe lama sa jau dam yang, nanhte hpe chyeju jaw da nhtawm, shi bai nhtang nna hpya shamyit kau na myit dai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
Joshua24:21 Shaloi amyu masha ni gaw, “N rai law, anhte Yehowa hpe jaw jau na ga ai,” nga nna Yawshu hpe bai htan ma ai." 
Joshua24:22 Bai Yawshu gaw amyu masha ni hpe, “Yehowa hpe jaw jau na nga, nanhte shi e lata la manit dai gaw, nanhte hkum nan sakse rai nga myit dai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai. Shanhte mung, “Rai nga ga ai,” nga ma ai." 
Joshua24:23 Yawshu mung, “Dai rai yang gaw, nanhte jau tawn ai Hpara tsasam ni hpe tsan kau nna, nanhte a myit masin hpe Israela a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpang de kayin dat mu,” ngu mu ai." 
Joshua24:24 Amyu masha ni mung, “Anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe anhte jaw jau na ga ai; shi a ga anhte madat mara na ga ai,” nga nna Yawshu a man e yin la ma ai." 
Joshua24:25 Shing rai Yawshu gaw dai shani e, amyu masha ni hte ga shaka da nna, Shehkem mare e matsun maroi hte ga madat tawn da wu ai." 
Joshua24:26 Yawshu gaw, ga dai ni hpe Karai Kasang a tara laika hta ka da wu ai; Yehowa a chyoi pra ai sum makau na wamyi hpun npu e nlung kaba sharawt jung tawn nhtawm," 
Joshua24:27 Yawshu gaw, “Yu mu, ndai nlung mahtan gaw anhte a matu sakse tai nga na rai nga ai: Yehowa nanhte hpe tsun ai ga yawng mayawng dai hta na la sai; dai rai nna, nanhte a Karai Kasang hpe nanhte n ningdang kau myit ga, dai gaw nanhte hpang maga na sakse tai nga na ra ai,” ngu nna amyu masha ni nlang hte hpe tsun dat wu ai." 
Joshua24:28 Dai ngut jang Yawshu gaw amyu masha ni langai hte langai hpe tinang a sali ga de wa shangun mu ai. 
Joshua24:29 Dai amu ni ngut ai hpang, Yehowa a shangun kasa, Nun a kasha Yawshu gaw, asak latsa e shi ning du nna, si mat sai." 
Joshua24:30 Shi hpe, Ehprim bum ga, Gasha kawng dingdung maga e nga ai, shi a lamu ga sali Timnat-sera mare ginwang na ga hta makoi mayang mu ai." 
Joshua24:31 Yawshu a prat tup hta mung, Israela masha ni a matu Yehowa galaw ai lam magup hpe chye nna Yawshu a hpang e shi hpe mu dep ai salang ni a prat tup hta mung, Israela masha ni Yehowa hpe jaw jau ma ai." 
Joshua24:32 Israela kashu kasha ni gaw Egutu mung na la wa ai Yawsep a nrut nra hpe, Shehkem a kawa Hamura kashu kasha ni kaw na, Yaku gaw gumhpraw lap latsa hte mari la ai, Shehkem mare a ginwang na ga dachyawk hta wa lup mu ai; dai gaw Yawsep a kashu kasha ni a sali wunli rai nga ai." 
Joshua24:33 Arun a kasha Eleaza mung si mat sai; amyu masha ni shi a kasha Hpineha hpe jaw ai Ehprim bum ga na Hpineha kawng hta shi hpe makoi mayang ma ai. 
Judges1:1 Ya Yawshu si mat ai hpang, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw Yehowa hpe, “Hkanani masha ni hpe sa gasat na, anhte hpe kadai mahtang woi shawng na rai ta?” ngu nna san mu ai." 
Judges1:2 Yehowa gaw, “Yuda mahtang woi shawng na re ai: shi a lata dai mungdan hpe ngai ap kau se ai,” ngu nna tsun wu ai." 
Judges1:3 Shaloi Yuda gaw shi a kahpu Simun hpe, “Hkanani masha ni hpe sa gasat na, nye a hkambum ga de ngai hpe naw sa karum rit; dai hpang na a hkambum ga de mung ngai hkan nang na nngai,” ngu wu ai. Simun mung, shi kaw hkan nang sa wa ai." 
Judges1:4 Shing rai Yuda hpyen rawt wu ai. Yehowa mung, Hkanani hte Perizi masha ni hpe shi a lata hta ap wu ai rai nna, shanhte gaw Bezek mare e masha mun mi hpe gasat kau mu ai." 
Judges1:5 Adoni-bezek hpe Bezek mare e shanhte mu hkrup mu ai; shanhte shi hpe gasat nna Hkanani hte Perizi masha ni hpe dang kau mu ai. 
Judges1:6 Adoni-bezek chyawm gaw hprawng mat wa ai; shanhte mung shi hpe hkan shachyut rim la nna, lata yung nu lagaw yung nu ni hpe krum kau ya mu ai." 
Judges1:7 Shaloi Adoni-bezek gaw “Lata yung nu hte lagaw yung nu krum kau mana ai hkawhkam sanit shi hte nye a sha ku npu e shat hkyep shat hkap hta sha ma ai; ngai di ai hte maren Karai Kasang ngai hta bai tai ni ai,” nga ai. Dai wa hpe shanhte Yerusalem mare de sa kau mu ai rai nna, dai yang shi si mat ai." 
Judges1:8 Bai Yuda kashu kasha ni gaw Yerusalem mare hpe gasat la nna, nhtu hte hpya sat kau nhtawm wan hte nat kau mu ai." 
Judges1:9 Dai hpang Yuda kashu kasha ni gaw, bum ga hkan na, Dingda maga hkan na hte pa ga hkan na Hkanani masha ni hpang de gasat na, yu sa wa ma ai." 
Judges1:10 Bai Yuda masha ni gaw Hebron e nga ai Hkanani masha ni hpe sa gasat nna, Sheshai, Ahiman hte Talamai hpe sat kau mu ai: Hebron mare a shawng na amying gaw Kiriat-arba rai nga ai." 
Judges1:11 Dai kaw nna shanhte gaw Debira mare masha ni hpe sa gasat ma ai: dai Debira gaw shawng e Kiriat-sehpera mying ai rai nga ai. 
Judges1:12 Shaloi Hkaleb gaw, “Kiriat-sehpera gasat la lu ai wa hpe, ngai shayi sha Aksa ya sha na,” ngu wu ai." 
Judges1:13 Dai rai nna, Hkaleb a kanau Kenaza a kasha Otniela gaw dai mare hpe gasat la wu ai rai nna, Hkaleb gaw dai wa hpe shi a shayi sha Aksa ya sha wu ai." 
Judges1:14 Dai numsha gaw rawt wa ai shaloi e, kawa kaw yi hpyi na lam madu wa hte bawng nna, lawze dinghkung na yu hkrat wa ai: shaloi Hkaleb gaw, “Nang hpa ra n ta?” ngu wu yang," 
Judges1:15 Shi gaw, “Chyeju shaman ya e; nang ngai e Dingda ga e tawn da nit dai majaw, hka hpawk mung naw jaw e law,” ngu nna shi hpe hpyi wu ai. Hkaleb mung, lahta hka hpawk hte lawu hka hpawk shi e jaw wu ai." 
Judges1:16 Ya Mawshe a kahkau a kashu kasha Keni masha ni mung, Yuda kashu kasha ni hte rau, namhtan hpun mare na lung wa nhtawm, Arad shara dingda maga na Yuda nam mali de du nna, dai hkan e shanhte hte rau nga nga ma ai." 
Judges1:17 Bai Yuda gaw kahpu Simun kaw hkan sa nna, Zephat mare nga ai Hkanani masha ni hpe sat kau nhtawm, mare hpe atsai awai hpya kau mu ai: mare dai hpe mung, Horma ngu nna shamying mu ai." 
Judges1:18 Yuda mung, Gaza hte de a ginwang, Askelon hte de a ginwang, Ekron hte de a ginwang ni hpe gasat kau ya wu ai." 
Judges1:19 Yehowa mung Yuda hte rau nga nga ai rai nna, shi gaw bum ga e nga ai ni hpe shachyut kau wu ai: layang ga na ni hpe chyawm gaw hpri leng lu ai majaw n gawt kau lu mu ai." 
Judges1:20 Mawshe hkang da ai hte maren Hkaleb hpe Hebron mare jaw mu ai rai nna, shi gaw dai mare na Anak a kasha masum hpe shaden kau mu ai." 
Judges1:21 Ben-yamin a kashu kasha ni gaw Yerusalem mare nga ai Yebusi masha ni hpe n shachyut kau lu mu ai rai nna, Yebusi masha ni dai ni du hkra Yerusalem mare Ben-yamin kashu kasha ni hte rau nga nga ma ai." 
Judges1:22 Yawsep a kashu kasha ni mung, Behtela de hpyen rawt ma ai rai nna, Yehowa shanhte hte rau rai nga ai." 
Judges1:23 Behtela de kin-yu yu na Yawsep a kashu kasha ni masha shangun dat mu ai. (Dai mare a amying chyawm gaw, moi shawng e Luza rai nga ai.)" 
Judges1:24 Sin yu ai masha ni gaw mare na pru wa ai masha langai mi hpe mu nna, “Mare de shang wa ai lam anhte hpe madun rit; madun yang gaw nang hpe hkyamsa jaw na ga ai,” ngu mu ai." 
Judges1:25 Dai wa mung mare de shang ai lam madun wu ai rai nna, shanhte gaw dai mare a masha ni hpe nhtu hte sat kau mu ai: dai wa hte shi a nta masha ni mahkra hpe chyawm gaw, shanhte dat dat mu ai." 
Judges1:26 Dai wa gaw Hiti mung de sa nna, mare de nhtawm Luza shamying wu ai; dai ni du hkra shing nga mying nga ai." 
Judges1:27 Manashe masha ni chyawm gaw, Bet-shean hte de a kahtawng ni, Tanak hte de a kahtawng ni, Dora hte de a kahtawng ni, Iblam hte de a kahtawng ni, Megido hte de a kahtawng ni hta nga ai masha ni hpe n shachyut kau mu ai rai nna, Hkanani masha ni dai mung hta nga nga ma ai." 
Judges1:28 Israela masha ni n-gun ja wa ma jang, shanhte Hkanani masha ni hpe amu bungli gun hpai shangun nna, shanhte hpe atsai awai shamyit kau mu ai n rai." 
Judges1:29 Dai zawn Ehprim masha ni mung Gezera mare na Hkanani masha ni hpe n shachyut kau mu ai rai nna, Hkanani masha ni gaw Gezera mare hta shanhte hte rau nga nga ma ai." 
Judges1:30 Dai zawn Zebulun masha ni mung, Kitron mare masha ni hte Nahalola mare masha ni hpe n shachyut kau mu ai rai nna, Hkanani masha ni shanhte hte rau nga nga let, amu bungli gun hpai ya nna nga ma ai." 
Judges1:31 Dai zawn Ashe masha ni mung Ahko mare, Sidon mare, Alab mare, Akzib mare, Helaba mare, Ahpik mare hte Rehob mare masha ni hpe n shachyut kau mu ai sha," 
Judges1:32 dai mung madu Hkanani masha ni hte rau Ashe masha ni nga nga ma ai: shanhte hpe shachyut kau mu ai n rai. 
Judges1:33 Dai zawn Naphtali masha ni mung, Bet-sheme mare masha ni hte Bet-anat mare masha ni hpe n shachyut kau mu ai sha, mung madu Hkanani masha ni hte rau, shanhte nga nga ma ai: rai timung, Bet-sheme hte Bet-anat masha ni gaw amu bungli gun hpai ya nna nga nga ma ai." 
Judges1:34 Amori masha ni gaw, Dan a kashu kasha ni hpe bum ga de nga nga shangun mu ai; pa ga de nga na hkraw ya mu ai n rai." 
Judges1:35 Amori masha ni chyawm gaw Here bum, Aiyalon hte Shalabim hkan e nga nga ma ai: rai timung, Yawsep a kashu kasha ni dang kau mu ai rai nna, Amori masha ni gaw amu bungli gun hpai ya nna nga ma ai." 
Judges1:36 Amori masha ni a lamu ga jarit gaw, Akrabim kadawng lunghkrung kaw nna lahta daw rai nga ai." 
Judges2:1 Shaloi Yehowa a kasa gaw, Gilgala shara kaw nna, Bohkim shara de lung wa nna, “Ngai nanhte hpe Egutu mung na woi shapraw wa ai hte, nanhte a nji nwa ni hpe dagam shaka da ai mung hta shawn tawn masade ai; nanhte hte tawn da ai ga shaka dai hpe ngai galoi mung n hpya na nngai:" 
Judges2:2 nanhte mung, ndai mung na masha ni hte ga shaka tawn da lu na n rai; shanhte a tawn hkungri ni hpe nanhte hpya kadawng kau ya na rai myit dai, ngu nna ngai tsun masade ai. Rai timung, nanhte nye a ga n madat myit dai; hpa majaw shing rai galaw myit ta?" 
Judges2:3 Dai rai nna, ngai tsun made ga, ndai mung na masha ni hpe, ngai nanhte kaw na shachyut kau ya sa na n rai; shanhte gaw nanhte a garep hta aju, shanhte a Hpara ni mung nanhte a mahkam tai na mara ai” ngu nna tsun wu ai." 
Judges2:4 Yehowa a kasa, Israela kashu kasha ni nlang hpe shing ngu tsun wu yang, amyu masha ni jahtau hkrap shajang ma ai." 
Judges2:5 Dai re ai majaw shara dai hpe Bohkim ngu nna shamying mu ai: dai yang e mung shanhte Yehowa hpe hkungga jaw ma ai. 
Judges2:6 Ya Yawshu gaw mung masha ni hpe dat dat ngut jang, Israela kashu kasha ni langai hte langai tinang lu la ang ai sali ga madu la na nga, pru wa ma ai." 
Judges2:7 Yawshu a prat tup hta mung, Israela masha ni a matu Yehowa galaw ai lam kaba yawng hpe mu mada nna, Yawshu a hpang e shi hpe mu dep ai salang ni a prat tup hta mung, amyu masha ni Yehowa hpe jaw jau ma ai." 
Judges2:8 Shaloi Yehowa a shangun kasa, Nun a kasha Yawshu gaw, asak latsa e shi ning du nna, si mat sai." 
Judges2:9 Shi hpe Ehprim bum ga, Gasha kawng dingdung maga e nga ai, shi a lamu ga sali Timnat-here mare ginwang na ga hta makoi mayang mu ai." 
Judges2:10 Shing rai, Yawshu aprat dep ai masha ni nlang kaji kawa ni hpawng nga ai de du ma masai: dai ni a hpang e, Yehowa hpe mung n chye, Israela matu shi galaw ya ai amu lam ni hpe mung n chye re ai, htawm hpang na kashu kasha ni a aprat du ra ai." 
Judges2:11 Dai prat e Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Yehowa man e n shawp ai hku galaw nna Bala hpara ni hpe jaw jau ma ai." 
Judges2:12 Egutu mung na shanhte hpe woi wa ai, kaji kawa ni a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe kau da nna, grup yin na masha amyu ni a Hpara ni hpang de hkan mat wa let nawku dagup ai hte Yehowa a masin shapawt ya mu ai." 
Judges2:13 Rai sa, shanhte Yehowa hpe kau da nna, Bala hpara hte Ashtarot hpe jaw jau mu ai." 
Judges2:14 Dai majaw Yehowa a pawt bu ai sindawng Israela hta du nna, shi shanhte hpe hpya sha na kashun kashe ai ni a lata de ap kau mu ai: shing rai grup yin na masha hpyen ni kaw dut kau mu ai rai nna, dai hpyen ni a man e shanhte bai n rawt lu ma ai." 
Judges2:15 Shanhte hkawm sa wa ai lam magup hta, Yehowa tsun nna shanhte hpe dagam kau sai hte maren, Yehowa a lata ban dim ai hte katut nna, nachying matsan mayan hkrum mat ma ai." 
Judges2:16 Shing rai jang, hpya lu hpya sha ai ni a lata na, shanhte hpe hkye la ai tara agyi ni hpe Yehowa paw pru shangun ya mu ai." 
Judges2:17 Rai timung, dai tara agyi ni a ga shanhte n madat hkraw ma ai: Hpara shaje ni kaw shanhte sa nna shut hpyit lam hkan let nawku dagup ma ai: kaji kawa ni hkan sa ai Yehowa a matsun maroi lam hta na, shanhte alawan yit mat wa nna, kaji kawa ni sa ai hku n hkan ma ai." 
Judges2:18 Yehowa shanhte a matu tara agyi paw pru shangun yang, dai wa hte rau shi nga nga nna, tara agyi wa lakhtak ting hpyen ni a lata na shanhte hpe hkye la wu ai: kaning rai nme law, shanhte sharu shatsang zingri zingrat hkrum sha ai majaw jahtau shaga jang, Yehowa myit kayin ai rai nga ai." 
Judges2:19 Bai, tara agyi wa si mat ai hpang rai jang, shanhte bai yit nna, kaji kawa ni hta grau n shawp ai hku galaw let, Hpara shaje ni hpang de hkan mat wa nna, dai ni hpe jaw jau ai hte nawku dagup ma ai: tinang a n shawp ai arawn alai hte tinang a myit ja ai lam hpe kau hkraw ma ai n rai." 
Judges2:20 Shaloi Yehowa Israela hpe pawt bu let tsun wu ai gaw, “Amyu ndai, nye a ga n madat sha ya ai hte, shanhte a kaji kawa ni hpe ngai tawn da ai ga shaka tawt lai ma ai majaw;" 
Judges2:21 ngai mung, Yawshu si mat ai shaloi, naw ngam ai masha amyu langai ngai hpe shanhte kaw na n shachyut kau ya na ni ai:" 
Judges2:22 shing di, shanhte a kaji kawa ni Yehowa lam hkan shatsup ai zawn, shanhte hkan nang na kun, n hkan nang na kun gaw, naw ngam ai amyu ni a lata hte Israela hpe ngai chyam yu na we ai,” nga ai." 
Judges2:23 Dai hte maren, masha amyu dai ni hpe, Yawshu a lata de mung n ap, alawan mung n shachyut kau ya ai, nga nga ai." 
Judges3:1 Da ndai gaw, Hkanan mung na majan amu n chye lawm ai Israela masha ni hpe chyam yu na matu mung;" 
Judges3:2 majan n chye gun ai Israela kashu kasha prat mi hte prat mi na ni, majan amu sharin nna, gasat chye wa mu ga mung, Yehowa ngam da ai amyu ni rai nga ai:" 
Judges3:3 dai ni gaw, Hpilisti du manga hte hte, Hkanani amyu ni yawng; Sidon masha ni, Bala-hermon bum kaw nna Hamat mare ringhpung du hkra nga ai Lebanon bum na Hiwi masha ni rai nga ma ai." 
Judges3:4 Yehowa, Mawshe a n-gup hta shanhte a kaji kawa ni hpe hkang da ai matsun maroi ga hte maren, hkan na n hkan na chye lu hkra, Israela hpe chyam yu na matu ngam da ai rai nga ai." 
Judges3:5 Israela kashu kasha ni chyawm gaw, Hkanani, Hiti, Amori, Perizi, Hiwi hte Yebusi amyu ni hte rau nga nga nna," 
Judges3:6 shanhte a shayi sha ni hpe la ya let, tinang a shayi sha ni hpe mung shanhte a shadang sha ni hpe ya sha let, shanhte a Hpara ni hpe jaw jau lawm ma ai." 
Judges3:7 Ya Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, Yehowa man e n shawp ai amu galaw let, shanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe malap kau nna Bala hpara ni hte Asherot hpe jaw jau ma ai." 
Judges3:8 Dai majaw Yehowa Israela kashu kasha ni hpe pawt bu ai hte, Mesopotami hkawhkam Hkushan-re-shahtim a lata hta shanhte hpe dut kau mu ai rai nna, Israela kashu kasha ni gaw matsat ning tup Hkushan-re-shahtim kaw yamnga ma ai." 
Judges3:9 Shaloi, Israela kashu kasha ni Yehowa hpe jahtau jang, Yehowa gaw shanhte hpe hkye la ai wa, Hkaleb a kanau Kenaza kasha Otniela hpe paw pru shangun wu ai rai nna, shi shanhte hpe hkye la wu ai." 
Judges3:10 Yehowa a Wenyi shi hta dung nga ai rai nna, shi gaw Israela masha ni hta tara dara ya nga ai: hpyen gasat mung shi woi awn nna, Yehowa gaw Mesopotami hkawhkam Hkushan-re-shahtim hpe shi a lata de ap kau wu ai: shi a lata hte dai hkawhkam hpe dang kau wu ai." 
Judges3:11 Shaloi, mung ting mali shi ning tup majan sim mat ai. Kenaza kasha Otniela mung si mat ai."
