2Kings15:2 Shi gaw hkaw dung hpang yang asak shi kru ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta manga shi lahkawng ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Yerusalem numsha Yehkolia rai lu ai." 
2Kings15:3 Shi gaw kawa Amazia lam shagu hte maren Yehowa a man e dingman ai amu galaw nga ai. 
2Kings15:4 Rai timung, tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hpe shi n kau da ai rai nna, mung masha ni gaw dai shara ni hta e shagu hkungga hte manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya nga ma ai." 
2Kings15:5 Ya Yehowa gaw hkawhkam wa hpe ari jahkrum nna, shi si ai shani du hkra manggang kap ai hte nta kaga hta anga nga ai. Hkawhkam a kasha Yohtam gaw, mung masha ni hpe up nga let, htingnu ntsa e mung madu nga ai." 
2Kings15:6 Naw gawn ra ai Azaria amu ni hte shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings15:7 Shing rai Azaria gaw kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw nga nna, Dawi mare hta e shanhte hte rau makoi mayang di mu ai: shi a kasha Yohtam gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:8 Yuda hkawhkam Azaria hkaw dung ai sumshi matsat ning e, Yeroboam a kasha Zehkaria gaw, Samari mare hta hkaw dung nna, Israela ntsa e shata kru up nga ai." 
2Kings15:9 Shi gaw kaji kawa ni hte maren, Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nna, Israela amyu hpe shut shangun ai, Nebat a kasha Yeroboam a yubak hpe koi kau wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings15:10 Yabesha kasha Shalum gaw shi hpe gumlau nna, mung masha ni a man e shi hpe kahtam sat kau nhtawm, shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:11 Naw gawn ra ai Zehkaria amu ni a lam, Israela hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai." 
2Kings15:12 Ning rai byin ai lam, Yehowa gaw, “Na nshu nsha ni prat mali du hkra, Israela tingnyang hta dung nga na mara ai,” nga nna Yehu hpe htawn tsun ai ga, dik wa na lam rai nga ai." 
2Kings15:13 Yuda hkawhkam Uzia hkaw dung ai sumshi jahku ning e, Yabesha kasha Shalum hkaw dung hpang nna, Samari mare hta e shata mi daram up nga ai." 
2Kings15:14 Shaloi Gadi a kasha Menahem gaw, Tirza mare kaw na lung wa nhtawm, Samari mare hta e Yabesha kasha Shalum hpe kahtam sat kau nna, shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:15 Naw gawn ra ai Shalum a amu ni hte, shi gumlau ai lam hte gaw, Israela hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai." 
2Kings15:16 Shaloi Menahem Tirza mare kaw nna pru yang, Tipsa hte de a lamu ga jarit hkan e nga ai ni nlang hte hpe sat kau mu ai: shi a matu de a mare chyinghka ni n hpaw ya hkraw ai majaw, shi shanhte hpe sat kau nna, na-um nasin re ai num ni hpe ahkri ga kau mu ai." 
2Kings15:17 Yuda hkawhkam Azaria hkaw dung ai sumshi jahku ning hta e, Gadi a kasha Menahem gaw, Samari mare hta hkaw dung hpang nga ai rai nna, Israela ntsa e shi ning up nga ai." 
2Kings15:18 Shi gaw Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nna, Israela masha ni hpe shut shangun ai, Nebat a kasha Yeroboam a yubak hpe, shi a aprat hta koi kau wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings15:19 Dai aprat e Asuri hkawhkam Pula gaw Israela mungdan hpe sa gasat wu ai rai nna, Menahem gaw dai mungdan hta grin wa lu hkra, Pula hpe gumhpraw talenta hkying mi sak jaw wu ai." 
2Kings15:20 Asuri hkawhkam hpe sak jaw na matu, Menahem gaw Israela mung ting na sut su ai ni kaw gumhpraw lahkawn wu ai rai nna, langai hte langai kaw na gumhpraw shekela manga shi shi hpyi la wu ai. Shing rai Asuri hkawhkam gaw shi a mung de bai wa ai; Israela mungdan hta nga nan nga ai, n rai." 
2Kings15:21 Naw gawn ra ai Menahem a amu ni hte shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Israela hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings15:22 Ya Menahem gaw kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, shi a kasha Pekahia gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:23 Yuda hkawhkam Azaria hkaw dung ai manga shi ning hta e, Menahem a kasha Pekahia gaw Samari mare hta hkaw dung hpang ai rai nna, Israela ntsa e ni ning up nga ai." 
2Kings15:24 Shi gaw Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nna, Israela masha ni hpe shut shangun ai, Nebat a kasha Yeroboam yubak hpe koi kau wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings15:25 Shaloi shi a hpyen du, Remalia kasha Peka gaw shi hpe gumlau nna, Samari mare na hkawhkam htingnu kata e shi hpe mung, Argoba yan Aria hpe mung sat kau mu ai: shi hte rau Gilead masha manga shi rai nga nna, shi gaw hkawhkam wa hpe sat kau nhtawm, shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:26 Naw gawn ra ai Pekahia amu ni hte shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Israela hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai." 
2Kings15:27 Yuda hkawhkam Azaria hkaw dung ai manga shi lahkawng ning hta e, Remalia kasha Peka gaw, Samari mare hta hkaw dung hpang nna, Israela ntsa e hkun ning up nga ai." 
2Kings15:28 Shi gaw Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nna, Israela masha ni hpe shut shangun ai, Nebat a kasha Yeroboam a yubak hpe koi kau wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings15:29 Israela hkawhkam Peka aprat e, Asuri hkawhkam Tiglat-pilese sa du nna, Iyon, Abela-bet-mahka, Yanoa, Kedesha, Hazora mare ni mung, Gilead mung hte Naphtali ngu ai Galile mung ting hpe mung gasat nna, mung masha ni hpe Asuri mung de bawng rim wa mu ai." 
2Kings15:30 Shaloi Ela kasha Hoshea gaw, Remalia kasha Peka hpe gumlau nna, shi hpe sat kau nhtawm, Uzia kasha Yohtam a hkaw dung ai hkun ning hta e, Peka malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings15:31 Naw gawn ra ai Peka amu ni hte, shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Israela hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai." 
2Kings15:32 Israela hkawhkam Remalia kasha Peka hkaw dung ai ni ning hta e, Uzia kasha, Yuda hkawhkam Yohtam gaw hkaw dung hpang nga ai." 
2Kings15:33 Shi gaw hkaw dung hpang yang asak hkun manga ning nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta e shi kru ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Zadok shayi sha Yerusha rai lu ai." 
2Kings15:34 Shi gaw kawa Uzia lam mahkra hpe hkan let, Yehowa man e dingman ai amu galaw nga ai." 
2Kings15:35 Rai timung tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hpe n htawm kau wu ai rai nna, mung masha ni gaw dai shara ni hta shagu hkungga hte manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng nga ma ai. Shi gaw Yehowa nta na ntsa chyinghka galaw da wu ai." 
2Kings15:36 Naw gawn ra ai Yohtam a amu ni hte shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings15:37 Ndai aten e Yehowa gaw Suri hkawhkam Rezin hte Remalia kasha Peka hpe Yuda mung de gasat shangun dat mu ai. 
2Kings15:38 Ya Yohtam gaw kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, shi a kawa Dawi a mare hta e shanhte hte rau makoi mayang di mu ai: shi a kasha Ahaza gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings16:1 Remalia kasha Peka hkaw dung ai shi sanit ning hta e, Yuda hkawhkam Yohtam a kasha Ahaza gaw hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings16:2 Ahaza gaw hkaw dung hpang yang asak hkun ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta e shi kru ning up nga ai: shi gaw shi a kawa Dawi zawn, Yehowa a man e tengman ai amu n galaw ai hte," 
2Kings16:3 Israela hkawhkam ni a arawn alai hta hkan hkawm nga ai rai nna, Yehowa gaw Israela kashu kasha ni a myi man kaw na shachyut shaden kau ai, maigan amyu ni a matsat shabat lam hkan let, shi a kasha hpe pyi wan nat hkungga shatai nna," 
2Kings16:4 tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hta mung, kawng shagu a ntsa e mung, tsit lali ai hpun shagu a npu e mung, shagu hkungga hte manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya wu ai." 
2Kings16:5 Dai shaloi e Suri hkawhkam Rezin hte, Israela hkawhkam, Remalia kasha Peka gaw, Yerusalem hpe lung gasat nna, Ahaza hpe wang tawn timung, shi hpe dang kau lu mu ai, n rai." 
2Kings16:6 Rai timung, Suri hkawhkam Rezin gaw, Elat mare hpe Suri mung hta dai aten e bai shalawm la nna, Yuda masha ni hpe Elat mare kaw na shaden kau nhtawm, Suri masha ni gaw Elat de sa du nna, dai ni du hkra dai yang e anga nga ma ai." 
2Kings16:7 Shing rai Ahaza gaw Asuri hkawhkam Tiglat-pilese hpang de kasa shangun dat nna, “Ngai gaw na a mayam, na a nsha rai nga nngai: lung rit, ngai hpe majan galaw ai Suri hkawhkam hte Israela hkawhkam a lata na ngai hpe mawai la e,” ngu nna hpyi wu ai." 
2Kings16:8 Dai hta kaga Ahaza gaw, Yehowa a nta hte hkawhkam htingnu na sutdek hta rawng ai aja gumhpraw mung la wa nna, Suri hkawhkam hpang de kumhpa shagun dat wu ai." 
2Kings16:9 Asuri hkawhkam mung shi a ga madat nna, Damasku mare hpe lung gasat la nhtawm, mung masha ni hpe Kira shara de bawng rim wa nna, Rezin hpe sat kau wu ai." 
2Kings16:10 Bai hkawhkam Ahaza gaw, Asuri hkawhkam Tiglat-pilese hpe sa bawp la na nga, Damasku mare de lung wa yang, dai mare na tawn hkungri hpe mu da wu ai rai nna, hkawhkam Ahaza gaw de a kasi hte galaw tawn ai hkrang sumla hpe, hkinjawng Uria hpang de shagun dat wu ai." 
2Kings16:11 Hkinjawng Uria mung dai tawn hkungri hpe galaw da wu ai: hkawhkam Ahaza gaw Damasku mare na shagun dat ai kasi hte maren, hkinjawng Uria gaw lam shagu hpe, hkawhkam Ahaza garai n wa yang, galaw da ngut nu ai." 
2Kings16:12 Hkawhkam wa gaw Damasku mare na bai wa yang, dai tawn hkungri hpe mu nna, dai de sit sa nhtawm, de a ntsa e hkungga nawng ya wu ai." 
2Kings16:13 Shi gaw shi a wan nat hkungga hte shadung hkungga nawng ya ai rai nna, dumhpung ru bun nhtawm, mahku hkungga a asai hpe tawn hkungri ntsa e lapri bun wu ai." 
2Kings16:14 Shi a hkungri hta Yehowa nta lapran e nga ai magri hkungri hpe mung, shi gaw Yehowa nta ndaw de na htawt la nhtawm, shi a hkungri a dingdung maga de sit tawn da wu ai." 
2Kings16:15 Bai hkawhkam Ahaza gaw hkinjawng Uria hpe, “Jahpawt shagu na wan nat hkungga, hkawhkam wa a wan nat hkungga hte shadung hkungga hpe mung, mung masha ni a wan nat hkungga, shadung hkungga hte shanhte a dumhpung hpe mung, dai tawn hkungri kaba ntsa e nat nawng nna, wan nat hkungga ni a asai hte, shagu hkungga a asai yawng hpe de a ntsa e lapri bun u: magri hkungri chyawm gaw, ngai jasan yu na matu rai nga ai,” ngu nna hkang da wu ai." 
2Kings16:16 Hkawhkam Ahaza hkang da mada hte maren, hkinjawng Uria hkan galaw wu ai." 
2Kings16:17 Bai hkawhkam Ahaza gaw, magri punghkum ni hte seng ai pyen pa ni hpe gaw la nna, angdung ni hpe dai punghkum hta na sit kau nhtawm, magri hka lawng hpe mung, magri usu ni a ntsa na shayu la nna, lung nep hta e tawn da wu ai." 
2Kings16:18 Yehowa a nta hta laban nhtoi e shang na matu galaw da ai jan lam hpe mung, wang kata de shang na hkawhkam wa a lam hpe mung, Asuri hkawhkam hpe hkrit ai majaw, Yehowa nta na arai kaga ni hte maren, galai kau wu ai." 
2Kings16:19 Naw gawn ra ai Ahaza galaw ai amu ni a lam, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings16:20 Ya Ahaza gaw shi a kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, Dawi mare hta shanhte hte rau makoi mayang di mu ai: shi a kasha Hezekia gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings17:1 Yuda hkawhkam Ahaza hkaw dung ai shi lahkawng ning hta e, Ela kasha Hoshea gaw, Samari mare hta hkaw dung hpang nna, Israela ntsa e jahku ning up nga ai." 
2Kings17:2 Shi gaw Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw timung, shi a shawng de na Israela hkawhkam ni daram wa galaw ai n rai." 
2Kings17:3 Shi hpe gasat na matu Asuri hkawhkam Shalmanese sa du nna, Hoshea gaw shi a shangun ma tai wa ai hte shi hpe hkanse bang da wu ai." 
2Kings17:4 Dai hpang Asuri hkawhkam gaw Hoshea hta gumlau myit mu hkrup wu ai: kaning rai nme law, shi gaw Egutu hkawhkam So hpang de kasa shangun dat ai hte, shawoi na hte maren, shaning shagu na hkanse n bang wu ai: dai re ai majaw Asuri hkawhkam shi hpe rim la nna htawng hta gyit bang da wu ai." 
2Kings17:5 Shing rai Asuri hkawhkam, Israela mungdan ting hta gasat sa wa nna, Samari mare de du jang, masum ning tup wang tawn da mu ai." 
2Kings17:6 Hoshea hkaw dung ai jahku ning hta e, Asuri hkawhkam gaw Samari mare hpe lu la nna, Israela masha ni hpe Asuri mung de bawng rim wa ai hte, shanhte hpe Hala shara e, Gozan hka makau na Habora ginwang hte, Mede masha ni a mare ni hta nga shangun mu ai." 
2Kings17:7 Shing rai byin wa ai lam gaw, Israela kashu kasha ni hpe Egutu mung hte, Egutu hkawhkam Hpara-u a lata hta na hkrang shaw la ai, shanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe shanhte shut hpyit kau nna, hpara shaje ni hpe hkrit kang ai hte," 
2Kings17:8 shanhte a man na Yehowa shaden kau ai maigan amyu ni a arawn alai hpe mung, Israela hkawhkam ni hkan galaw ai lam hpe mung, hkan nang ma ai majaw byin ai rai nga ai." 
2Kings17:9 Shing rai Israela kashu kasha ni gaw, shanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe n ding n man ai amu mayun e galaw mu ai rai nna, langchyi sin ai shara kaw nna bunghku kum ai mare shagu du hkra, tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hpe de da mu ai hte," 
2Kings17:10 kawng shagu a ntsa e mung, tsit lali ai hpun shagu a npu e mung, sumla shadaw ni hte Asherim sumla ni hpe shadun da mu ai:" 
2Kings17:11 dai yang e shanhte gaw, Yehowa shanhte a man na shaden kau ai maigan amyu ni hte maren, tsaw ai kawng shara ni hta, manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya nna, Yehowa hpe pawt sindawng shangun na nga, n hkru ai amu galaw ma ai." 
2Kings17:12 Yehowa gaw, Nanhte hpara sumla ni hpe daw jaw lu na n rai nga nna shanhte hpe hkang da timung, hpara sumla ni hpe daw jaw ma ai." 
2Kings17:13 Rai timung Yehowa gaw, Nanhte a n hkru ai lam ni kaw na kayin wa mu; nanhte a nji nwa ni hpe ngai hkang da ai hte, nye a shangun ma myihtoi ni a n-gup hta nanhte kaw shagun dat ai tara yawng hte maren, ngai hkang da ai lam ni hte matsun maroi ga hpe hkan nang nga mu, ngu nna myihtoi shagu hte, myi san ai ni yawng a n-gup e, Israela amyu masha ni hte Yuda amyu masha ni hpe sakse hkam ya mu ai." 
2Kings17:14 Shanhte mahtang n madat mara nga ai hte, Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe n kam n sham nga ai, tinang a kaji kawa ni hte maren, tinang du shaja nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:15 Yehowa gaw shanthe a kaji kawa ni hte tawn da ai matsun maroi ga hte ga shaka hpe mung, shanhte hpe hkam ya ai sakse ga hpe mung, shanhte kau da ai hte, sawse lawklek ai lam hkan let myit kaba wa nna Yehowa hkum da ai grup yin e nga ai maigan amyu ni a arawn alai hpe, hkan shachyut nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:16 Shanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hkang da mada hpe shanhte kau da nna, jaw ai dumsu kasha sumla lahkawng jaw nhtawm, Ashera sumla hpe mung galaw da nna, sumsing lamu na shagan ni hpe nawku let, Bala Hpara hpe daw jau nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:17 Shanhte a shadang sha ni hpe mung, shayi sha ni hpe mung, wan nat hkungga shatai nna, shaba wawt ai hte mandan bau ai lam hkan let, Yehowa hpe pawt sindawng shangun na nga, shi a man e n hkru ai hku galaw na, tinang hkum hpe dut kau mu ai." 
2Kings17:18 Dai re ai majaw Yehowa gaw Israela amyu hpe grai pawt sindawng nga nna, shi a myi man kaw na shanhte hpe yeng seng kau mu ai: Yuda amyu hta kaga kadai hpe mung ngam da mu ai n rai." 
2Kings17:19 Yuda amyu mung, shanthe a Karai Kasang Yehowa a hkang da ai ga hpe n hkan nang ai sha, Israela masha ni hkan ai matsun maroi lam ni hta, hkan hkawm nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:20 Yehowa gaw Israela amyu masha ni yawng hte hpe kau da nhtawm, shanhte hpe zingri zingrat nna, shi a myi man kaw na yeng seng kau ai du hkra, hpyen ni a lata hta ap ya kau mu ai." 
2Kings17:21 Kaning rai nme law, shi gaw Dawi a nta kaw na, Israela amyu ni hpe jahka kau nna, shanhte gaw Nebat a kasha Yeroboam hpe hkawhkam shatai mu ai: Yeroboam gaw Israela amyu ni hpe Yehowa a lam hta na shayit kau nhtawm, shanhte hpe yubak kaba galaw shangun mu ai." 
2Kings17:22 Shing rai Yehowa gaw shi a shangun ma myihtoi ni yawng a n-gup hte tsun ai hte maren, shi a myi man kaw na Israela amyu hpe yeng seng kau ai shani du hkra," 
2Kings17:23 Israela kashu kasha ni gaw Yeroboam a yubak lam mahkra hta hkan hkawm nna, dai lam ni hpe koi kau mu ai n rai. Dai rai nna, Israela amyu gaw tinang a mungdan kaw nna bawng rim mat wa ai hkrum ai hte, dai ni du hkra Asuri mung hta e anga nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:24 Ya Asuri hkawhkam gaw, Babelon, Hkuhta, Awa, Hamat hte Sehparim masha ni hpe woi wa nna, Israela masha ni a malai, shanhte hpe Samari mare ni hta nga shangun mu ai; shanhte gaw Samari mung hpe up nga nna, de a mare ni hta nga nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:25 Shanhte gaw dai mung hta e nga hpang wa ai shaloi e, Yehowa hpe n hkrit hkungga ai majaw, Yehowa shanhte hpang de hkanghkyi shangun dat nna, nkau mi hpe kawa sat kau mu ai." 
2Kings17:26 Dai rai nna, shanhte gaw Asuri hkawhkam wa hpe, “Samari mare ni hta nang woi htawt tawn da ai masha amyu ni gaw, dai mung na Karai Kasang a htung hking hpe n chye na mu ai majaw, shi gaw shanhte hpang de hkanghkyi shangun dat nna, dai mung na Karai Kasang a htung hking hpe n chye mu ai majaw, nkau mi sat kau ai hkrum masai,” nga na tsun ma ai." 
2Kings17:27 Dai rai nna Asuri hkawhkam gaw, “Dai mung hta na nanhte bawng rim wa ai hkinjawng langai mi hpe dai de bai shangun dat mu; shi gaw dai mung hta nga nga nna, dai mung na Karai Kasang a htung hking lam, shanhte hpe sharin ya mu ga,” ngu nna htet dat mu ai." 
2Kings17:28 Shing rai Samari mung na bawng rim wa ai hkinjawng langai mi gaw, Behtela mare e bai wa nna, Yehowa hpe hkrit hkungga na lam shanhte hpe sharin ya mu ai." 
2Kings17:29 Rai timung, amyu langai hte langai tinang a Hpara sumla ni hpe galaw nna, tinang nga ai mare ni hta, Samari masha ni de da ai tsaw ai kawng ni a nta ni hta e, dai ni hpe shadun da mu ai." 
2Kings17:30 Babelon masha ni gaw Suhko-benot, Hkuhta masha ni gaw Nergala, Hamat masha ni gaw Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 Awa masha ni gaw Nibhaza yan Tartak hpe galaw ma ai: Sehparim masha ni gaw Sehparim Hpara ngu ai Adramelek yan Anamelek a matu, tinang a kashu kasha ni hpe, wan nat hkungga shatai mu ai." 
2Kings17:32 Shing rai shanhte gaw Yehowa hpe hkrit hkungga ma timung, tinang a amyu masha ni hta na, hkinjawng shaga nna, shanhte gaw tsaw ai kawng ni a nta ni hta, mung masha ni matu shagu hkungga nawng ya mu ai." 
2Kings17:33 Shanhte gaw Yehowa hpe hkrit hkungga ma timung, tinang buga hte seng ai amyu hku hkan nna, tinang Hpara ni hpe mung daw jau nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:34 Dai ni du hkra pyi shanhte gaw moi na htung hking hte maren hkan galaw ma ai: shanhte gaw Yehowa hpe mung n hkrit hkungga ai hte, shi gaw Israela ngu nna shamying ai Yaku a kashu kasha ni hpe hkang da ai matsun maroi ga, madat da ai ga, jep ai tara hte htet da ai ga hpe hkan nang ma ai, n rai." 
2Kings17:35 Yehowa gaw Israela hpe, Nanhte gaw Karai Kasang shaje hpe hkrit hkungga lu na n rai; shanhte hpe nawku na mung, daw jau na mung, shagu hkungga mung, jaw lu na n rai;" 
2Kings17:36 n-gun kaba hte shada da ai lahpum dan let, nanhte hpe Egutu mung na shapraw woi wa ai Yehowa hpe hkrai nanhte hkrit hkungga nna, shi hpe nawku let shagu hkungga nawng ya lu na myit dai:" 
2Kings17:37 shi gaw nanhte a matu ka da ai matsun maroi ga, madat da ai ga, jep ai tara hte htet da ai ga ni hpe nanhte a prat dingsa hkan nang nga nna, Karai Kasang shaje hpe hkrit hkungga lu na n rai:" 
2Kings17:38 ngai nanhte hte tawn da ai ga shaka hpe nanhte malap kau lu na, n rai: Karai Kasang shaje hpe mung hkrit hkungga lu na n rai:" 
2Kings17:39 nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe hkrai hkrit hkungga nga mu; shi gaw nanhte hpe hpyen ni yawng a lata na shaw mawai la na ra ai, nga nna ga shaka tawn da timung," 
2Kings17:40 shanhte n madat mara ai hte, moi na htung hking hte maren hkan galaw nga ma ai." 
2Kings17:41 Shing rai ndai amyu ni gaw Yehowa hpe hkrit hkungga ai hte rau, tinang jaw ai sumla ni hpe daw jau nga ma ai; shanhte a kashu kasha ni mung, kaji kawa ni hte maren, dai ni du hkra, dai lam naw a galaw nga ma ai." 
2Kings18:1 Ya, Israela hkawhkam Ela kasha Hoshea hkaw dung ai masum ning hta e, Yuda hkawhkam, Ahaza kasha Hezekia hkaw dung hpang nga ai." 
2Kings18:2 Shi hkaw dung hpang yang, asak hkun manga ning rai nna, Yerusalem mare hta e hkun jahku ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw zehkaria shayi sha Abi rai lu ai." 
2Kings18:3 Shi gaw kawa Dawi hte maren, Yehowa man e dingman ai amu galaw nna," 
2Kings18:4 tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni htawm kau ai hte, sumla shadaw ni hpe agrawp kau nna Ashera sumla ni hpe kran daw kau wu ai: Mawshe galaw da ai magri lapu hpe mung kahtum kadaw di kau wu ai; kaning rai nme law, Israela masha ni gaw dai aten du hkra, de a man e manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya nga ma timung, shi gaw dai hpe, Magri hkyep, ngu nna shamying kau wu ai." 
2Kings18:5 Shi gaw Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe shamyet shanat nga ai rai nna, Yuda hkawhkam ni mahkra hta shi zawn re ai, shawng de mung hpang de mung kadai n nga ai." 
2Kings18:6 Shi gaw Yehowa hta manoi manat nga nna, shi hte n daw n hka let, Yehowa Mawshe hpe hkang da ai tara lam hpe hkan shatup nga ai." 
2Kings18:7 Shing rai Yehowa gaw shi hte rau nga nga ai; lam shagu hta shi awng wa lu ai; shi Asuri hkawhkam hpe gumlau nna, shi hpe daw jau wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings18:8 Hpilisti masha ni hpe mung shi gasat nna, Gaza mare hte de a ginwang ting, langchyi sin ai shara kaw nna bunghku kum ai mare du hkra, dang kau wu ai." 
2Kings18:9 Ya Hezekia hkaw dung ai mali ning ngu na, Israela hkawhkam Ela kasha Hoshea hkaw dung ai sanit ning hta e, Asuri hkawhkam Shalmanese gaw Samari mare hpe lung gasat nna wang tawn wu ai." 
2Kings18:10 Masum ning ladu hkrum jang, dai mare hpe lu la mu ai: Hezekia hkaw dung ai kru ning ngu na hta, Israela hkawhkam Hoshea hkaw dung ai jahku ning hta e, Samari mare hpe lu la mu ai." 
2Kings18:11 Shing rai Asuri hkawhkam gaw Israela masha ni hpe Asuri mung de bawng rim wa nna, Hala shara de, Gozan hka makau na Habora ginwang hte, Mede masha ni a mare ni hta nga shangun mu ai:" 
2Kings18:12 kaning rai nme law, shanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa a nsen hpe shanhte n madat mara ai sha, shi a ga shaka hte shi a shangun ma Mawshe htet da mada hpe, shanhte gang kau nna n hkan galaw ma ai." 
2Kings18:13 Ya hkawhkam Hezekia hkaw dung ai shi mali ning hta e, Asuri hkawhkam Senahkerib gaw, Yuda mung na bunghku kum ai mare ni mahkra hpe lung gasat nna lu la wu ai." 
2Kings18:14 Shaloi Yuda hkawhkam Hezekia gaw, Asuri hkawhkam nga ai Lahkisha mare de shangun nna, “Ngai shut ni ai; bai wa nu; nang ngai hpe shagun ai hte maren ngai gun hpai na nngai,” nga nna tsun ai majaw, Asuri hkawhkam gaw, Yuda hkawhkam Hezekia hpe gumhpraw talenta masum tsa, aja talenta sumshi shawa wu ai." 
2Kings18:15 Shing rai Hezekia gaw Yehowa nta hte hkawhkam htingnu a sutdek hta rawng ai gumhpraw mahkra hte wa wu ai. 
2Kings18:16 Dai aten e mung Hezekia gaw, Yehowa a nawku Htingnu na chinghka ni hte, shi hkum nan sup da ai shadaw ni a aja hpe, gaw la nna, Asuri hkawhkam wa hpe wa kau wu ai." 
2Kings18:17 Shaloi Asuri hkawhkam gaw, Tartan, Rabsari, Rabshake ni hte rau hpyen luksuk kaba hte hpe, lahkisha mare kaw nna, Yerusalem mare hkawhkam Hezekia hpang de shangun dat mu ai: shanhte gaw Yerusalem mare de lung wa nna, dai de du jang, hpun nba jaw ai wa a ga dachyawk lam a lahta sin-gat baw e tsap nga ma ai." 
2Kings18:18 Shanhte gaw hkawhkam wa hpe shaga yang, kunhting wa ngu ai Hilkia kasha Eliakim, chyare wa ngu ai Shebna hte labau gawn ai laika hpe ka da ai, Asap a kasha Yoa hte gaw, shanhte hpang de pru sa wa ma ai." 
2Kings18:19 Shaloi Rabshake gaw shanhte hpe, “Hezekia hpe ning ngu tsun mu: Galu kaba htum ai Asuri hkawhkam gaw ning nga ai: ‘Nang gaw hpa hta shamyet shanat nga n ta?'" 
2Kings18:20 Nang gaw, Majan gasat na matu hpaji byeng-ya mung, n-gun lagaw mung rawng nga nngai, nga nna tsun timung, dai gaw kaman lila ga hkrai rai nga ai. Ataw, ngai hpe gumlau na nga, kadai hpe hpa nga n ta?" 
2Kings18:21 Ya, yu u, nang gaw daw mat ai mai-aw dawhkrawng ngu ai, Egutu hkawhkam hpe hpa nga n hka; dai dawhkrawng gaw shamyet shanat ai wa a lata hpe ju htinggrang na ra ai; shing rai, Egutu hkawhkam Hpara-u hpe shamyet shanat ai ni yawng hkrum na mara ai." 
2Kings18:22 Bai nanhte gaw, Anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa hta anhte shamyet shanat ga ai, nga nna ngai hpe htan yang, shi a tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hte tawn hkungri ni hpe Hezekia htawm kau nna, Yerusalem e nga ai tawn hkungri hta hkrai nanhte nawku lu na myit dai, nga nna Yuda hte Yerusalem hpe htet da sai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings18:23 Dai re ai majw, nye a madu Asuri hkawhkam wa hpe ga sadi tawn da mu; nang gaw gumra jawn ai masha chye tam yang, ngai nang hpe gumra hkying lahkawng jaw na de ai." 
2Kings18:24 Nang gaw nye a madu a kaji htum ai hpyen du langai mi hpe pyi n dang kau lu ai mi, hpyen leng hte gumra lu la na nga, Egutu hkawhkam hpe shamyet shanat nga n hka?" 
2Kings18:25 Yehowa ahkang n jaw ai, ndai mung hpe jahten na, ngai lung wa nni? Yehowa gaw ngai hpe, Ndai mung hpe lung gasat nna jahten kau u ngu ni ai,” ngu mu ai." 
2Kings18:26 Shaloi Hilkia kasha Eliakim hte Shebna yan Yoa gaw Rabshake hpe, “Na a mayam ni hpe Suri ga hte tsun dan mi; dai ga anhte chye na ga ai: mare bunghku hta dung nga ai yu maya ni chye na lu hkra, Yuda ga hte hkum tsun mi,” ngu nna hpyi mu ai." 
2Kings18:27 Rabshake mahtang, “Nye a madu gaw, nang hte na madu hpe ndai ga tsun dan u nga, ngai hpe shangun dat ai rai kun? Mare bunghku hta dung nga let, nanhte hte rau tinang a hkyi sha nna, tinang a jit lu ai ni hpang de shangun dat ai, n rai ni?” ngu nna shanhte hpe htan mu ai." 
2Kings18:28 Bai Rabshake gaw rawt tsap nna, Yuda ga hte nsen kaba sharawt let, “Galu kaba htum ai, Asuri hkawhkam a ga hpe madat mara nga mu law," 
2Kings18:29 Hkawhkam wa ning nga ai: ‘Hezekia gaw nanhte hpe hkum hkalem kau myit ga; shi gaw nanhte hpe nye a lata na mawai la lu na n rai: 
2Kings18:30 dai hta n-ga, Hezekia gaw, Yehowa anhte hpe gaja wa teng teng hkye mawai la na rai nna, ndai mare hpe Asuri hkawhkam up lu na n rai, nga nna nanhte hpe Yehowa hta hpa shangun yang, hkum hkan nga myit." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekia ga hpe hkum madat myit: Asuri hkawhkam gaw ning nga ai, Hpyen sim na lam hpyi mu; ngai hpang de pru marit; nanhte n si ai, hkrung nga lu hkra, nanhte a mungdan hte bung ai, nai mam, tsabyi jahku hte hpring nga ai mung, muk hte tsabyi sun, tsanlun hpun hte lagat jahku hpring ai mung de, ngai nanhte hpe woi wa ai shani du hkra," 
2Kings18:32 langai hte langai tinang a tsabyi ru hte tsanlun hpun hta na sha nna, tinang a hka htung na ntsin lu nga mu: Yehowa gaw anhte hpe hkye mawai la na ra ai, nga nna Hezekia nanhte hpe hkalau yang, hkum madat nga myit." 
2Kings18:33 Mung mi hte mung mi a Hpara ni hta, gara mahtang tinang a mung ni hpe Asuri hkawhkam a lata na hkye mawai la lu na rai ta?" 
2Kings18:34 Hamat yan Arpad a Hpara ni kanang nga ma ta? Sehparim, Hena hte Iwa Hpara ni kanang nga ma ta? Shanhte gaw Samari mung hpe nye a lata na shaw la lu ma ni?" 
2Kings18:35 Yehowa gaw Yerusalem mare hpe nye a lata na hkye hkrang la lu hkra, mung shagu na Hpara ni mahkra hta, gara mahtang tinang a mung hpe nye a lata na hkye hkrang la lu na rai ta?” ngu nna jahtau tsun wu ai." 
2Kings18:36 Mung masha ni chyawm gaw ga hkaw mi muk n htan ai, atsin sha nga ma ai: kaning rai nme law, “Shi hpe hkum htan myit,” ngu nna hkawhkam wa hkum da mu ai." 
2Kings18:37 Shaloi Hikia kasha kunhting wa Eliakim, chyare wa Shebna hte labau gawn laika hpe ka da ai, Asap a kasha Yoa hte gaw, tinang a hpun palawng gang je kau let, Hezekia hpang de sa du nna, Rabshake a ga shi hpe shana ya mu ai." 
2Kings19:1 Ya hkawhkam Hezekia gaw dai ga na jang, shi a hpun nba gang je kau nna, lachyit nba bu hpun let, Yehowa nta de shang wa ai." 
2Kings19:2 Bai shi gaw kunhting wa Eliakim yan chyare wa Shebna hte hkinjawng salang ni hpe, lachyit nba bu hpun let, Amot a kasha myihtoi Esaia hpang de shangun dat mu ai." 
2Kings19:3 Shanhte gaw shi hpe, Hezekia ning nga ai: “Dai ni gaw nni nkri, shatan nhkan, asawng asang hkrum ai nhtoi rai nga ai: ma shangai nhtoi gu timung, shangai lu na n-gun n nga ai." 
2Kings19:4 Rai timung, ahkrung nga ai Karai Kasang hpe shatan na nga, Asuri hkawhkam shangun ai, shi a mayam Rabshake a ga yawng hpe na a Karai Kasang Yehowa na la u ga; na a Karai Kasang Yehowa nan na la ai ga hpe hkap daru na nhten: dai re ai majaw, naw ngam nga ai ni a matu mara akyu hpyi ya mi law,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
2Kings19:5 Shing nga tsun yang, hkawhkam Hezekia shangun ma ni gaw Esaia hpang de du ma ai." 
2Kings19:6 Esaia mung, Nanhte a madu du hpe ning ngu tsun mu: “Yehowa ning nga ai: Nang na ai, Asuri hkawhkam a shangun ma ni ngai hpe shatan nhkan ai ga majaw, hkum hkrit et;" 
2Kings19:7 yu u, ngai shi hpe myit kaga bang ya nna, shi gaw ashi na ai hte tinang a mung de bai wa mat na ra ai; dai mung hta e ngai shi hpe nhtu hte sat kau na we ai, nga ai,” ngu nna shanhte hpe tsun dat mu ai." 
2Kings19:8 Shing rai Rabshake gaw bai wa yang, Asuri hkawhkam gaw Libna hpe gasat nga ai mu wu ai; kaning rai nme law, shi gaw Lahkisha kaw na htawt pru wa ai lam, na wu ai." 
2Kings19:9 Bai, Ehtiopi hkawhkam Tirhaka nang hpe gasat na lung wa ra ai, nga ai ga na wu yang, shi gaw Hezekia hpang de kasa bai shangun dat nna," 
2Kings19:10 Yuda hkawhkam Hezekia hpe ning ngu tsun u: “Yerusalem mare gaw Asuri hkawhkam a lata hta a shang lu na re ai, nga nna, nang shamyet shanat nga ai, na a Karai Kasang gaw, nang hpe n hkalem kau u ga." 
2Kings19:11 Yu u, Asuri hkawhkam ni gaw mung shagu hpe atsai awai shaza kau ai lam, nang na yu nit dai; nang chyu lawt lu na nni?" 
2Kings19:12 Nye ji wa ni e jahten kau ai amyu ni gaw, Gazon, Haran, Rezep hte Telasa ginwang hkan e nga ai Eden kashu kasha ni rai ma ai; tinang a Hpara ni shanhte hpe hkye mawai la lu manu ni?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamat hkawhkam, Arpad hkawhkam hte Sehparim mare, Hena hte Iwa mare ni hpe up ai hkawhkam ni gaw kanang rai nga ma ta?” ngu nna htet da wu ai." 
2Kings19:14 Shaloi Hezekia gaw dai laika hpe kasa wa a lata na hkap la hti yu nhtawm, Yehowa nta de shang nna, Yehowa man e hpyan tawn wu ai." 
2Kings19:15 Shing rai Hezekia gaw Yehowa man e, “Hkerubim ntsa e dung nga ai Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa e; ga ntsa mungdan mahkra a Karai Kasang nang chyu rai nga ndai: nang gaw sumsing lamu hte ginding aga hpe hpan da nu ai." 
2Kings19:16 Yehowa e, na la nna madat mara ya e; Yehowa e, na a myi hpaw nna mada yu u; ahkrung nga ai Karai Kasang hpe shatan nhkan ai Senahkereb shagun ai ga mahkra hpe matsing nga u law." 
2Kings19:17 Yehowa e, Asuri hkawhkam ni gaw gaja wa teng teng masha amyu ni hte tinang a lamu ga hpe shaza kau manu ai rai nna," 
2Kings19:18 Shanhte a Hpara ni hpe wan hta kabai bang kau mu ai; shanhte chyawm gaw Karai Kasang n rai; masha a lata hte galaw da ai hpun hte nlung sumla hkrai rai ma ai majaw, dai ni hpe jahten shabya kau mu ai." 
2Kings19:19 Ya chyawm gaw, anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa e, nang Yehowa hkrai Karai Kasang rai nga ai gaw, ga ntsa mungdan ni nlang chye na lu mu ga, anhte hpe shi a lata na hkye hkrang la mi law,” ngu nna hpyi nem wu ai." 
2Kings19:20 Shaloi Amot kasha Esaia gaw Hezekia hpang de shangun dat nna, Israela Karai Kasang ning nga ai: “Nang gaw Asuri hkawhkam Senahkereb a lam, nye a man e hpyi nem ai ga, ngai na ni ai." 
2Kings19:21 Da ndai gaw, Yehowa shi a lam tsun ai ga rai nga ai: ‘Ziun shayi hkawnsek gaw nang hpe jahpoi mani kau nga ai; Yerusalem mare shayi sha gaw na a hpang e baw kanga nga ai." 
2Kings19:22 Nang gaw kadai wa hpe matsa jahpoi kau wu ni? kadai wa hpe na a nsen sharawt nna, na a myi man hte gumrawng gumtawng di kau wu ta? Israela a Chyoi Pra re ai Wa hpe rai nga a hka!" 
2Kings19:23 Nang gaw, na a kasa ni a n-gup hte dai Madu hpe shatan nhkan nna, Ngai gaw nye a law la ai hpyen leng ni hte bum pungding ni a ntsa de lung wa lu nna, Lebanon maling ka-ang de shang lu na nngai: ngai gaw de a tsaw htum ai arit hpun ni hte, hpu htum ai marau hpun ni hpe kran kau nna, de a tsan htum ai maling na nga pyaw ai shara de pyi shang wa na nngai." 
2Kings19:24 Ngai gaw tsasam mung ni hta hka htung htu nna lu lu nngai; nye a lagaw lahpan hte Egutu mung na hka nu hka shi yawng shahkyet kau na we ai, nga nna nang tsun hkrup nu hka." 
2Kings19:25 Ngai gaw chyaloi nhkoi kaw nna galaw yu ai lam hte, moi na prat kaw nna shabyin ai lam, nang n na yu nni? Ya mung, nang gaw bunghku kum ai mare ni hpe sharun kau nna nlung sumpum shatai kau na lam gaw, ngai shabyin ai lam hkrai rai nga ai." 
2Kings19:26 dai re ai majaw mare masha ni gaw n-gun yawm wa nna, myit mak ai hte myit htum mat masai; shanhte gaw nam na singdu hte sit lali ai shatmai lap zawn, nta ntsa e tu ai tsing hte garai n kaba ai nyip mat wa ai mam maku zawn, rai nga ma ai." 
2Kings19:27 Rai timung, nang dung nga yang, pru wa shang wa yang, ngai hpe n-yun bu ai lam ngai chye nga nngai." 
2Kings19:28 Nang ngai hpe n-yun bu ai hte na a gumrawng gumtawng ga nye na hta e shang sai majaw, ngai nang hpe lashoi shoi nna runghtung dat nhtawm, nang du sa ai lam hku bai nhtang wa shangun na de ai." 
2Kings19:29 Da ndai gaw na a matu kumla tai u ga: nanhte gaw dai ning mam nhpan sha lu na marin dai; htaning mung dai hta na shi hkrai tu ai mam sha lu na myit dai: masum ning ngu na hta gaw nli gat hkai nna de a asi sha mu. Tsabyi sun hta hkai nna de a asi sha mu. 
2Kings19:30 Tsin-yam lawt ai Yuda dap lakung ni mung, ru bai jung nna, asi si kung dam wa na mara ai:" 
2Kings19:31 kaning rai nme law, naw ngam nga ai ni Yerusalem mare kaw na, tsin-yam lawt ai ni Ziun bum kaw na, pru wa na mara ai:" 
2Kings19:32 Dai re ai majaw Yehowa gaw Asuri hkawhkam a lam ning nga tsun ai: Shi gaw ndai mare hta shang lu na n rai; dai kata de pala langai mi gap lu na n rai; de a man e nhtu n-gang n madun dan lu na hte kaduk mung htu lu na n rai. 
2Kings19:33 Shi du sa ai lam hku shi nhtang wa nna, ndai mare hta shang lu na n rai." 
2Kings19:34 Kaning rai nme law, Yehowa tsun ai gaw, ‘Ngai hkum nan a majaw mung, nye shangun ma Dawi a majaw mung, ndai mare hpe ngai makawp maga nna hkye hkrang la na we ai, nga ai,” ngu dat mu ai." 
2Kings19:35 Dai shana jang Yehowa a lamu kasa pru sa nna, Asuri masha ni a hpyen dap hta, marai sen me mun matsat hkying manga hte hpe sat kau wu ai: jahpawt jau jau e rawt yu yang, yu mu, ndai ni, nlang si mang rai nga ma ai." 
2Kings19:36 Shing rai Asuri hkawhkam Senahkereb gaw, dap brun mat wa nna, Ninewe mare de wa nhtang nga nga ai." 
2Kings19:37 Dai hpang shi gaw shi a Hpara Nisrok a nta hta nawku nga yang, shi a kasha Adramelek yan Shareze gaw shi hpe kahtam sat kau mu ai; shan gaw Ararat mung de hprawng mat wa nna, shi a kasha Eshadon, shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings20:1 Dai aten hte yang Hezekia gaw si machyi hkrum nga ai rai nna, Amot a kasha myihtoi Esaia shi kaw sa du nna, Yehowa ning nga ai: “Nang hkrung nga lu na n rai, si na ndai majaw, na a nta na dinghku lam hpajang da u,” ngu wu ai." 
2Kings20:2 Dai rai nna Hezekia gaw shakum de myi man yawng let," 
2Kings20:3 “Yehowa e, ngai gaw na a man e kangka nna myit ding ai hte hkawm nga nngai rai nna, nang sharawng awng ai lam shagu hpe hkan galaw ni ai gaw, dum ya e law,” ngu nna hkrap ngu hkrap ngoi let, Yehowa hpe hpyi nem wu ai." 
2Kings20:4 Ya Esaia gaw mare ka-ang garai n du lu yang, Yehowa a ga shi kaw du nna," 
2Kings20:5 “Bai nhtang u; nye a amyu du Hezekia hpe ning ngu u; ‘Na nwa Dawi a Karai Kasang Yehowa ning nga ai, Na akyu hpyi ai ga ngai na ni ai, na myi prwi ngai mu nngai: yu u, ngai nang hpe shamai ya nna, masum ya laman e Yehowa a nta hta nang shang lu na ndai." 
2Kings20:6 Ngai na asak hpe shi manga ning naw jat ya na de ai; nang hpe mung, ndai mare hpe mung, Asuri mung na hkawhkam wa a lata na hkye mawai la na we ai; ngai hkum nan a majaw mung, nye shangun ma Dawi a majaw mung, ndai mare hpe ngai makawp maga na we ai, nga ai,” ngu wu ai." 
2Kings20:7 Bai Esaia gaw, “Maihpang si gumpa mi la wa rit,” ngu wu ai; shaloi shanhte la wa nna, shakrwi hta up ya wu yang, shi mai wa ai." 
2Kings20:8 Rai timung Hezekia gaw, “Yehowa ngai hpe shamai ya nna, masum ya laman e Yehowa nta hta ngai lung lu na gaw, hpa sakse kumla dan pru na ra ta?” ngu nna Esaia hpe san wu ai." 
2Kings20:9 Shaloi Esaia gaw, “Yehowa tsun dan ai hte maren, ndai lam shabyin na ra ai, da ndai gaw na a matu Yehowa kaw na sakse kumla tai na ra ai: hkying shadawn ai shingna gaw n-gam shi sit lung wa na kun? Shing n rai, n-gam shi bai nhtang wa na kun?” ngu nna san wu ai." 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia mahtang, “shingna gaw n-gam shi sit lung na loi nga ai; dai lam n rai, n-gam shi nhtang wa u ga,” ngu nna hkap htan wu ai." 
2Kings20:11 Shaloi myihtoi Esaia gaw Yehowa hpe hpyi jahtau wu ai rai nna, shi gaw Ahaza a hkying shadawn ai lakang hta, shingna n-gam shi sit lung sai hpe, bai nhtang sit kau dat wu ai." 
2Kings20:12 Dai aten e Babelon hkawhkam, Baladan a kasha, Berodak-baladan gaw, Hezekia machyi nga ai lam na nna, shi hpang de laika hte kumhpa shagun dat wu ai." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia mung shanhte hpe hkap hkalum la nna, shi a arung arai nta na aja gumhpraw, manam pyaw ai baw, hpu la ai sau, hpyen laknak rawng ai nta hte shi a sutdek hta rawng marawng mahkra hpe madun dan mu ai: Hezekia gaw shi a nta hte shi a mungdan hta rawng marawng, shanhte hpe n madun dan ai, hpa mung n nga ai." 
2Kings20:14 Shaloi myihtoi Esaia gaw hkawhkam Hezekia hpang de sa du nna, “Ndai manam ni gaw hpa lam tsun ma ta? kanang nna nang kaw sa du ma ta?” ngu nna san wu yang, Hezekia gaw, “Tsan tsan e nga ai Babelon mung na sa du ma ai,” ngu nna htan wu ai." 
2Kings20:15 Bai Esaia gaw, “Shanhte na a nta hta hpa mu lu ma ta?” ngu nna san wu yang, Hezekia gaw, “Nye nta hta rawng marawng mahkra hpe mu masai; nye sutdek hta rawng marawng, ngai shanhte hpe n madun dan ai gaw, hpa mung n nga ai,” ngu nna htan wu ai." 
2Kings20:16 Dai rai nna Esaia gaw Hezekia hpe, “Yehowa a ga madat u." 
2Kings20:17 Yu u, Yehowa ning nga ai, ‘Na nta hta rawng marawng hpe mung, dai ni du hkra na nji nwa ni mahkawng da ai arai hpe mung, Babelon mare de htawm mat wa ai aten du na ra ai: hpa mung ngam da na n rai." 
2Kings20:18 Nang shaprat ai, na nshu nsha ni hpe mung, shanhte woi wa nna, shanhte gaw Babelon hkawhkam a htingnu hta e unuk ngu ai ni tai na mara ai,” ngu wu ai." 
2Kings20:19 Shaloi Hezekia gaw, “Nang htawn tsun ai Yehowa a ga mai kaja nga ai: bai, Gaja wa nye a aprat e ngwipyaw ai hte sadi sahka rai nga yang, mai nga ai n rai ni?” ngu nna Esaia hpe tsun wu ai." 
2Kings20:20 Naw gawn ra ai Hezekia amu ni, shi a hpung shingkang mahkra hte, dai hka lawng hte hka hkawng hpe, shi kaning rai galaw nna, mare kata de hka shalen ai lam, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings20:21 Shing rai Hezekia gaw shi a kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, shi a kasha Manashe gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings21:1 Manashe gaw hkaw dung hpang yang, asak shi lahkawng ning kaba nna, Yerusalem mare hta manga shi manga ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Hepziba mying lu ai." 
2Kings21:2 Shi gaw, Israela kashu kasha ni a man na, Yehowa shaden kau ai, maigan amyu ni a matsat shabat lam hkan let, Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai." 
2Kings21:3 Shi a kawa Hezekia run kau ai tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hpe shi bai de da nna, Israela hkawhkam Ahab hte maren, Bala hkungri ni galaw tawn nna, Ashera sumla galaw ai hte, sumsing lamu na shagan ni yawng hte hpe nawku nna, daw jau wu ai." 
2Kings21:4 Yehowa gaw, Yerusalem mare hta e nye a amying ningsang tawn da na we ai, nga timung, shi gaw Yehowa a nta hta tawn hkungri shaje galaw da wu ai." 
2Kings21:5 Bai shi gaw Yehowa a nta wang lahkawng hta, sumsing lamu na shagan ni yawng a matu, tawn hkungri galaw da wu ai." 
2Kings21:6 Dai hta n-ga shi gaw shi a kasha hpe wan nat hkungga shatai nna, shaba wawt ai hte mandan lakle amu galaw nna, gumhpan hpan ai ni hte nat shung ai ni hte rau kanawn let, Yehowa hpe pawt sindawng shangun na nga, shi a man e n hkru ai amu law law galaw wu ai." 
2Kings21:7 Israela amyu ni yawng hta na ngai lata la ai, ndai nta hta mung, Yerusalem mare hta mung, nye a amying hpe ngai tutnawng e tawn da nga ai rai nna," 
2Kings21:8 ngai mung, nye shangun ma Mawshe mung, shanhte hpe htet da mada mahkra hkan galaw nna shatup nga ma yang gaw, shanhte a kaji kawa ni hpe ngai jaw da ai mung hta na, ngai shanhte hpe lam bai shadam na n rai, nga nna Yehowa gaw Dawi hte shi a kasha Shawlumon hpe tsun da timung, shi gaw shi tawk ai Ashera sumla hpe, Yehowa nta hta tawn da wu ai." 
2Kings21:9 Rai timung, shanhte n madat mara nga ma ai hte, Israela kashu kasha ni a man na, Yehowa shaza kau ai maigan amyu ni galaw ai n hkru ai lam hta grau nna galaw mu ga nga, Manashe gaw shanhte hpe lau da mu ai." 
2Kings21:10 Dai re ai majaw Yehowa gaw shi a shangun ma myihtoi ni a n-gup hte," 
2Kings21:11 Yuda hkawhkam Manashe gaw matsat shabat amu galaw nna, shi a shawng e nga ai Amori masha ni hta grau nna n hkru ai amu shachyen ai hte, shi a sumla ni e Yuda amyu hpe mung shut shangun ai majaw," 
2Kings21:12 Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa ning nga ai, “Yu mu, shiga na lu ai ni a na lahkawng maga na mau hkra, Yerusalem hte Yuda ntsa e ngai ari ahpri shapraw na we ai." 
2Kings21:13 Samari mung hpe shadawn yu ai sumri hte, Ahab a nta na ni hpe shadawn yu ai chyu noi ai sumri e nan, Yerusalem mare ntsa e ngai shadawn yu nna, masha gaw wan hpe katsut kau nhtawm ka-up kau ai zawn, ngai Yerusalem hpe di na we ai." 
2Kings21:14 Naw ngam nga ai nye a Sali wunli amyu hpe ngai kau da nna, shanhte hpe hpyen ni a lata hta ap kau na mawe ai; hpyen ni mung shanhte hpe kashun kashe zingri zingrat di na mu ai." 
2Kings21:15 Kaning rai nme law, shanhte a kaji kawa ni gaw Egutu mung na pru wa ai shani kaw nna dai ni du hkra, shanhte nan nye a man e n hkru ai amu galaw nna, ngai hpe pawt sindawng shangun mi ai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
2Kings21:16 Shing rai Manashe gaw Yehowa a man e n hkru ai amu galaw ai hte, Yuda masha ni hpe shut shangun ai hta n-ga, mara n kap ai ni law law hpe sat kau nna, dai ni a asai gaw Yerusalem mare maga mi kaw nna maga mi du hkra hpring nga ai." 
2Kings21:17 Naw gawn ra ai Manashe a amu ni, shi galaw ai lam ni hte shut hpyit ai amu gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings21:18 Shing rai Manashe gaw shi a kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, shi a nta hte seng ai, Uza ngu ai sun hta makoi mayang de ai hkrum wu ai: shi a kasha Amon gaw shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings21:19 Amon gaw hkaw dung hpang yang, asak hkun lahkawng ning rai nna, Yerusalem mare hta ni ning up nga ai; shi a kanu gaw, Yotba mare na Haruze a shayi sha Meshulemet rai lu ai." 
2Kings21:20 Amon gaw shi a kawa Manashe hte maren Yehowa a man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai. 
2Kings21:21 Shi gaw, shi a kawa hkan hkawm ai lam mahkra hta hkan nang nna, kawa daw jau ai sumla ni hpe daw jau nna nawku nga ai:" 
2Kings21:22 shi a kaji kawa ni a Karai Kasang Yehowa hpe shi kau da nna, Yehowa a lam hta n hkawm nga ai." 
2Kings21:23 Shing rai Amon a ali ama ni gaw shi hpe gumlau nna, shi a nta kata e shi hpe sat kau mu ai." 
2Kings21:24 Mung masha ni chyawm gaw hkawhkam Amon hpe gumlau ai ni nlang hte hpe sat kau nhtawm, shi a kasha Yoshia hpe kawa a malai hkawhkam shatai mu ai." 
2Kings21:25 Naw gawn ra ai, Amon galaw ai amu ni mahkra gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings21:26 Shi gaw Uza a sun hta shi a lup kata e makoi mayang di ai hkrum wu ai rai nna, shi a kasha Yoshia gaw, shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings22:1 Yoshia gaw hkaw dung hpang yang asak matsat ning rai nna, Yerusalem mare hta sumshi langai ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Bozakat mare na Adaia shayi sha Yedida rai lu ai." 
2Kings22:2 Yoshia gaw Yehowa a man e tengman ai amu galaw nna, pai de hkra de n yit ai sha, kawa Dawi a lam mahkra hta hkan hkawm nga ai." 
2Kings22:3 Ya hkawhkam Yoshia gaw, shi hkaw dung ai shi matsat ning e, Meshulam a kashu, Azalia kasha, chyare wa Shahpan hpe shangun dat nna, Yehowa nta hta nga ai hkinjawng agyi wa Hilkia hpang de lung wa su:" 
2Kings22:4 Shi gaw, Yehowa nta hkinbawng sin ai ni, mung masha ni a lata na lahkawn la ai gumhpraw hpe hti sawn yu u ga:" 
2Kings22:5 bai, dai gumhpraw hpe, Yehowa nta amu up ai ni a lata hta ap ya u ga; shanhte gaw Yehowa nta run hten ai shara ni hpe galaw nga ai ni hpe karan jaw mu ga:" 
2Kings22:6 lasama ni, nta galaw ai ni, wut nep ai ni a matu mung nta hpe lajang na nga, ngau hte tawk ai nlung mari na matu mung, gumhpraw dai rai u ga, ngu dat wu ai." 
2Kings22:7 Rai timung, shanhte kangka rai nga ai majaw, shanhte a lata hta ap ya ai gumhpraw hpe, hpa jahpan hpyi wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings22:8 Bai hkinjawng agyi wa Hilkia gaw, “Yehowa a nta kata e dai tara laika hpe ngai mu hkrup se ai,” ngu nna chyare wa Shahpan hpe tsun wu ai. Hilkia gaw dai laika Shahpan hpe ap ya nna, shi gaw dai hpe hti wu ai." 
2Kings22:9 Chyare wa Shahpan mung hkawhkam wa hpang de sa nna, “na a shangun ma ni gaw, dai nta hta na gumhpraw hpe shaw la nna, Yehowa nta amu galaw ai ni hpe up ai ni a lata hta ap ya manu ai,” ngu wu ai." 
2Kings22:10 Dai hta kaga chyare wa Shahpan gaw hkawhkam wa hpe, “Hkinjawng Hilkia gaw laika langai mi ngai hpe ap ya ni ai,” ngu nna hkawhkam wa hpe hti dan wu ai." 
2Kings22:11 Ya hkawhkam wa gaw dai tara laika a mungga na ngut jang, shi a hpun palawng gang je kau wu ai." 
2Kings22:12 Shing rai hkawhkam wa gaw hkinjawng Hilkia, Shahpan a kasha Ahikam, Mihkaia a kashu Akbora, chyare wa Shahpan hte hkawhkam wa shangun ma Asaia hpe hkang da nna," 
2Kings22:13 “Ndai mu hkrup ai laika a mungga lam, nye a matu mung, mare masha ni a matu mung, Yuda mung ting na amyu masha ni a matu mung, Yehowa hpe sa san yu mu: kaning rai nme law, ndai laika hta anhte a lam ka da mada hte maren, anhte a ji wa ni gaw n hkan galaw nga ma ai majaw, Yehowa gaw anhte hpe grai wa pawt sindawng bu nga ai,” ngu dat mu ai." 
2Kings22:14 Dai rai nna hkinjawng Hilkia, Ahikam, Akbora, Shahpan hte Asaia gaw, Hara a kashu, Tikwa a kasha, hkawhkam wa a hpun palawng sin ai, Shalum a madu jan num myihtoi Hulda hpang de sa shang nna shi hte ga tsun mu ai: shi gaw Yerusalem mare wang lahkawng ngu na daw hta nga nga ai." 
2Kings22:15 Dai myihtoi num gaw, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa ning nga ai: “Ngai hpang de nanhte hpe shangun dat ai wa hpe ning ngu mu." 
2Kings22:16 Yehowa ning nga ai: Yuda hkawhkam hti yu ai laika ga mahkra hte maren, ndai mare hte dai hta e nga ai ni mahkra a ntsa e, tsin-yam tsindam shapraw na we ai:" 
2Kings22:17 hpa majaw nga yang, shanhte ngai hpe kau da nna, shanhte a lata e galaw ai amu hte ngai hpe pawt sindawng shangun na nga, Hpara shaje ni a man e manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya ma ai. Dai re ai majaw ndai shara a lam nye a pawt sindawng ai wan grung nga nna krip wa na n rai." 
2Kings22:18 Rai timung, Yehowa hpe san yu na nga, nanhte hpe shangun dat ai Yuda hkawhkam hpe ning ngu mu: ‘Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa ning nga ai; Nang na yu ai mungga a lam da ndai rai nga ai:" 
2Kings22:19 ndai shara hte dai hta e nga ai masha ni gaw, katsi katsang shara hte dagam dala hkrum ai amyu tai na mara ai, nga nna ngai tsun ai ga hpe nang na ai shaloi, nang myit kya nna, Yehowa a man e myit shagrit nga ai hte, na a hpun palawng hpe gang je kau nna, nye a man e hkrap ngu hkrap ngoi nga ndai majaw, ngai Yehowa nan na a ga hpe madat mara ya sade ai." 
2Kings22:20 Dai re ai majaw, yu u, ngai nang hpe na a nji nwa ni hte rau jahpawng da nna, nang gaw ngwipyaw ai hte na a lup hta shang lu na rin dai; ndai shara ntsa e ngai shapraw ai tsin-yam tsindam hpe na a myi hte mu lu na n rai, ngu mu,” ngu nna tsun dat mu ai. Shing rai shanhte gaw bai wa nna, hkawhkam wa hpe dai ga htawn tsun dan mu ai." 
2Kings23:1 Dai re ai majaw hkawhkam wa gaw, Yuda mung hte Yerusalem mare na agyi salang ni nlang hte hpe shi hpang de shaga la nna," 
2Kings23:2 hkawhkam wa gaw Yuda amyu masha ni hte Yerusalem mare masha ni mahkra hte hpawn, hkinjawng ni, myihtoi ni hte mung masha kaji kaba mahkra hte rau, Yehowa nta de lung wa nna, shi gaw, dai yang e mu hkrup ai laika ga shaka mahkra hpe shanhte a man e hti dan mu ai." 
2Kings23:3 Dai hta kaga hkawhkam wa gaw dai shadaw makau e tsap nga let ndai laika hta ka da nga ai ga shaka hpe shagrin tawn da na hte, Yehowa hpe hkan nang let, Yehowa a hkang da ai ga, sakse ga hte matsun maroi ga hpe, myit masin mahkra hte n-gun lagaw mahkra hte hkan shatup na nga, Yehowa a man e ga shaka tawn da wu ai: mung masha ni nlang hte mung dai ga shaka hpe yin la mu ai." 
2Kings23:4 Bai hkawhkam wa gaw, Yehowa nawku Htingnu hta na, Bala Hpara matu mung, Ashera sumla matu mung, sumsing lamu shagan ni a matu mung galaw da ai arai ni yawng hpe shapraw kau mu, ngu nna hkinjawng agyi Hilkia hte hkinjawng hpunglum ni hte nta hkinbawng sin ai ni hpe hkang da mu ai rai nna, dai arai ni hpe Yerusalem mare shinggan, Kedron pa hta nat kau nhtawm, de a wan dap ni hpe Behtela du hkra hpai kau mu ai." 
2Kings23:5 Dai hta kaga shi gaw, Yuda mare ni a tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hte, Yerusalem mare grup yin na shara ni hta manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng na matu, Yuda hkawhkam ni san da ai sumla ni a hkinjawng ni hpe mung, Bala Hpara, ajan hte shata, shagan sumla ni hte sumsing lamu na zaw nawng zaw wa hpe manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya ai ni hpe mung, shachyut kau mu ai." 
2Kings23:6 Yehowa a nta na Ashera sumla hpe mung, Yerusalem mare shinggan, Kedron hkaraw de htawm la nna, dai yang e dai sumla hpe nat kau ai hte ayun ayaw adup kau nhtawm, yu maya ni a lupwa e ayai kau mu ai." 
2Kings23:7 Bai shi gaw, Ashera sumla matu nba grang da ai num ni nga ai, Yehowa nta wang kata na shawa la shawa num ni a nta hpe mung agrawp kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:8 Hkinjawng ni mahkra hpe mung, Yuda mare ni hta na, shi shapraw kau nhtawm, hkinjawng ni manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ya ai tsaw ai kawng ni hpe, Geba mare kaw nna Berasheba du hkra, awu asin di kau wu ai: mare agyi wa Yoshua chyinghka lam makau na, mare chyinghka lam a pai maga de ang ai, chyinghka ni hte seng ai tsaw ai shara ni hpe mung, agrawp kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:9 Tsaw ai kawng shara ni a hkinjawng ni chyawm gaw, Yerusalem mare na Yehowa a tawn hkungri de n ni lu timung, kahpu kanau ni hte rau matsi n rawng ai muk sha lu ma ai." 
2Kings23:10 Kadai mung Molek Hpara a matu, tinang a shayi shadang sha hpe wan nat hkungga n shatai ya lu hkra, shi gaw Hinom kashu kasha ni a kadit e nga ai Tohpet shara hpe mung, awu asin di kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:11 Yuda hkawhkam ni, ajan hpe nawku na matu, Yehowa a nta de shang ang ai, hkringmang Nahtan-melek a wang na gawk makau e tawn da ai gumra ni hpe mung, shi htawm kau nna, jan leng ni hpe mung nat kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:12 Ahaza a ntsa gawk a ntsa e Yuda hkawhkam ni galaw tawn ai tawn hkungri ni hte, Yehowa nta na wang lahkawng hta manashe galaw da ai tawn hkungri ni hpe mung, hkawhkam wa run kau nna, ayun ayaw agrawp kau nhtawm, Kedron hkaraw hta kabai ayai kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:13 Israela hkawhkam Shawlumon gaw, Yerusalem mare tawtap na hten run bum ngu ai hkra maga shara hta galaw da ai, Sidon a kaya kahpa lam ngu ai, Ashtoret Hpara shayi sha matu mung, Moba masha ni a kaya kahpa lam ngu ai, Hkemosha Hpara a matu mung, Ammon a kashu kasha ni a matsat shabat lam ngu ai, Milhkom a matu mung, galaw tawn ai tsaw ai kawng ni a shara ni hpe mung, hkawhkam wa awu asin di kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:14 Bai shi gaw shadaw sumla ni hpe agrawp kau ai hte, Asherim sumla ni hpe kran kau nna, de a shara ni hta, si ai ni a nrut nra hte jahpring da wu ai." 
2Kings23:15 Dai hta n-ga, Israela masha ni hpe shut shangun ai, Nebat a kasha Yeroboam gaw, Behtela shara e galaw da ai tawn hkungri hpe run kau ai hte, de a tsaw ai kawng shara hpe, nat kau nhtawm, ayun ayaw di kau ai hte, Ashera sumla hpe mung nat kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:16 Ya Yoshia gaw kayin yu nna, dai bum ntsa e nga ai lup ni hpe mada mu wu yang, shi masha shangun nna, dai lup ni hta na nrut nra ni hpe lai la nhtawm, ndai amu ni a lam, Karai Kasang a masha wa htawn tsun da ai. Yehowa a ga hte maren, ndai nrut nra ni hpe, tawn hkungri ntsa e nat nna awu asin di kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:17 Bai Yoshia gaw, “Ndai ngai mu ai nlung mahtan daw gaw, kaning re ai rai ta?” ngu nna san mu yang, mare masha ni gaw, “Nang madu Behtela tawn hkungri hpe galaw ai hte maren, Yuda mung na pru nna, ndai lam htawn tsun ai, Karai Kasang a masha wa a lup rai nga ai,” ngu nna shi hpe sha na ya mu ai." 
2Kings23:18 Dai rai nna shi gaw, “Dai anga nga u ga; shi a nrut nra ni hpe kadai mung n lai kau u ga,” ngu nna tsun mu ai majaw, shi a nrut nra ni hpe kadai mung n lai kau u ga, ngu nna tsun mu ai majaw, shi a nrut nra ni hte, Samari mung na pru ai myihtoi wa a nrut nra ni hpe, rau nga nga shangun mu ai." 
2Kings23:19 Israela hkawhkam ni gaw Yehowa hpe pawt shangun na nga, Samari mare ni hta na tsaw ai kawng shara ni hta de da ai nta ni mahkra hpe mung, Yoshia shaza kau nna, Behtela e galaw ai lam hte maren, dai shara ni hpe mung galaw wu ai." 
2Kings23:20 Tsaw ai kawng shara ni a hkinjawng ni mahkra hpe mung, de a tawn hkungri ni a ntsa e, shi sat kau nna, masha nrut nra hpe de a ntsa e nat kau nhtawm, Yerusalem mare de bai wa mat ai." 
2Kings23:21 Bai hkawhkam wa gaw mung masha ni mahkra hpe, “Ga shaka laika hta ka da nga ai hte maren, nanhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa a matu Shalai wa ai poi galaw mu,” ngu mu ai." 
2Kings23:22 Gaja wa Israela amyu ni hpe dawdan ya ai, tara agyi ni a aprat kaw nna, Israela hkawhkam ni a aprat hte, Yuda hkawhkam ni a aprat htum hkra, dai zawn re ai Shalai wa ai poi hpe galaw yu ai, n rai:" 
2Kings23:23 hkawhkam Yoshia hkaw dung ai shi matsat ning e, dai Shalai wa ai poi hpe, Yehowa a matu, Yerusalem mare hta galaw sha mu ai." 
2Kings23:24 Dai hta n-ga Yehowa nta hta hkinjawng Hilkia mu hkrup ai tara laika hta ka da nga ai ga matsun hpe shatup shadik da na matu, Yoshia gaw, Yuda mung hte Yerusalem mare hta e nga nga ai nat shung ai ni hte gumhpan hpan ai ni hpe, nat sumla ni hte hpara sumla ni rau hpawn matsat shabat lam amyu myu hpe yeng seng kau mu ai." 
2Kings23:25 Mawshe a tara mahkra hte maren, shi a myit masin mahkra hte, kraw lawang mahkra hte, n-gun lagaw mahkra hte, Yehowa a hpang e, Yoshia zawn hkan nang ai hkawhkam, shi a shawng e n nga yu ai; shi a hpang e mung n pru nga ai." 
2Kings23:26 Rai timung, Yehowa hpe pawt shangun na nga, Manashe shut hpyit ai lam mahkra a majaw, Yehowa gaw Yuda amyu hpe grai wa pawt sindawng bu ai myit kawp lu ai, n rai." 
2Kings23:27 Yehowa gaw, “Israela amyu hpe ngai shaden kau ai zawn, Yuda amyu hpe mung nye a myi man kaw na ngai shaden kau na we ai; ngai lata la ai, ndai Yerusalem mare hpe mung, Nye a amying shingteng nang e tawn da na we ai, nga nna ngai tsun ai nta hpe mung, ngai kau da na nngai,” nga ai." 
2Kings23:28 Naw gawn ra ai Yoshia amu ni hte shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings23:29 Shi a aprat e, Egutu hkawhkam Hpara-u-niko gaw, Asuri hkawhkam hpe gasat na nga, Uhprat hka du hkra lung wa yang, hkawhkam Yoshia gaw shi hpe hkap hkum na pru sa wa ai: Egutu hkawhkam gaw Megido shara e shi hpe mu nna sat kau wu ai." 
2Kings23:30 Shi a ali ama ni gaw Megido shara kaw nna hpyen leng hta e shi a mang hpe Yerusalem mare de la wa nna, shi a lup hta e makoi mayang di mu ai. Mung masha ni gaw Yoshia kasha Yehoaha hpe shaga la nna, namman chya ya nhtawm, kawa malai shi hpe hkawhkam shatai mu ai." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoaha gaw hkaw dung hpang yang, asak hkun masum ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta e shata masum up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Libna mare na Yeremia shayi sha Hamutala rai lu ai." 
2Kings23:32 Shi gaw kaji kawa ni hte maren, Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai." 
2Kings23:33 Shi gaw Yerusalem mare hta e n up nga lu hkra, Hpara-u-niko shi hpe Hamat mung na Rebla mare hta e bawng dung shangun nna, Yuda mung hpe gumhpraw joi hkying mi hte aja joi shi shawa wu ai." 
2Kings23:34 Bai Hpara-u-niko gaw Yoshia kasha Eliakim hpe, kawa a malai hkawhkam shatai nna, shi a mying hpe Yehoiakim ngu nna lai kau ya wu ai: Yehoaha hpe Egutu mung de woi wa nna, dai mung e shi si wa sai." 
2Kings23:35 Gumhpraw wa lu na matu, Hpara-u hkang da ai hte maren, Yehoiakim gaw mung masha ni hta na hkanse lahkawn nna, Hpara-u hpe aja hte gumhpraw sak ya wu ai: Hpara-u-niko hpe sak ya lu na matu, shi gaw dai aja gumhpraw hpe, mung masha ni langai hte langai kaw na, jaw lu ai hte maren, aja awa lahkawn la wu ai." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoiakim gaw hkaw dung hpang yang, asak hkun manga ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta shi langai ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Roma mare na Pedaia shayi sha Zebida rai lu ai." 
2Kings23:37 Shi gaw kaji kawa ni hte maren, Yehowa a man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai." 
2Kings24:1 Shi a lakhtak e Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza gaw gasat lung wa nna, Yehoiakim masum ning tup shi a mayam tai nga nhtawm, myit kayin nna shi hpe gumlau wu ai." 
2Kings24:2 Yehowa gaw, shi a shangun ma myihtoi ni a n-gup e tsun ai hte maren, Yuda mung hpe jahten na matu, Hkalde masha hpyen hpung ni, Suri masha hpyen hpung ni, Moba masha hpyen hpung ni hte, Ammon a kashu kasha ni a hpyen hpung ni hpe shangun dat wu ai." 
2Kings24:3 Gaja wa, Manashe galaw ai yubak mahkra hte, mara n rawng ai ni a sai hpe hkaw kau nna, Yerusalem mare hpe mara n rawng ai sai hte jahpring wu ai majaw," 
2Kings24:4 Yehowa gaw dai yubak hpe raw dat na n hkraw ai rai nna, Yuda amyu hpe shi a myi man kaw na yeng seng kau na nga, Yehowa hkang da ai ga hte maren ndai lam ni byin pru wa sai." 
2Kings24:5 Naw gawn ra ai Yehoiakim a amu ni hte, shi galaw ai lam mahkra gaw, Yuda hkawhkam ni a labau gawn ai laika hta ka da nga ai, n rai ni?" 
2Kings24:6 Shing rai Yehoiakim gaw shi a kaji kawa ni hte rau yup pyaw wa nna, shi a kasha Yehoiahkin shi a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
2Kings24:7 Dai aten kaw nna Egutu hkawhkam gaw shi a mungdan na pru wa lu ai, nrai: kaning rai nme law, Egutu hkawhkam up ai yawng hte hpe, Egutu hka shi kaw nna, Uhprat hka du hkra, Babelon hkawhkam kashun la kau wu ai." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoiahkin hkaw dung hpang yang, asak shi matsat ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta shata masum up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Yerusalem mare na Elnahtan a shayi sha, Nehushta rai lu ai." 
2Kings24:9 Shi gaw shi kawa a lam mahkra hte maren, Yehowa man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai." 
2Kings24:10 Dai aten e Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza a ali ama ni gaw, Yerusalem mare hpe lung gasat nna, wang tawn da mu ai." 
2Kings24:11 Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza a ali ama ni gaw dai mare hpe naw wang tawn nga yang, shi hkum sa du nna," 
2Kings24:12 Yuda hkawhkam Yehoiahkin gaw, Babelon hkawhkam hpe sa tau la na nga, shi hkum hte shi a kanu, shi a ali ama ni, hkawhkam kasha ni hte agyi salang ni rau pru sa ma yang, Babelon hkawhkam gaw, shi hkaw dung ai matsat ning hta e, shi hpe rim la wu ai." 
2Kings24:13 Dai hta kaga, Yehowa tsun da ai hte maren, shi gaw, Yehowa nta na sut rai nlang hpe mung, hkawhkam htingnu na sut rai nlang hpe mung, kashun la nna, Yehowa a nawku Htingnu matu Israela hkawhkam Shawlumon galaw da ai aja wan ni hpe mung agrawp kau wu ai." 
2Kings24:14 Yerusalem masha ni mahkra hpe mung, hkawhkam kasha ni mahkra hte hpyen share hpung mun mi hpe mung, maka kumla pru ai ni hte ndup nhkap ni yawng hpe mung shi rim woi wa nna, dai mung na matsan mayan htum ai ni hta kaga, kadai hpe mung ngam da wu ai, n rai." 
2Kings24:15 Yehoiahkin hpe mung, hkawhkam a kanu hte hkawhkam a num ni hpe mung, aya lu ai ni hte dai mung na agyi salang ni hpe mung, Yerusalem mare kaw nna Babelon mare de rim wa nhtawm bawng dung shangun mu ai." 
2Kings24:16 Hpyen majan gasat ram ai, n-gun lagaw rawng ai wa-ngan share hkying sanit hte maka kumla pru ai ni hkying mi hpe mung, Babelon hkawhkam gaw, Babelon mare hta bawng dung shangun mu ai." 
2Kings24:17 Bai Babelon hkawhkam gaw, Yehoiahkin a kawa doi Matania hpe, Yehoiahkin a malai hkawhkam shatai wu ai rai nna, shi a amying hpe Zedekia, ngu nna lai ya wu ai." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia gaw hkaw dung hpang yang, asak hkun langai ning rai nga nna, Yerusalem mare hta shi langai ning up nga ai: shi a kanu gaw Libna mare na Yeremia a shayi sha Hamutala rai lu ai." 
2Kings24:19 Shi gaw Yehoiakim a lam mahkra hte maren Yehowa a man e n hkru ai amu galaw nga ai. 
2Kings24:20 Kaning rai nme law, Yehowa gaw Yerusalem mare hte Yuda mung hpe shi a myi man kaw na tsan kau da ai shani du hkra, pawt bu nga ai majaw, ndai lam ni byin pru nga ai. Bai Zedekia gaw Babelon hkawhkam hpe gumlau wu ai." 
2Kings25:1 Dai rai nna Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza gaw, Zedekia hkaw dung ai jahku ning na, sha shi a, nhtoi shi ya hta e, shi a hpyen luksuk ni hte rau, Yerusalem mare hpe lung gasat nna, de a grup yin e dap jung let, kaduk htu nhtawm" 
2Kings25:2 Zedekia hkaw dung ai shi langai ning du hkra, dai mare hpe wang tawn da mu ai." 
2Kings25:3 Shing rai shata mali a nhtoi jahku ya e mare kata e hku wa grai hku wa nna, mung masha ni a matu shahpa n nga nga ai." 
2Kings25:4 Dai shaloi e Hkalde masha ni gaw dai mare grup yin e wang tawn nga ma ai rai nna, mare bunghku hpe tawk waw nhtawm, hpyen masha ni nlang hkawhkam wa a sun makau e nga ai, bunghku lahkawng a lapran a chyinghka lam hku shana e hprawng pru nna, hkawhkam wa gaw layang ga hku hprawng mat wa ai." 
2Kings25:5 Hkalde masha ni chyawm gaw hkawhkam wa hpe hkan shachyut nna, Yerihko pa hta e hkan dep mu yang, shi a hpyen masha nlang hte gaw hprawng bra mat ma ai." 
2Kings25:6 Shanhte gaw hkawhkam wa hpe rim la nna, Ribla mare e nga ai Babelon hkawhkam hpang de woi wa mu ai: shing rai shi hpe saw dan mu ai rai nna," 
2Kings25:7 Zedekia man e shi a kashu kasha ni hpe sat kau ai hte, shi a myi hpe achyaw baw kau ya nna, hkang hkyihkyang hte gyit nhtawm, Babelon mare de woi wa mu ai." 
2Kings25:8 Ya Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza hkaw dung ai shi jahku ning ngu na, shata manga a sanit ya shani e, Babelon hkawhkam a hkringmang, sin langa ni a hpyen du Nebuzaradan gaw Yerusalem mare de du lung wa ai." 
2Kings25:9 Shi gaw Yehowa a nta hte hkawhkam htingnu hpe mung, Yerusalem mare e nga ai nta kaba ni nlang hte hpe mung, nat kau wu ai." 
2Kings25:10 Shi hte rau nga ai Hkalde hpyen ma ni mung, Yerusalem mare a bunghku ni hpe rum kau mu ai." 
2Kings25:11 Sin langa ni a hpyen du Nebuzaradan gaw, mare kata e naw ngam nga ai ni hte, Babelon hkawhkam hpang de rap wa ai ni hpe mung, naw ngam nga ai yu maya ni hpe mung, bawng dung shangun mu ai." 
2Kings25:12 Rai timung, shi gaw, tsabyi sun hte yi hkauna galaw na matu matsan mayan htum ai ni hpe ngam tawn da mu ai." 
2Kings25:13 Bai Hkalde masha ni gaw, Yehowa nta kata e nga ai magri shadaw ni hpe mung, angdung npawt ni hte, magri hka lawng hpe mung, agrawp kau nna, dai magri hpe Babelon mare de la wa mu ai." 
2Kings25:14 Bai, magri hte galaw ai di ni, shingban ni, lakap ni, chyaw ni hte, daw jau na matu kaga arai ni mahkra hpe mung la wa mu ai." 
2Kings25:15 Bai, sin langa ni a hpyen du wa gaw, aja hte mung, gumhpraw hte mung galaw ai awan ban ni hte angdung ni hpe mung la kau wu ai." 
2Kings25:16 Shawlumon gaw Yehowa nta a matu galaw tawn ai shadaw lahkawng, hka lawng langai mi hte angdung npawt ni a magri ni gaw hti n dang law nga ai." 
2Kings25:17 Shadaw langai mi gaw dawng shi matsat tsaw nga nna, de a ntsa e magri bandung rai nga ai: dai bandung gaw dawng masum tsaw ai hte, grup yin e magri awa hte hkainu si nampan sumbyau nga ai: lahkawng ngu na shadaw mung, dai hte maren awa sumbyau nga ai." 
2Kings25:18 Bai, sin langa ni a hpyen du wa Bebuzaradan gaw hkinjawng agyi wa Seraia hpe mung hpunglum wa ngu ai Zehpania hte Yehowa nta chyinghka sin ai agyi masum hpe mung, rim la wu ai:" 
2Kings25:19 hpyen luksuk ni a bu wa hpe mung mare hta e nga ai hkawhkam wa a salang manga hpe mung, chyare wa hpe mung, mung masha ni a jahpan hti yu ai luksuk ni a agyi wa hpe mung, dai mung na salang kru shi hpe mung, mare kata na shaga la nhtawm," 
2Kings25:20 Babelon hkawhkam nga ai Ribla mare de woi wa mu ai. 
2Kings25:21 Babelon hkawhkam gaw, Hamat mung, Ribla mare hta e shanhte hpe kahtam sat kau mu ai. Shing rai Yuda amyu gaw tinang a mung hta na shapraw kau ai hkrum mat ma ai." 
2Kings25:22 Rai timung, Babelon hkawhkam Nebuhkadneza gaw, Yuda mung hta e naw jahti da ai mung masha ni a ntsa e, Shahpan a kashu Ahikam a kasha, Gedalia hpe, munggyi shatai wu ai." 
2Kings25:23 Ya, Babelon hkawhkam wa gaw, Gedalia hpe munggyi shatai ai lam, hpyen du ni hte shanhte a hpyen ma ni na mu yang, Nehtania kasha Ishmaela, Karea kasha Yohanan, Netohpa amyu Tanhumet a kasha Seraia hte Mahka amyu na Yazania gaw, shanhte a masha ni hte rau, Mizpa mare e dung nga ai Gedalia hpang de du ma ai." 
2Kings25:24 Dai rai nna, Gedalia gaw, “Hkalde masha ni a ali ama ni hpe hkum hkrit myit; ndai mung hta anga nga mu; Babelon hkawhkam wa hpe daw jau nga mu; shaloi nanhte ngwipyaw lu na myit dai,” ngu nna bu ni hte shanhte a masha ni hpe dagam da wu ai." 
2Kings25:25 Rai timung, shata sanit ngu na hta, hkawhkam, amyu na, Elishama a kashu, Nehtania kasha Ishmaela gaw, marai shi hte rau sa du nna, Gedalia hpe mung, Mizpa mare e shi hte rau rai nga ai Yuda masha ni hte Hkalde masha ni hpe mung, sat kau mu ai." 
2Kings25:26 Dai rai nna, mung masha ni kaji kaba mahkra hte, hpyen luksuk ni a bu ni gaw, Hkalde masha ni hpe hkrit ai majaw, rawt nna Egutu mung de hprawng mat ma ai." 
2Kings25:27 Ya, Yuda hkawhkam Yehoiahkin a bawng dung ai sumshi sanit ning hta, shata shi lahkawng a hkun sanit ya e, Babelon hkawhkam Ewila-merodak a hkaw dung ai shawng shaning hta e, shi gaw Yuda hkawhkam Yehoiahkin a baw shatsaw ya nna, htawng hta na shalawt dat nhtawm," 
2Kings25:28 shi hpe ngwipyaw ga tsun dat nna, Babelon mare hta shi hte rau nga ai hkawhkam ni a ntsa e, shi a tingnyang hpe shagrau dat wu ai hte, shi a htawng hpun palawng galai kau ya wu ai." 
2Kings25:29 Shing rai Yehoiahkin gaw shi a prat dingsa e hkawhkam a man e lusha nga lu nna," 
2Kings25:30 shi hpe bau na matu, hkawhkam wa hparan da ai lusha jarit hpe tutnawng shani shagu shi hpe karan jaw mu ai." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam, Shet, Enusha;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan, Mahalela, Yared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enuk, Mahtusala, Lamek;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Shem, Ham, Yahpet hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:5 Yahpet a shadang sha ni gaw, Goma, Magoga, Madai, Yawan, Htubala, Meshek, Htira hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:6 Goma a shadang sha ni gaw, Ashkena, Rihpat, Htugama hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:7 Yawan a shadang sha ni gaw, Elisha, Tarshi, Kihtim, Dodanim hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ham a shadang sha ni gaw, Hkusha, Mizra-im, Hput, Hkanan hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:9 Hkusha a shadang sha ni gaw, Seba, Hawila, Saphta, Rama, Sabhtahka hte rai ma ai. Rama a shadang sha gaw Sheba yan Dedan rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:10 Hkusha gaw Nimrod hpe mung shaprat wu ai; dai wa gaw ga ntsa e kaba hpang ai wa rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizra-im gaw Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim." 
1Chronicles1:12 Hpahtrusim, Hkasluhim, Hkaphturim amyu ni hpe shaprat wu ai: Hpiliste masha ni gaw Hkasluhim amyu hta na rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:13 Hkanan gaw shi a kasha alat Sidon hte Het," 
1Chronicles1:14 Yebusi, Amori, Girgashi;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiwi, Arki, Sini;" 
1Chronicles1:16 Arwadi, Zimari, Hamahti amyu ni hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:17 Shem a shadang sha ni gaw, Elam, Ashura, Arhpaza, Luda, Aram, Uza, Hula, Gehta, Meshek hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arhpaza gaw Shela hpe shaprat wu ai; Shela gaw Ebera hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebera mung shadang sha lahkawng shaprat wu ai: Langai wa a amying gaw Hpelek rai lu ai: kaning rai nme law, dai wa a prat e lamu ga hpe karan la ma ai; kanau wa a amying gaw Yoktan rai lu ai." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yoktan gaw, Almoda, Shalep, Hazarmawet, Yerak;" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Uzala, Dikla;" 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebala, Abimela, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ohpira, Hawila, Yoba hte hpe shaprat wu ai: ndai hte mahkra gaw Yoktan a shadang sha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem, Arhpaza, Shela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebera, Hpelek, Reu;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruk, Nahura, Htera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abraham ngu ai Abram rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abraham a shadang sha yan gaw, Isak hte Ishmaela rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:29 Da ndai gaw shanhte a lakung lama ni rai nga ma ai: Ishmaela a kasha la hpunglat gaw Nabaiyut: dai kaw nna Kedara, Adebela, Mibsam;" 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishma, Duma, Masa, Hadad, Tema;" 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetura, Nahpisha, Kedma rai ma ai. Dai hte gaw Ishmaela a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:32 Bai Abraham a lashi num Ketura a kashu kasha ni gaw, Zimran, Yokshan, Medan, Midian, Yishbak, Shua hte rai ma ai. Yokshan a kasha yan gaw Sheba hte Dedan rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midian a kasha ni gaw, Ehpa, Epera, Hanuk, Abida, Eleda hte rai ma ai: dai hte yawng Ketura kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:34 Bai Abraham gaw Isak hpe shaprat wu ai. Isak a kasha yan gaw, Esaw hte Israela rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:35 Esaw a shadang sha ni gaw, Elihpa, Reuela, Yeusa, Yalam, Kora hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elihpa a shadang sha ni gaw, Hteman, Umara, Tsehpi, Gahtam, Keneza, Htimna, Amalek hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuela shadang sha ni gaw, Nahat, Zera, Shama, Miza hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seira a shadang sha ni gaw, Lotan, Shobala, Zibeun, Ana, Dishon, Ezera, Dishan hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotan a shadang sha yan gaw Hori hte Homam hte rai ma ai; Lotan a kajan gaw Htimna rai lu ai. 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobala a shadang sha ni gaw, Alian, Manahat, Ebala, Shehpi, Unam hte rai ma ai. Zibeun a shadang sha yan gaw, Aya hte Ana rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana a kasha gaw Dishon rai lu ai. Dishon a shadang sha ni gaw, Hamran, Eshban, Yitran, Hkeran hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezera a shadang sha ni gaw, Bilahan, Zawan, Yakan hte rai ma ai. Dishan a shadang sha yan gaw Uza hte Aran rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles1:43 Da ndai gaw Israela kashu kasha ni hta hkawhkam garai n nga yang, Edom mung e up ai hkawhkam ni rai nga ma ai. Beora a kasha Bela gaw hkaw dung nna, shi a mare a amying gaw Dinhaba rai lu ai." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela si mat nna, Bozra mare na Zera a kasha Yoba gaw shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yoba si mat yang, Hteman mung na Husham gaw shi a malai shang dung wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:46 Husham si mat yang, Moba pa ga e Midian masha ni hpe gasat kau ai Bedada a kasha Hadad gaw, shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai: shi a mare a amying gaw Awit rai lu ai." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadad si mat yang, Masreka shara na Samla gaw shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samla si mat nna, dai hka makau e nga ai Rehubut shara na Sha-ula gaw shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:49 Sha-ula si mat nna, Akbura a kasha Bala-hanan gaw shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai." 
1Chronicles1:50 Bala- hanan si mat nna, Hadad gaw shi a aya hta shang dung wu ai: shi a mare a amying gaw Pai ngu ai rai lu ai; shi a madu jan a amying gaw Mehetabela rai nga ai: shi gaw Mezahaba a kasha Matreda a shayi sha rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles1:51 Ya Hadad mung si mat sai. Edom mung a du ni gaw ndai hte rai nga ma ai: du Htimna, du Alia, du Yehtet;" 
1Chronicles1:52 du Oholibama, du Ela, du Pinon;" 
1Chronicles1:53 du Kena, du Hteman, du Mibzara;" 
1Chronicles1:54 du Magdiela, du Iram hte rai ma ai. Dai ni gaw Edom mung na du ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:1 Israela a shadang sha ni gaw, Rubin, Simun, Lewi, Yuda, Yisahka, Zebulun," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Yawsep, Ben-yamin, Naphtali, Gad, Ashe hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda a shadang sha ni gaw, Era, Onan, Shela hte rai ma ai: dai masum gaw Hkanan num Shua hta shaprat ai rai ma ai. Yuda a kasha alat Era gaw Yehowa man e n hkru nga ai rai nna, Yehowa shi hpe sat kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:4 Shi a kanam Htama gaw shi a matu Hparet yan Zerak hpe shaprat wu ai. Yuda a kasha ni yawng marai manga rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles2:5 Hparet kasha yan gaw, Hezron hte Hamula rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:6 Zerak a shadang sha ni gaw, Zimri, Ehtan, Heman, Hkalakola, Dara hte rai ma ai; yawng gaw marai manga rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:7 Hkarmi a kasha Ahkara rai nga ai: shi gaw dai majai kau ai rai ni hpe lagu la wu ai rai nna, Israela amyu hpe sharu shatsang kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:8 Bai Ehtan a kasha gaw Azaria rai lu ai. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezron shaprat ai shadang sha ni gaw, Yeramela, Ram, Hkelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram gaw Aminada hpe shaprat wu ai: Aminada gaw Yuda kashu kasha ni a du Nasun hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasun gaw Salma hpe shaprat wu ai; Salma gaw Bua hpe shaprat wu ai; 
1Chronicles2:12 Bua gaw Obed shaprat wu ai; Obed gaw Yese hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese gaw shi a kasha alat Eliaba, lahkawng ngu na Abinadab, masum ngu na Shima," 
1Chronicles2:14 mali ngu na Nahtanela, manga ngu na Radai;" 
1Chronicles2:15 kru ngu na Ozem, sanit ngu na Dawi hpe shaprat wu ai:" 
1Chronicles2:16 shanhte a kajan yan gaw, Zeruia hte Abigala rai nga ma ai. Zeruia shadang sha ni gaw, Abishai, Yoba, Asahela hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigala gaw Amasa hpe shaprat wu ai: Amasa a kawa gaw Ishmaela amyu Yehtera rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles2:18 Bai Hezron a kasha Hkaleb gaw, shi a madu jan Azuba hta Yeriot hpe shaprat wu ai; shi a kasha ni gaw Yeshera, Shoba, Ardon hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba si mat ai hpang, Hkaleb gaw Ehprat hpe la nna, Hura hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hura gaw Uri hpe, Uri gaw Bezalela hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:21 Dai hpang Hezron gaw asak kru shi ning du sayang, Gilead a kawa Mahkira a shayi sha kaw shang nhtawm, shi hpe la nna, shi gaw Seguba hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:22 Seguba gaw Ya-ira hpe shaprat wu ai: dai wa gaw, Gilead mung hta e mare hkun masum hte hpe up nga ai." 
1Chronicles2:23 Bai Geshura yan Aram gaw Kenat hte hpawn, Ya-ira mare ni hte kahtawng kru shi kashun la mu ai. Dai hte yawng gaw Gilead kawa a Mahkira a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ya Hezron gaw Hkaleb-ehprahta e si mat ai hpang, Hezron a madu jan Abiya gaw Tekoa kawa Ashura hpe shangai wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bai Hezron a kasha alat Yeramela shadang sha ni gaw, kasha alat Ram hte Buna. Oren, Ozem, Ahiya hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yeramela gaw Atara mying ai kaga madu jan mung lu ai rai nna, shi gaw Onam a kanu rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles2:27 Bai Yeramela a kasha alat Ram a shadang sha ni gaw Maza, Yamin, Ekera hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onam a shadang sha yan gaw Shamai hte Yada rai ma ai. Shamai a shadang sha yan gaw Nadab hte Abishura rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishura a madu jan a amying gaw Abihala rai lu ai; shi gaw kasha Aban hte Molid hpe shangai wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab a kasha yan gaw Seled hte Apa-im, Seled chyawm gaw kasha n kap ai si mat sai." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apa-im a kasha Ishi: Ishi a kasha Sheshan: Sheshan a kasha Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Shamai a kanau Yada a shadang sha yan gaw, Yehtera hte Yonahtan rai ma ai; Yehtera chyawm gaw kasha n kap ai si mat sai." 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonahtan a kasha yan gaw, Pelet hte Zaza rai ma ai. Dai ni gaw Yeramela a lakung lama ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan chyawm gaw shadang sha n lu ai, shayi sha hkrai rai lu ai. Bai Sheshan gaw Yara mying ai Egutu mung na mayam la langai mi lu ai." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshan gaw shi a mayam Yara hpe, shi a shayi sha ya wu ai rai n na, shi gaw kawa a matu Atai hpe shangai wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai gaw Nahtan hpe shaprat wu ai; Nahtan gaw Zabad hpe shaprat wu ai; 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad gaw Epla shaprat wu ai; Epla gaw Obed hpe shaprat wu ai; 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed gaw Yehu hpe shaprat wu ai. Yehu gaw Azaria hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria gaw Hele hpe shaprat wu ai. Hele gaw Eleasa hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa gaw Sismai hpe shaprat wu ai; Sismai gaw Shalum hpe shaprat wu ai; 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalum gaw Yekamia hpe shaprat wu ai; Yekamia gaw Elishama hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:42 Bai Yeramela a kanau Hkaleb a shadang sha ni gaw, shi a kasha alat Zihpa a kawa Mesha hte, Hebron a kawa Maresha a kasha ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebron a shadang sha ni gaw, Kora, Tapua, Rekem, Shema hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema gaw Yorkeam a kawa Raham hpe shaprat wu ai; Rekem gaw Shamai hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Bai Maon gaw Shamai a kasha rai nga ai; Maon mung Bet-zura a kawa rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles2:46 Hkaleb a lashi num Ehpa gaw, Haran, Moza, Gaze hte hpe shangai wu ai; bai Haram gaw Gaze hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bai Yadai a shadang sha ni gaw, Regem, Yohtan, Geshan, Pelet, Ehpa, Shahpa hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:48 Hkaleb a lashi num Mahka gaw, Shebera yan Tirhana hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles2:49 Dai hta kaga shi gaw, Madmana a kawa Shahpa Makbena yan Gibea a kawa Shewa hpe mung shaprat wu ai: Hkaleb a shayi sha gaw Aksa rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles2:50 Da ndai gaw Ehprahta a kasha alat Hura a kasha Hkaleb a shadang sha ni rai nga ma ai: Kiriat-yarim a kawa Shobala; 
1Chronicles2:51 Betlehem a kawa salma; Bet-gadera a kawa Harep hte rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles2:52 Bai Kiriat-yarim kawa Shobala a kasha yan gaw, Haroe ngu ai Menuhot chyen mi up nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:53 Bai Kiriat-yarim a lakung lama ni gaw, Ihtri masha ni, Puhti masha ni, Shumahti masha ni Mishrai masha ni rai ma ai; dai ni hta nna Zorahti masha ni hte Eshtaoli masha ni pru ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma a kashu kasha ni gaw, Betlehem hte Netohpa, Atrot-bet-yoba hte Zori ngu ai, Manahati amyu chyen mi rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles2:55 Bai Yabet mare e nga ai laika ka ai amyu ni gaw, Tirahti, Shimehti, Suhkahti ni rai ma ai. Dai ni gaw Rehkab dap ni a kawa, Hamat kaw nna karan wa ai, Keni amyu masha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:1 Da ndai gaw Hebron mare e shangai ai Dawi a shadang sha ni rai ma ai: Yezrela num Ahinoam, kasha alat Amanon; lahkawng ngu na, Hkarmela num Abigala a kasha Daniela;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Da ndai gaw Hebron mare e shangai ai Dawi a shadang sha ni rai ma ai: Yezrela num Ahinoam, kasha alat Amanon; lahkawng ngu na, Hkarmela num Abigala a kasha Daniela;" 
1Chronicles3:2 masum ngu na, Geshura hkawhkam Talamai a shayi sha Mahka a kasha Absalom; mali ngu na Hagit a kasha Adoniya;" 
1Chronicles3:3 manga ngu na, Abitala a kasha Shehpati; kru ngu na, shi a numdung jan Egla a kasha Itream hte rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles3:4 Hebron mare hta e shi a kasha kru hte hpe shaprat wu ai: shi gaw dai yang e sanit ning e shata kru up wu ai; Yerusalem mare hta e sumshi masum ning up nga ai. 
1Chronicles3:5 Yerusalem e shaprat ai shi a kasha ni gaw, Shimea, Shoba, Nahtan, Shawlumon; dai mali gaw Amiela a shayi sha Bat-shua hta shaprat ai rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles3:6 Dai hta kaga, Iba, Elishama, Elihpelet" 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nehpeg, Yahpia." 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada, Elihpelet ngu na jahku rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:9 Da ndai yawng, lashi num ni a shadang sha ni n tsun ai, Dawi a shadang sha ni hkrai rai nga ma ai: shanhte a kajan gaw Htama rai malu ai." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ya Shawlumon a kasha Rehoboam; Rehoboam a kasha Abiya; Abiya a kasha Asa; Asa a kasha Yehosahpat; 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehosahpat a kasha Yoram; Yoram a kasha Ahazia; Ahazia a kasha Yosha; 
1Chronicles3:12 Yosha a kasha Amazia; Amazia a kasha Azaria; Azaria a kasha Yohtam 
1Chronicles3:13 Yohtam a kasha Ahaza; Ahaza a kasha Hezekia; Hezekia a kasha Manashe; 
1Chronicles3:14 Manashe a kasha Amon; Amon a kasha Yoshia rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles3:15 Yoshia shadang sha ni gaw, kasha alat Yohanan; lahkawng ngu na Yehoiakim; masum nga na, Zedekia; mali ngu na Shalum hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yehoiakim a kasha yan gaw, Yehkonia hte Zedekia rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:17 Bawng dung hkrum ai Yehkonia shadang sha ni gaw Shalatela," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malhkiram, Pedaia, Shenaza, Yekamia, Hoshama, Nedabia hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaia a shadang sha yan gaw, Zerubabela hte Shime rai ma ai. Zerubabela shadang sha ni gaw Meshulam yan Hanania; bai," 
1Chronicles3:20 Hashuba, Ohela, Berehkia, Hasadia, Yushabhesed, manga ngu na, rai ma ai: shanhte a kajan gaw Shelomit rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania shadang sha yan gaw, Pelati hte Yeshaia rai ma ai. Yeshaia kasha Rehpaia; Rehpaia kasha Arnan; Arnan a kasha Obadia; Obadia kasha Shehkania;" 
1Chronicles3:22 Shehkania a kasha Shemaia rai nga ai. Shemaia shadang sha ni gaw, Hatu, Igala, Baria, Naria, Shahpat: dai gaw kru rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bai Naria shadang sha ni gaw, Elionai, Hizkia, Azrikam; yawng masum rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elionai a shadang sha ni gaw, Hodawia, Eliashib, Pelaia, Akub, Yohanan, Delaia, Anani, yawng marai sanit rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:1 Yuda a shadang sha ni gaw, Hparet, Hezron, Hkarmi, Hura, Shobala hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobala a kasha Reaia gaw Yahat hpe shaprat wu ai. Yahat gaw Ahumai yan Lahad hpe shaprat wu ai. Da ndai gaw Zorahti dap ni rai nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles4:3 Bai, dai ni gaw Etam a kawa a kashu kasha ni rai nga ma ai: Yezrela, Ishma, Idbash hte shanhte a kajan Hazeleponi:" 
1Chronicles4:4 Gedora kawa Penuela; Husha a kawa Ezera hte rai ma ai: dai ni gaw, Betlehem a kawa Ehprahta a kasha alat Hura a dap ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:5 Tekoa a kawa Ashura gaw, Hela hte Nara mying ai num lahkawng lu ai."
