1Chronicles4:6 Nara a kasha ni gaw, Ahuzam, Hehpera, Temeni, Hashtari hte rai ma ai. Dai ni gaw Nara a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:7 Hela a kasha ni gaw, Zeret, Izhara, Etnan hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:8 Bai Hakoza gaw, Anub yan Zobeba hte Harum a kasha Ahazela a dap ni hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabet gaw shi a kahpu kanau ni hta arawng grau lu nga ai: shi a kanu gaw, “Yawn hkyen hkrum let ngai shi hpe shaprat se ai,” nga nna Yabet shamying wu ai." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabet mung, Israela Karai Kasang hpe, “Nang ngai hpe shaman ya nna, nye a lamu ga jarit dam lada di ya e! Ngai yawn hkyen ai hta lawt lu n ga na a lahpum hte n hkru n hkra ai hta na ngai hpe magawp maga la e!” ngu nna hpyi jahtau wu ai. Karai Kasang mung shi hpyi ai ga madat mara ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles4:11 Bai Shupa kanau Hkelub gaw Eshton a kawa Mehira hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton gaw, Bet-rahpa, Pasea, Irnahasa a kawa Tehina hpe shaprat wu ai. Dai ni gaw Rehka amyu ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenaza a shadang sha yan gaw, Otniela hte Seraia rai ma ai. Otniela a kasha gaw Hahtat rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Bai Meonohtai gaw Ohpra hpe shaprat wu ai; Seraia gaw Ge-harashim a kawa Yoba hpe shaprat wu ai: shanhte gaw laksama ni rai nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles4:15 Bai Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb a shadang sha ni gaw, Iru, Ela, Na-an hte rai ma ai: Ela yan Kenaza mung kasha lu ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yehalela shadang sha ni gaw, Zip, Zihpa, Tiria, Asarela hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra a shadang sha ni gaw, Yehtera, Mered, Ehpera, Yalon hte rai ma ai: Mered a madu jan Miriam, Shamai hte Eshtemoa a kawa Ishba hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra a shadang sha ni gaw, Yehtera, Mered, Ehpera, Yalon hte rai ma ai: Mered a madu jan Miriam, Shamai hte Eshtemoa a kawa Ishba hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles4:18 Bai shi a madu jan Yuda num gaw, Gedora kawa Yered, Sohko a kawa Hebera, Zanoa kawa Yekuhtila hpe shaprat wu ai. Dai ni gaw Mered la ai Hpara-u a shayi sha Bihtia a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:19 Bai Nahan a kajan, Hodia madu jan a kasha ni gaw, Garmi masha Keila a kawa hte Mahkahti masha Eshtemoa rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimon a shadang sha ni gaw, Amnon, Rina, Benhanan, Tilon hte rai ma ai. Ishi a shadang sha yan gaw Zohet hte Ben-zohet rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:21 Yuda a kasha Shela a shadang sha ni gaw, Lehka a kawa Era. Maresha a kawa Lada hte, mani ai lachyit sumpan chye da ai Ashbea dap ni hte," 
1Chronicles4:22 Yokim, Hkozeba amyu masha ni, Yoasha hte Moba ga hte Yashubi-lehem up ai Sarap hte rai ma ai: gawn da ai labau ga gaw, moi na ga rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles4:23 Shanhte gaw dibu sama ni hte, Netim e, Gedera e dung nga ai ni rai nga ma ai: shanhte makan galaw let, hkawhkam wa hte rau dai yang e nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simun a shadang sha ni gaw, Nemuela, Yamin, Yarib, Zera, Sha-ula hte rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles4:25 Sha-ula a kasha Shalum; Shalum a kasha Mibsan; Mibsan a kasha Mishma, rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishma a kasha ni gaw Hamula, Zahkura, Shime hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shime gaw shadang sha shi kru hte shayi sha kru hte hpe shaprat wu ai: shi a kanau ni chyawm gaw kasha law law n lu ma ai hte, Yuda kashu kasha ni zawn mayat maya ma ai n rai." 
1Chronicles4:28 Shanhte gaw Berasheba, Molada, Haza-shuala," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bela, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Behtuela, Horma, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-marhkabot, Hazarasusim, Bet-biri hte Sharim mare ni hta nga nga ma ai. Dai mare ni gaw Dawi hkaw dung ai prat du hkra shanhte a mare ni rai nga malu ai." 
1Chronicles4:32 Shanhte a kahtawng ni gaw, Etam, A-in, Rimon, Tohken, Ashan hte rai malu ai: dai gaw mare manga rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles4:33 Dai mare ni a grup yin na kahtawng ni mahkra hpe mung, Bala du hkra, up nga ma ai. Dai gaw shanhte a buga hte, shanhte a ahtik labau rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshoba, Yamlek, Amazia a kasha Yosha;" 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoela, Yoshibia a kasha Yehu; shi a kaji Seraia, shi a kawa Asiela;" 
1Chronicles4:36 Elionai, Yakoba, Yeshohaia, Asaia, Adeila, Yesimela, Benaia;" 
1Chronicles4:37 Shihpi a kasha Ziza, shi a kaji Alon, shi a kawa Yedaia, shi a kawa Shimri, shi a kawa Shemaia" 
1Chronicles4:38 ngu ai hte gaw tinang a dap ni hta du hkrai rai nga ma ai: shanhte a kaji kawa dap ni gaw, grai wa mayat maya wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ya shanhte gaw Gedora du hkra, kadit a sinpraw maga hku, shanhte a yamnga ni a matu udat shara tam let, hkawm wa ma ai rai nna," 
1Chronicles4:40 dam lada, tsit lali, pyaw ai udat shara mu hkrup mu ai; hpyen majan mung n hkrum ma ai: kaning rai nme law, Ham a kashu kasha ni dai shara e shawng de nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles4:41 Laika hta amying ka da ai ni gaw, Yuda hkawhkam Hezekia aprat e sa du nna, shanhte a sum ni hte shanhte hte rau nga ai Meunim masha ni hpe dai ni du hkra atsai awai shaza kau nhtawm, shanhte a shara hta shang nga nga ma ai: kaning rai nme law, shanhte a yamnga ni a matu dai yang e udat shara tsawm nga malu ai." 
1Chronicles4:42 Bai, Simun a kashu kasha ni, marai manga tsa hte gaw, Ishi a kasha ni Pelatia, Nearia, Rehpaia, Uziela hte hpe du shatai nna, Seira bum de shang nga let," 
1Chronicles4:43 naw ngam nga ai Amalek masha ni hpe sat kau nhtawm, dai ni du hkra dai yang e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubin gaw Israela a kasha alat rai nga ai: rai timung, kawa a yup ku hpe awu asin di kau wu ai majaw, hpu lat aya gaw Israela a kasha Yawsep hpe jaw kau wu ai rai nna, ahtik labau laika gaw hpu lat aya hku hkan wu ai n rai." 
1Chronicles5:2 Kaning rai nme law, Yuda gaw kahpu ni a ntsa e kaba wa ai rai nna, du gaw shi kaw nna pru wa ai: hpu lat aya chyawm gaw Yawsep hte seng nga ai." 
1Chronicles5:3 Ya, Israela a kasha alat Rubin a shadang sha ni gaw, Hanuk, Hpalu, Hezron, Hkarmi hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bai Yoela a shadang sha ni gaw, Shemaia, shi a kasha Goga, shi a kasha Shime;" 
1Chronicles5:5 shi a kasha Mihka, shi a kasha Reaia, shi a kasha Bala;" 
1Chronicles5:6 shi a kasha Bera hte rai ma ai: dai Bera hpe Asuri hkawhkam Tilgat-pilnese bawng rim wa wu ai: shi gaw Rubin dap a du rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles5:7 Shi a kanau ni a ahtik labau laika ni prat mi hte prat mi gawn yu yang, du Yeila hte Zehkaria rai nga ma ai;" 
1Chronicles5:8 Azaza a kasha Bela mung rai nga ai; Azaza gaw Shema a kasha; Shema gaw Yoela a kasha; shi gaw Nebo kaw nna Bala-meon du hkra dam ai Aroera e dung nga ai; 
1Chronicles5:9 sinpraw maga de ang wa yang, shi gaw Uhprat hka nam mali lam du hkra up nga ai; kaning rai nme law, shanhte a yamnga ni gaw Gilead mung hta e law htam wa malu ai." 
1Chronicles5:10 Bai shanhte gaw Shawlu a aprat e Hagara masha ni hpe gasat dang kau nhtawm, Geliad mung na sinpraw maga de na, shanhte a sum ni hta nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bai, Gad a kashu kasha ni gaw, Saleka mung du hkra shanhte a tawtap e, Bashan mung hta e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoela gaw du rai nga ai; shi a lawu e Shahpam; Yanai, Bashan mung na Shahpat hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:13 shanhte a kawa a aru arat ni gaw, Mihkaela, Meshulam, Sheba, Yorai, Yahkan, Zia, Ebera hte, sanit ngu na, rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:14 Shanhte gaw, Guni, Abdiela, Ahi, Buza, Yado, Yeshishai" 
1Chronicles5:15 Mihkaela, Gilead, Yaroa, Huri, Abihala dap lakung ni rai nga ma ai: Guni gaw shanhte a du rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles5:16 Shanhte gaw Gilead mung, Bashan mung, Sharon ginwang lamu ga jarit du hkra, tinang a mare kahtawng ni hta nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:17 Shanhte a ahtik labau gawn ai laika gaw, Yuda a hkawhkam Yohtam hte Israela hkawhkam Yeroboam a lakhtak du hkra gawn da nga ai." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ya Rubin amyu, Gad amyu hte Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, n-gang lang ai hte nhtu hpye nna, ndan chye gap ai hte hpyen majan amu galaw ram ai nden ja ai wa-ngan mun mali hkying mali sanit tsa kru shi rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:19 Shanhte gaw Hagara amyu ngu ai, Yetura, Nahpisha, Nodab hte gasat ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:20 Shanhte gasat nga ma yang, Karai Kasang hpe hpyi jahtau let, shi hpe tawngban ai hte shi hta shamyet shanat nga ma ai majaw, shanhte karum ai lu la nna, Hagara masha ni hte shanhte hte rau rai nga ai yawng hte hpe rim la lu mu ai:" 
1Chronicles5:21 shanhte a yamnga hpung ni hpe mung, shanhte a gawla-uk mun manga, sagu bainam sen lahkawng mun manga hte, lawze hkying lahkawng, masha sen mi hpe mung, hkap rim la mu ai." 
1Chronicles5:22 Dai hpyen majan gaw Karai Kasang kaw na rai nga ai majaw, masha law law wa kataw si mat ma ai. Israela masha ni mung bawng dung ai aten du hkra, Hagara masha ni a shara e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:23 Bai Manashe amyu chyen mi gaw, dai mung hta e nga nga nna, Bashan mung kaw nna, Bala-hermon, Senira hte Hermon bum du hkra law htam wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:24 Shanhte a amyu dap ni hta baw rai nga ai ni gaw, Ehpera, Ishi Eliela, Azriela, Yeremia, Hodawia, Yadiela hte rai ma ai: shanhte gaw nden ja ai share ni hte tinang amyu dap ni a kajai gumhkawng ai baw ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:25 Rai timung, shanhte gaw tinang a kaji kawa ni a Karai Kasang hpe n madat nga ma ai rai nna, Karai Kasang gaw shanhte a man e shaza kau ai mung masha ni a hpara ni hte shut hpyit ai amu galaw nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles5:26 Dai rai nna Israela Karai Kasang gaw Asuri hkawhkam Pula hte Tilgat-pilnese yan a myit hpe sharawt ya wu ai rai nna, Tilgat-pilnese gaw Rubin amyu Gad amyu, Manashe amyu chyen mi hpe bawng rim wa nna, shanhte hpe dai ni du hkra, Hala, Habora, Hara hte Gozan hka kau e bawng dung shangun mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:1 Lewi a shadang sha ni gaw, Gershon, Kohat, Merari hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohat a shadang sha ni gaw, Amram, Izhara, Hebron, Uziela hte rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram a kashu kasha ni gaw, Arun, Mawshe, Miriam hte rai ma ai. Arun a shadang sha ni gaw, Nadab, Abihu, Eleaza, Ihtama hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleaza gaw Hpinehasa hpe shaprat wu ai; Hpinehasa gaw Abishua hpe shaprat wu ai: 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua gaw Buki, Buki gaw Uzi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi gaw Zerahia, Zerahia gaw Meraiot." 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot gaw Amaria; Amaria gaw Ahitob," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitob gaw Zadok; Zadok gaw Ahimaza; 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaza gaw Azaria, Azaria gaw Yohanan;" 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanan gaw, Yerusalem mare na Shawlumon galaw da ai nta hkinjawng amu galaw ai Azaria hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azria gaw Amaria, Amaria gaw Ahitob." 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitob gaw Zadok, Zadok gaw Shalum;" 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalum gaw Hilkia, Hilkia gaw Azaria:" 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria gaw Seraia, Seraia gaw Yehozadek hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehowa gaw Yuda hte Yerusalem masha ni hpe Nebuhkadneza a lata hte rim woi wa ai shaloi e Yehozadek mung bawng dung lawm nga ai. 
1Chronicles6:16 Lewi a shadang sha ni gaw, Gershom, Kohat, Merari hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:17 Da ndai gaw Gershom a shadang sha yan a amying rai nga ai: Libni hte Shime rai ma ai," 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohat a shadang sha ni gaw, Amram, Izhara, Hebron, Uziela hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari a shadang sha yan gaw Marali hte Mushi rai ma ai. Dai ndai gaw Lewi amyu a dap lakung ni rai nga ma ai: 
1Chronicles6:20 Gershom a dap ni: shi a kasha Libni a kasha Yahat, Yahat a kasha Zima;" 
1Chronicles6:21 Zima a kasha Yoa; Yoa a kasha Ido, Ido a kasha Zera, Zera a kasha Yeaterai hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Kohat a shadang sha ni gaw: shi a kasha Aminadab, Aminadab a kasha Kora; Kora a kasha Asira:" 
1Chronicles6:23 Asira a kasha Elkana. Elkana a kasha Ebiasap, Ebiasap a kasha Asira;" 
1Chronicles6:24 Asira kasha Tahat, Tahat a kasha Uriela, Uriela a kasha Uzia, Uzia a kasha Shawlu hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkana a shadang sha yan gaw, Amasai hte Ahimot rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:26 Elkana hte shi a kasha ni a ahtik labau gaw: Elkana a kasha Zohpai. Zohpai a kasha Nahat; 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahat a kasha Eliaba; Eliaba kasha Yeroham, Yeroham a kasha Elkana hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bai Samuela shadang sha yan gaw, kasha alat Yoela hte shi a kanau Abiya rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:29 Merari a shadang sha ni gaw, shi a kasha Mahali a kasha Libni, Libni a kasha Shime, Shime a kasha Uza." 
1Chronicles6:30 Uza a kasha Shimea, Shimea kasha Hagia, Hagia kasha Asaia rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles6:31 Sakse sumpu gaw Yehowa a nta hta sim nga sayang e, Yehowa a nta hta mahkawn mangoi woi na matu. Dawi san tawn da nna san da ai ni rai nga ma ai:" 
1Chronicles6:32 Shawlumon gaw Yerusalem mare hta e Yehowa a nta hpe gap da ai nhtoi du hkra, shanhte gaw shawa hpawng a sumpan nta man e mahkawn mangoi woi nga ma ai. Shanhte gaw tinang a ahpung abat hkan nna woi ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:33 Mahkawn mangoi woi ai ni hte, shanhte a kashu kasha ni gaw ndai ni rai nga ma ai: Kohat a kashu kasha ni hta mahkawn mangoi woi ai Heman rai nga ai: Heman gaw Yoela kasha, Yoela gaw Samuela kasha;" 
1Chronicles6:34 Samuela gaw Elkana a kasha; Elkana gaw Yeroham a kasha; Yeroham gaw Eliela a kasha; Eliela gaw Toa a kasha; 
1Chronicles6:35 Toa gaw Zup a kasha. Zup gaw Elkana a kasha; Elkana gaw Mahat a kasha, Mahat gaw Amasai a kasha;" 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasi gaw Elkana a kasha, Elkana gaw Yoela kasha, Yoela gaw Azaria kasha; Azaria gaw Zehpania a kasha; Zehpani gaw Tahat a kasha;" 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahat gaw Asira kasha; Asira gaw Ebiasap a kasha; Ebiasap gaw Kora a kasha; 
1Chronicles6:38 Kora gaw Izhara a kasha; Izhara gaw Kohat a kasha; Kohat gaw Lewi a kasha; Lewi gaw Israela a kasha rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles6:39 Bai Heman a kanau Asap gaw shi a hkra maga e tsap nga ai: Asap gaw Berehkia kasha; Berehkia gaw Shimea kasha; 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimea gaw Mihkaela kasha; Mihkaela gaw Basea kasha; Basea gaw Malhkiya kasha; 
1Chronicles6:41 Malhkiya gaw Etni kasha; Etni gaw Zera kasha; Zera gaw Adaia kasha; 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaia gaw Ehtan a kasha; Ehtan gaw Zimma kasha; Zimma gaw Shime kasha; 
1Chronicles6:43 Shime gaw Yahat a kasha; Yahat gaw Gershom a kasha; Gershom gaw Lewi a kasha rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles6:44 Pai maga de e shanhte a kanau ni Merari a kashu kasha ni rai nga ma ai; Ehtan gaw Kishi a kasha, Kishi gaw Abdi a kasha; Abdi gaw Maluk a kasha;" 
1Chronicles6:45 Maluk gaw Hashabia kasha; Hashabia gaw Amazia kasha; Amazia gaw Hilkia kasha, Hilkia gaw Amzia kasha;" 
1Chronicles6:46 Amzia gaw Bani a kasha Bani gaw Shemera kasha; 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemera gaw Mahali a kasha; Mahali gaw Mushi a kasha; Mushi gaw Merari a kasha; Merari gaw Lewi a kasha rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles6:48 Shanhte a kahpu kanau Lewi masha ni gaw, Karai Kasang a sumpan nta e, daw jau na amu mahkra a matu san da ai hkrum ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:49 Rai timung, Arun hte shi a shadang sha ni chyawm gaw, Karai Kasang a shangun ma Mawshe htet da mada hte maren, chyoi pra htum ai shara amu a nlang hte hte, Israela masha ni a lam htingrai htingrat ya na matu, wan nat hkungga nawng ai hkungri ntsa e mung, manam pyaw ai baw nat nawng ai hkungri ntsa e mung, nat nawng ma ai." 
1Chronicles6:50 Da ndai gaw Arun a shadang sha ni gaw: shi a kasha Eleaza; Eleaza a kasha Hpinehasa; Hpinehasa a kasha Abishua; 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua a kasha Buki; Buki a kasha Uzi; Uzi a kasha Zerahi; 
1Chronicles6:52 Zerahi a kasha Meraiot, Meraiot a kasha Amaria; Amaria a kasha Ahitob;" 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitob a kasha Zadok; Zadok a kasha Ahimaza rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles6:54 Da ndai gaw shanhte a lamu ga jarit na nga nga shara hte dabang ni rai nga malu ai: Arun a kasha Kohat a dap lakung ni a matu lata san tawn da ai lamu ga gaw: 
1Chronicles6:55 Yuda mung na Hebron mare hte de a ginwang ga shanhte hpe jaw mu ai: 
1Chronicles6:56 rai timung mare na yi hkauna ni hte grup yin na kahtawng ni hpe Yehpuna a kasha Hkaleb hpe jaw da mu ai. 
1Chronicles6:57 Bai shanhte gaw Arun a kashu kasha ni hpe shingbyi nga na mare ni ap ya mu ai: Hebron, Libna hte de a ginwang ga; Yatira, Eshtemoa hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:58 Hilen hte de a ginwang ga; Debira hte de a ginwang ga; 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashan hte de a ginwang ga; Bet-sheme hte de a ginwang ga; 
1Chronicles6:60 Ben-yamin amyu lamu ga hta na, Geba hte de a ginwang ga; Alemet hte de a ginwang ga; Anahtot hte de a ginwang ga rai malu ai; shing rai shanhte a dap lakung hkan nna, madu nga ai mare ni yawng, shi masum rai nga malu ai." 
1Chronicles6:61 Naw ngam nga ai Kohat a kashu kasha dap lakung ni hpe, Manashe amyu chyen mi a lamu ga hta na, mare shi hpe, hpaida da ai hte jaw da mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:62 Gershom kashu kasha lakung lama hkan nna, Yishahka amyu hta na, Ashe amyu hta na, Naphtali amyu hta na, Bashan mung na Manashe amyu hta na mare shi masum hte hpe jaw da mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:63 Bai Merari kashu kasha dap lakung ni hpe, hpai da hte, Rubin amyu hta na, Gad amyu hta na, Zebulun amyu hta na mare shi lahkawng hte hpe jaw da mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:64 Israela masha ni gaw dai mare ni hte de a ginwang ga ni hpe Lewi masha ni hpe jaw da mu ai. 
1Chronicles6:65 Dai hta kaga shanhte gaw, Yuda kashu kasha ni a amyu hta na, Simun kashu kasha ni a amyu hta na, Ben-yamin kashu kasha ni a amyu hta na, lahta de tsun da sai mare ni hpe, hpaida da ai hte jaw kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:66 Kohat a kashu kasha ni a dap lakung ni nkau mi gaw, Ehprim a lamu ga hta e san da ai mare ni hpe madu lu ma ai: shanhte gaw shingbyi nga na mare ni hpe ap ya mu ai:" 
1Chronicles6:67 Ehprim bum ga na Shehkem mare hte de a ginwang ga: Gezera mare hte de a ginwang ga; 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokmeam hte de a ginwang ga; Bet-horon hte de a ginwang ga; 
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyalon hte de a ginwang ga; Gat-rimon hte de a ginwang ga, rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles6:70 Naw ngam nga ai Kohat kashu kasha ni a lakung lama ni a matu, Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, Anera hte de a ginwang ga; Bileam hte de a ginwang ga ni hpe jaw da mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ya Gershom a kashu kasha ni gaw Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, Bashan mung na Golan hte de a ginwang ga; Ashtarat hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:72 bai, Yisahka amyu hta na, Kedesha hte de a ginwang ga; Daberat hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot hte de a ginwang ga; Anem hte de a ginwang ga; 
1Chronicles6:74 bai, Ashe amyu hta na, Mashala hte de a ginwang ga, Abdon hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok hte de a ginwang ga, Rehob hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:76 bai, Naphtali amyu hta na Galile mung na Kadesha hte de a ginwang ga, Hamon hte de a ginwang ga; Kiriahtim hte de a ginwang ga ni hpe, jaw mu ai." 
1Chronicles6:77 Naw ngam nga ai Merari a kashu kasha ni hpe mung, Zebulun amyu hta na, Rimo hte de a ginwang ga, Tabora hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:78 bai, Yerihko mare a sinpraw maga, Yawdan hka wora hkran na Rubin amyu hta na, nam maling na Bezera hte de a ginwang ga, Yaza hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot hte de a ginwang ga, Mehpat hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:80 bai, Gad a amyu hta na, Gilead mung na Ramot hte de a ginwang ga, Mahanim hte de a ginwang ga;" 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshbon hte de a ginwang ga, Yazera hte de a ginwang ga ni hpe jaw da mu ai." 
1Chronicles7:1 Bai Yisahka shadang sha ni gaw, Htola, Hpua, Yashub, Shimron, yawng marai mali rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:2 Htola a shadang sha ni gaw Uzi, Rehpaia, Yeriela, Yamai, Ibsam, Shemuela hte rai ma ai; dai ni gaw tinang adap lakung ni hta du rai nga ai hte, tinang a prat hta e nden ja ai share ni rai nga ma ai: shanhte gaw Dawi a aprat e mun lahkawng, hkying lahkawng kru tsa law nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi a shadang sha gaw, Izrahia; Izrahia shadang sha ni gaw, Mihkaela, Obadia, Yoela, Ishia; shanhte marai manga rai ma ai hte, yawng gaw masha kaba rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:4 Shanhte hta madu jan ni hte kasha ni law nga ma ai majaw, shanhte gaw kawa ni a dap lakung hkan nna, hpyen luksuk ni mun masum hkying kru rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:5 Yisahka dap lakung ni mahkra hta, shanhte a kahpu kanau ni ngu ai, nden ja ai share ni yawng hpe hti yu yang, marai mun matsat hkying sanit rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bai, Ben-yamin shadang sha ni gaw, Bela, Behkara, Yediela, marai masum rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela shadang sha ni gaw, Ezbon, Uzi, Uziela, Yerimot, Iri, marai manga rai ma ai: shanhte gaw kawa ni a dap lakung hkan nna, nden ja ai share ni hpe hti yu yang, mun lahkawng hkying lahkawng sumshi mali rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:8 Behkara a shadang sha ni gaw, Zemira, Yosha, Elieza, Elioni, Omri, Yeremot, Abiya, Anahtot, Alemet hte rai ma ai. Dai yawng Behkara a shadang sha ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:9 Shanhte gaw kawa ni a dap lakung hkan nna, du hkrai rai nga ai hte, nden ja ai share ni hpe hti yu yang, mun lahkawng, hkying lahkawng ni tsa rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediela kasha gaw, Bilhan rai nga ai. Bilhan a shadang sha ni gaw, Yesha, Ben-yamin, Ehud, Hkenana, Zehtan Tarshi, Ahishara hte rai nga ma ai;" 
1Chronicles7:11 dai ni yawng gaw tinang a kawa ni a dap lakung ni hkan nna, nden ja ai share ni hte hpyen majan luksuk ni hta lawm lu ai, Yediela a kashu kasha ni mun mi hkying sanit, ni tsa rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shanhte hta kaga Ira a kasha Shupim yan Hupim hte Ahera a kasha Hushim rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles7:13 Naphtali a shadang sha ni gaw, Yaziela, Guni, Yezera, Shalum hte rai ma ai: ndai ni gaw Bila a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manashe a shadang sha gaw, shi a lashi num Arami numsha shaprat ai Asriela rai nga ai; bai, shi gaw, Gilead kawa Mahkira hpe shaprat wu ai:" 
1Chronicles7:15 Mahkira gaw Hupim yan Shupim shayi sha la wu ai: shi a kanau a amying gaw Mahka rai lu ai: kanau kaga a amying gaw Zelohpa rai nga ai; Zelohpa gaw shayi sha shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles7:16 Mahkira madu jan Mahka gaw shadang sha shaprat wu ai rai nna, shi a amying hpe Pere shamying wu ai; shi a kanau a amying gaw Shere rai lu ai; shi a kasha yan gaw Ulam hte Rakem rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam a kasha Bedan rai nga ai. Dai ni gaw Manashe a kashu Mahkira a kasha Gilead a amyu matu ni rai nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles7:18 Shi a kajan Molehket gaw Ishod, Abieze, Mala hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida a shadang sha ni gaw, Ahian, Shehkem, Lihki, Aniam hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ehprim a shadang sha gaw Shuhtela; Shuhtela a kasha gaw Bered; Bered a kasha Tahat, Tahat a kasha Eleada, Eleada a kasha Tahat," 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahat a kasha Zabad, Zabad a kasha Shuhtela rai ma ai: dai hta kaga Ehprim a kasha Ezera hte Elead yan gaw, dai mung e shangai wa ai Gat a masha ni a yamnga ni hpe kashun la mu ai majaw, sat kau ai hkrum ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:22 Shan a kawa Ehprim gaw, nhtoi na na wa shan a lam yawn hkyen nga ai rai nna, kahpu kanau ni gaw shi hpe shalan shabran na, sa du ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:23 Dai hpang shi gaw madu jan kaw shang nna, shi na-um nasin hkum nga wa ai hte shadang sha shangai wu ai: shi a nta masha ni ruyak hkrum nga ma ai majaw, dai ma hpe Beria ngu nna shamying wu ai." 
1Chronicles7:24 Shi a shayi sha gaw, Shera rai lu ai; shi gaw lawu lahta Bet-horon hte Uzen-shera de da wu ai." 
1Chronicles7:25 Bai, shi a kasha Rehpa yan Reshep; Reshep a kasha Tela; Tela a kasha Tahan;" 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahan a kasha Ladan; Ladan a kasha Amihud; Amihud a kasha Elishama; Elishama a kasha Nun; 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun a kasha Yawshu rai nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles7:28 Shanhte a lamu ga jarit hte shanhte madu nga ai shara ni gaw, Betela hte de a kahtawng ni; sinpraw maga na Naran hte, sinna maga na Gezera hte de a kahtawng ni; Shehkem hte de a kahtawng ni kaw nna, Aza hte de a kahtawng ni du hkra." 
1Chronicles7:29 Manashe lamu ga jarit makau na Bet-shean hte de a kahtawng ni; Tanak hte de a kahtawng ni; Megido hte de a kahtawng ni; Dora hte de a kahtawng ni rai nga malu ai. Dai shara ni hta Israela a kasha Yawsep a kashu kasha ni nga nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles7:30 Ashe a shadang sha ni gaw, Imna, Ijiswa, Yiswi, Beria hte shanhte a kajan Sera hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria shadang sha gaw Hebera yan Malhkiela rai ma ai; Malhkiela gaw Birza-it a kawa rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebera gaw, Yaplet, Shome, Hohtam hte shanhte a kajan Shua hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yaplet a shadang sha ni gaw, Pasak, Bimhala, Ashwat hte rai ma ai. Dai ni gaw Yaplet a kashu kasha ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:34 Sheme a shadang sha ni gaw, Ahi, Roga, Yehuba, Aram hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:35 Shi a kanau Helem a shadang sha ni gaw, Zohpa, Yimna, Shele, Amala hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zohpa a shadang sha ni gaw, Sua, Harnehpe, Shuala, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezera, Hoda, Shama, Shilsha, Ihtran, Bera hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:38 Yehtera shadang sha ni gaw, Yehpuna, Pispa, Ara hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ula a shadang sha ni gaw, Ara, Haniela, Rizia hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles7:40 Dai ni yawng gaw, kawa ni a dap lakung hta san da ai nden ja ai share ni hte du kaba ni rai nga ma ai; shanhte gaw Ashe a kashu kasha ni hkrai rai nga ma ai. Shanhte a labau hkan nna jahpan laika hta ka da ai, hpyen gasat ram ai ni gaw, mun lahkawng hkying kru rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ben-yamin gaw shi a kasha alat Bela, lahkawng ngu na Ashbela, masum ngu na Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 mali ngu na Noha, manga ngu na Rahpa hte hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela a shadang sha ni gaw, Adara, Gera, Abihu," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naman, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shehpuhpan, Huram hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:6 Dai ni gaw Ehuda shadang sha ni rai nga ma ai: shanhte gaw Geba shara na tinang kawa ni a nta na agyi ni rai nga nna, shanhte hpe Manahat du hkra bawng woi wa mu ai:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naman, Ahiya hte Gera gaw shanhte hpe bawng woi wa mu ai rai nna, Gera gaw Uza yan Ahihu hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shanhte hpe dat dat mu ai hpang Shaharim gaw Moba mung hta e kasha shaprat wu ai; Hushim hte Bara gaw shi a madu jan yan rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles8:9 Bai shi gaw shi a madu jan Hodesha hta, Yobaba, Zibia, Mesha, Malhkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeuza, Shahkia, Mirma hte hpe shaprat wu ai. Dai ni gaw shi a shadang sha ni, tinang a kawa a dap agyi ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:11 Shawng num Hushim hta Abitu yan Elpala hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpala a shadang sha ni gaw, Ebera, Misham, Sheme hte rai ma ai; Sheme gaw Ono hte Loda mare hte de a mare ni hpe de da wu ai;" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria hte Shema, Gat masha ni hpe jahtaw kau ai, Aiyalon masha ni a kawa dap ni a agyi ni rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles8:14 dai hta kaga, Ahio, Shashak, Yeremot," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadia, Arad, Edera," 
1Chronicles8:16 Beria kasha ni Mihkaela, Ishpa, Yoha," 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadia, Meshulam. Hizki, Hebera," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishmerai, Izlia, Yobab, Elpala a kasha ni," 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakim, Zihkri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Zilehtai, Eliela," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaia, Beraia, Shimrat hte gaw Shimei a kasha ni rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishpan, Ebera, Eliela," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zihkri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanani, Elam, Anhtohiya;" 
1Chronicles8:25 Ipdia, Penuela hte gaw Shashak a kasha ni rai nga ma ai;" 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamsherai, Shehari, Ahtalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yeroham a kasha ni Yareshi, Elia, Zihkri hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:28 Dai ni gaw Yerusalem mare e nga nga nna, prat mi hte prat mi tinang a kawa ni a dap lakung ni hta agyi rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:29 Gibeon a shara hta e Abi-gibeon nga nga ai; shi a madu jan a amying Mahka rai lu ai; 
1Chronicles8:30 shi a kasha alat gaw Abdon; shi a kanau ni, Zura, Kisha, Bla, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedora, Ahio, Zehkera hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:32 Miklot gaw Shimea hpe shaprat wu ai. Shanhte mung Yerusalem mare e tinang baw sang ni hte rau, kahpu kanau ni a tawtap e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:33 Bai Nira gaw Kisha hpe shaprat wu ai; Kisha gaw Shawlu hpe shaprat wu ai; Shawlu gaw Yonahtan, Mahkishua, Abinadab, Eshbala hte hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonahtan a kasha Meribala rai nga ai; Meribala gaw Mihka hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mihka a shadang sha ni gaw, Pihton, Melek, Tarea, Ahaza hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaza gaw Yehoada, Yehoada gaw Alemet, Azmawet hte Zimri hpe shaprat wu ai; Zimri gaw Moza hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza gaw Binea hpe shaprat wu ai; Binea kasha Rahpa; Rahpa a kasha Eleasa; Elesa a kasha Azela. 
1Chronicles8:38 Azela gaw shadang sha kru lu ai rai nna shanhte a amying ni, Azrikam, Bokeru, Ishmaela, Sheria, Obadia, Hanan rai nga malu ai." 
1Chronicles8:39 Dai ni yawng Azela kasha ni rai ma ai. Shi a kanau Eshek a shadang sha ni gaw, kasha alat Ulam, lahkawng ngu na Yeusha, masum ngu na Elihpelet rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulam a shadang sha ni gaw nden ja ai share ni hte, ndan chye gap ai ni rai nga nna, kashu kasha marai latsa e manga shi law nga ma ai. Dai ni nlang hte gaw Ben-yamin a kashu kasha ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:1 Shing rai Israela masha ni yawng amyu mi hte amyu mi ka da nga masai; yu mu, shanhte gaw Israela hkawhkam ni a ahtik labau laika hta ka da nga ma ai: Yuda amyu gaw tinang a yubak mara majaw Babelon mung de bawng woi wa ai hkrum ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:2 Shanhte a mare ni hte madu lu ai lamu ga hta shawng nga ai ni gaw, Israela masha ni, hkinjawng ni, Lewi masha ni hte Nehtinim ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:3 Yerusalem mare hta e, Yuda kashu kasha ni, Ben-yamin a kashu kasha ni, Ehprim hte Manashe a kashu kasha ni ngu ai," 
1Chronicles9:4 Amihu a kasha Uhtai; Amihu gaw Omri a kasha, Omri gaw Imri a kasha, Imri gaw Bani a kasha, Bani gaw Yuda a kasha Hparet a aru arat rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:5 Shilon masha ni hta na, kasha alat Asaia hte shi a kashu kasha ni lawm ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:6 Zera a kashu kasha ni hta na, Yeuela hte shi a kanau ni, marai kru tsa jahku shi rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ben-yamin a shadang sha ni gaw, Meshulam a kasha Salu; Meshulam gaw Hodawia kasha, Hodawia gaw Hasenua kasha rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:8 bai, Yeroham a kasha Ibnea; Uzi a kasha Ela; Uzia gaw Mihkri a kasha; bai, Shehpatia kasha Meshulam; Shehpatia gaw Reuela a kasha, Reuela gaw Ibniya a kasha rai nga ai:" 
1Chronicles9:9 shanhte a kahpu kanau ni yawng amyu mi hte amyu mi, jahku tsa e manga shi kru rai nga ma ai. Dai ni yawng gaw tinang a kawa ni a dap lakung ni hta amyu agyi ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:10 Hkinjawng ni hta na Yedaia, Yehoiarib, Yahkin hte rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles9:11 bai, Hilkia kasha Azaria; Hilkia gaw Meshulam a kasha, Meshulam gaw Zadok a kasha, Zadok gaw Meraiot a kasha; Meraiot gaw Karai Kasang a Nta up ai Ahitub a kasha rai nga ai:" 
1Chronicles9:12 bai Yeroham a kasha Adaia; Yeroham gaw Pashura kasha, Pashura gaw Malhkiya a kasha; Malhkiya gaw Masai a kasha; Masai gaw Adiela kasha; Adiela gaw Yazera a kasha; Yazera gaw Meshulam a kasha; Meshulam gaw Meshilemit a kasha, Meshilemit Imera kasha rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles9:13 tinang a kawa ni a dap lakung ni a agyi ngu ai kahpu kanau ni gaw, hkying mi sanit tsa kru shi rai ma ai; shanhte gaw Karai Kasang a nta na daw jau na amu matu grai chye galaw ai ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:14 Bai, Lewi masha ni hta na, Hashuba kasha Shemaia; Hashuba gaw Azrikam a kasha; Azrikam gaw Hashabia kasha; dai ni gaw Merari a kashu kasha ni rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles9:15 bai, Bakbara, Heresha, Galala hte Mihka a kasha Matania; Mihka gaw Zihkri a kasha; Zihkri gaw Asap a kasha rai ma ai:" 
1Chronicles9:16 bai, Shemai a kasha Obadia; Shemai gaw Galala kasha; Galala gaw Yeduhtun a kasha; bai, Asa a kasha Berehkia; Asa gaw Netohpa kahtawng ni hta nga ai Elkana a kasha rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:17 Bai, chyinghka sin ai ni gaw, Shalum, Akub, Talmon, Ahiman hte kahpu kanau ni rai nga ma ai: Shalum gaw agyi rai nga ai:" 
1Chronicles9:18 Shanhte gaw ya du hkra, sinpraw maga na hkawhkam chyinghka sin ai ni rai nga ma ai: Lewi a kashu kasha ni a dap na chyinghka sin ai ni shanhte rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:19 Korah a dap Ebiasap a kashu, Kore a kasha Shalum hte shi a kahpu kanau Korah masha ni gaw, dai daw jau ai amu hpe bau sin na matu sumpan nta chyinghka hkinbawng hpe sin nga ma ai: shanhte a kaji kawa ni mung Yehowa a dap chyinghka lam hpe sin nga ai ni tai wa masai." 
1Chronicles9:20 Eleaza a kasha Hpineha gaw moi shawng e shanhte a ntsa e up nga ai. Yehowa shi hte rau nga u ga. 
1Chronicles9:21 Bai Meshelemia kasha Zehkaria gaw, shawa hpawng a sum chyinghka hpe sin nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:22 Chyinghka hkinbawng hpe sin na matu san da ai ni yawng hte gaw ni tsa shi lahkawng rai ma ai. Shanhte gaw kahtawng mi hte kahtawng mi hta tinang a ahtik labau hkan nna, Dawi hte myihtoi Samuela aya dang da ai ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:23 Shing rai shanhte hte shanhte a kashu kasha ni gaw ladaw tawn da ai hte maren, Yehowa a nta ngu ai sumpan nta a chyinghka lam hpe sin nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:24 Chyinghka sin ai ni gaw, sinpraw, sinna, dingdung, dingda, man mali sin nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:25 Kahtawng ni hta nga ai shanhte a kahpu kanau ni gaw, shanhte hpe sa tau na matu, nhtoi ladaw sanit ya shagu sa du ma ai:" 
1Chronicles9:26 Kaning rai nme law, Lewi masha rai nga ai, chyinghka sin na aya lu ai agyi marai mali gaw, Karai Kasang nta na sutdek hte gawk kaga ni hpe sin na matu, tut tut anga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:27 Shanhte gaw Karai kasang a nta grup yin e nga nga ma ai: dai hpe sin na matu shanhte a amu rai malu ai: jahpawt shagu chyinghka hpaw na, shanhte a amu mung rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bai, shanhte hta na nkau mi gaw daw jau yang lang ai gawm ni hpe sin nga ma ai; kaning rai nme law, jashawn yang mung, shapraw yang mung, dai ni langai hte langai hpe hti yu ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:29 Bai nkau mi hpe gaw chyoi pra ai shara hte seng ai ku ni hte gawm ni mahkra hpe mung, mani ai shadung, tsabyi jahku, namman, lawban hte manam pyaw ai baw ni hpe lajang na matu san da mu ai." 
1Chronicles9:30 Bai, hkinjawng kasha ni nkau mi gaw, manam pyaw ai baw sau ni hpe hpaw chye ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:31 Korah dap na, Shalum a kasha alat, Lewi masha, Matihtia gaw hpri pa hta kabaw ai muk pa ni hpe yu lajang na ahkang lu nga ai." 
1Chronicles9:32 Shanhte a kahpu kanau ni, Kohat a kashu kasha ni nkau mi gaw, madun dan ai muk ni hpe laban nhtoi shagu lajang nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:33 Dai ni gaw Mahkawn mangoi woi ai, Lewi a dap lakung a agyi ni hte, wang gawk ni hta nga nga let, amu kaga hte lawt ai ni rai nga ma ai: shanhte gaw shani shagu tinang hte seng ai amu ni hpe gun hpai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:34 Dai ni gaw Lewi a dap lakung ni a agyi ni hte, prat mi hte prat mi, woi awn ai ni rai nga ma ai: shanhte gaw Yerusalem mare hta e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:35 Gibeon shara hta e Gibeon a kawa Yeiela nga nga ai; shi a madu jan amying Mahka rai lu ai: 
1Chronicles9:36 Shi a kasha alat gaw, Abdon; shi a kanau ni Zura, Kisha, Bala, Nera, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedora, Ahio, Zehkaria, Miklot hte rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklot gaw Shimeam hpe shaprat wu ai. Shanhte mung, Yerusalem mare e tinang baw sang ni hte rau, kahpu kanau ni a tawtap e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:39 Bai Nera gaw Kisha hpe shaprat wu ai; Kisha gaw Shawlu hpe shaprat wu ai; Shawlu gaw Yonahtan Mahkishua, Abinadab, Eshbala hte hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonahtan a kasha Meribala rai nga ai; Meribala gaw Mihka hpe shaprat wu ai. 
1Chronicles9:41 Mihka a shadang sha ni gaw, Pihton, Melek, Tarea, Ahaza hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaza gaw Yara hpe, Yara gaw Alemet, Azmawet, Zimri hte hpe shaprat wu ai; Zimri gaw Moza hpe shaprat wu ai;" 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza gaw Binea hpe shaprat wu ai; Binea kasha Rehpaia, Rehpaia kasha Eleasa, Eleasa a kasha Azela rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azela gaw shadang sha kru lu ai rai nna, shanhte a mying ni, Azrikam, Bohkeru, Ishmaela, Sheria, Obadia, Hanan rai nga malu ai: dai ni gaw Azela a kasha ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles10:1 Ya Hpilisti masha ni Israela masha ni hpe gasat mu ai: Israela masha ni mahtang masha hpyen ni a man e hprawng nna Gilaboa bum ga hkan e hkala nba hkrum ai hte si shajang ma ai. 
1Chronicles10:2 Hpilisti masha ni mung Shawlu hte shi a kasha ni hpe htep lahti hkan shachyut nna, Shawlu a kasha Yonahtan, Abinadab hte Mahkishua hte hpe sat kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles10:3 Shing rai dai gasat gala ai gaw, Shawlu a matu jin nga ai rai nna, ndan gap ai ni shi hpe dep mu ai: dai ndan pala gap ai ni a majaw shi myit ru nga ai." 
1Chronicles10:4 Dai rai nna Shawlu gaw shi a ri nhtu gun hpai ai wa hpe, “Ndai matu n gadoi ai ni gaw ngai e n sa galun lu nna, ngai e n roi lu ma ai du hkra, na nhtu shaw nna ngai e galun ya e,” ngu wu timung, dai wa gaw grai hkrit nga ai majaw, n hkraw nga ai. Dai rai nna Shawlu gaw shi a nhtu dai la nna dai hta abraw ju si wu ai." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ri nhtu lang ai wa mung, Shawlu si mat sai hpe mu jang, shi gaw shi a nhtu hta abraw ju si wu ai." 
1Chronicles10:6 Shing rai Shawlu hte shi a kasha masum si mat masai; shi a nta masha ni yawng, rau si wa masai." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ya, Israela masha ni hprawng mat ma ai hte, Shawlu mung, shi a kasha ni mung si mat ma ai gaw dai kadit e nga ai Israela masha ni mu mu yang, shanhte gaw tinang a mare kahtawng ni hpe kau da ma ai rai nna, Hpilisti masha ni sa de nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles10:8 Hpang jahpawt e Hpilisti masha ni, si mang ni hta na lanep hpyu la na nga, du sa wa ma yang, Shawlu hte shi a kasha ni Gilaboa bum ga e si taw nga ai hpe mu ma ai." 
1Chronicles10:9 Shanhte shi a arai ni hpe hpyu la ai hte, shi a baw hte shi a hpyen palawng la wa nhtawm, shanhte a Hpara sumla hkan e mung, masha ni a man e mung, kajai gumhkawng na matu, Hpilisti mung grup yin hkan e shagun dat mu ai." 
1Chronicles10:10 Shi a hpyen palawng hpe tinang a Hpara ni a nta e tawn da mu ai; shi a baw hpe Dagon a nta e noi da mu ai. 
1Chronicles10:11 Hpilisti masha ni Shawlu hpe shing di ai lam Yabesha-gilead masha ni yawng na ma yang," 
1Chronicles10:12 share ni mahkra rawt nna, Shawlu hte shi a kasha ni a moi mang ni hpe la nna, Yabesha mare de hpai wa nhtawm, Yabesha wamyi hpun npu e lup makoi kau nna, sanit ya tup lusha gam nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles10:13 Shing rai Shawlu gaw Yehowa a ga hpe n madat ai hte, Yehowa hpe shut hpyit kau ai majaw mung, Yehowa hpe n san yu ai sha, nat shung ai num hpe tam san yu ai majaw mung si ai hkrum wu ai." 
1Chronicles10:14 Dai re ai majaw Yehowa gaw shi hpe sat kau nhtawm, Yese a kasha Dawi hpe dai mungdan ap ya kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:1 Shaloi Israela masha ni yawng, Hebron mare de Dawi kaw sa du nna, Yu u, anhte gaw na a nrut nra, na a hkum shan rai nga ga ai." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mani ma ni Shawlu anhte a hkawhkam naw rai nga yang pyi, nang hkum nan Israela amyu hpe woi pru woi shang ai wa, rai nga nit dai: na a Karai Kasang Yehowa mung, Nang gaw nye a amyu Israela hpe woi rem na wa mung, nye a amyu Israela ntsa e du magam mung, tai lu na rin dai, ngu nna nang madu hpe tsun nit dai, ngu mu ai." 
1Chronicles11:3 Shing rai, Israela agyi salang ni yawng, Hebron mare de Hkawhkam wa kaw sa du nna, Dawi gaw Hebron mare hta e, Yehowa a man e shanhte hte ga shaka tawn da nhtawm, shanhte gaw, Samuela a n-gup hta Yehowa tsun da ai hte maren, Israela hkawhkam tai na matu, Dawi hpe namman chya ya mu ai." 
1Chronicles11:4 Bai Dawi hte Israela amyu ting, Yebu ngu ai, Yerusalem de lung wa ma ai: dai mung na kashu kasha ni ngu ai, Yebusi masha ni gaw, dai yang e nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles11:5 Yebu mare masha ni chyawm gaw, Nang gaw nang e shang lu na ndai n rai, ngu nna Dawi hpe tsun mu timung, Dawi gaw Ziun ngu ai hpyen dap hpe gasat la wu ai; dai gaw Dawi a mare ngu ai, rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles11:6 Bai Dawi gaw, Yebusi masha ni hpe shawng dep gasat lu ai wa, agyi hte hpyen du tai na ra ai, nga nna tsun ai majaw, Zeruia kasha Yoab gaw shawng lung wa nna, agyi tai wa sai," 
1Chronicles11:7 Dai hpang Dawi gaw dai hpyen dap hta a nga nga ai; dai re ai majaw dai mare hpe Dawi a mare ngu nna shamying mu ai. 
1Chronicles11:8 Dai hta kaga shi gaw, dai mare hpe Milo shara kaw nna grup yin du hkra de da wu ai: Yoab gaw dai mare a kaga daw mi hpe lajang wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dawi chyawm gaw grau nna galu kaba jat wa nga ai; kaning rai nme law, Zaw nawng Zaw wa up ai Yehowa gaw shi hte rau rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles11:10 Da ndai gaw, Dawi hte rau nga ai nden ja ai share ni a agyi ni rai nga ma ai: Yehowa gaw Israela amyu a lam tsun wu ai hte maren, shanhte gaw Israela amyu masha ni mahkra hte rau Dawi hpe hkawhkam aya dang na matu, shi hpang maga e, dai mungdan hta, n-gun dat ai ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles11:11 Da ndai gaw Dawi hte rau nga ai nden ja ai share ni a jahpan rai nga ai: Hakmoni amyu Yashobeam gaw hpyen du ni a du rai nga ai: shi gaw ri lang let, marai masum tsa hpe lang lata gasat nna, sat kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles11:12 Shi a hpang e, Ahohi masha Dodo a kasha Eliaza gaw, n-gun ja ai share masum hta lawm nga ai." 
1Chronicles11:13 Shi gaw Dawi hte rau Pasdamin shara e nga nga ai rai nna, dai shara e nga ai muk-yaw mam hkaibang lawk hta hpyen gasat na matu Hpilisti masha ni hpawng nga ma ai; mung masha ni gaw Hpilisti masha ni a majaw hprawng mat wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles11:14 Shanhte chyawm gaw hkaibang lawk ka-ang e tsap let hkap gasat nga nna Hpilisti masha ni hpe sat kau mu ai: Yehowa gaw padang ninglaw kaba hte shanhte hpe hkye hkrang la mu ai. 
1Chronicles11:15 Lang mi gaw agyi sumshi hta na marai masum Dawi nga ai lunghkrung hkan na Adulam ginlawng hku kata de shang ma ai: Hpilisti luksuk ni gaw Rehpim kadit e dap jung nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles11:16 Dawi gaw dai shaloi e dai hpyen dap hta nga nga nna, Hpilisti sin langa ni gaw Betlehem mare kata de nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawi gaw, “Marai langai ngai Betlehem chyinghka makau na hka htung ntsin ngai e lu shangun mi le,” nga nna marit ai myit hte tsun wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:18 shaloi dai marai masum Hpilisti dap de htim bang nna, Betlehem chyinghka makau na ntsin ja la nhtawm, Dawi hpang de la wa mu ai: rai timung, Dawi gaw n lu hkraw ai sha Yehowa man e ru kau let," 
1Chronicles11:19 “Ndai ntsin ngai lu na gaw nye a Karai Kasang hkum u ga; tinang asak hpe nawng kau ai ni a asai ngai lu na kun? shanhte gaja wa tinang asak nawng kau ai hte ndai ntsin la wa ma ai,” nga nna n lu hkraw ai. Shing rai dai share masum galaw ma ai." 
1Chronicles11:20 Bai Yoab a kanau Abshai gaw share kaba masum a agyi rai nga ai: shi gaw ri lang let masha masum tsa hte hpe gasat nna, sat kau mu ai majaw dai marai masum hta shi lawm nga ai." 
1Chronicles11:21 Dai marai masum hta na, shi gaw marai lahkawng hta arawng grau lu nna, shan a agyi tai wa ai: rai timung, shi gaw shawng na marai masum a lahkam n dep wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:22 Bai Kabzela shara na, nden ja ai myit hte magam amu kaba shachyen chye ai Yehoiada a kasha Benaia gaw, rai nga ai: shi gaw Moba masha Ariela a shadang sha yan hpe sat kau wu ai: dai hta kaga shi gaw nshung ta e lungpu ka-ang de shang nhtawm, hkanghkyi langai mi hpe sat kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:23 Hkum shing-yan dawng manga tsaw ai Egutu masha langai mi hpe mung shi sat kau wu ai: dai Egutu masha a lata hta dahkaw daram kaba ai ri numdu lang nga timung, Benaia gaw dawhkrawng sha lang let, sa wa nna, Egutu masha a lata na ri kashum la nhtawm, dai ri hte shi hpe sat kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:24 Dai amu hte hpe Yehoiada kasha Benaia galaw wu ai rai nna, share masum ngu na hta shi a amying mung lawm nga ai." 
1Chronicles11:25 Yu u, shi gaw share sumshi hta arawng grau lu timung, shawng na marai masum a lahkam n dep wu ai: Dawi gaw shi a sin langa ni a ntsa e shi hpe bu shatai wu ai." 
1Chronicles11:26 Bai luksuk laba ni a share ni gaw: Yoab a kanau Asahela; Betlehem masha Dodo a kasha Elhanan; 
1Chronicles11:27 Haro masha Shamot; Pelo masha Heleza; 
1Chronicles11:28 Teko masha Ikesha a kasha Ira; Anahtot masha Abieza; 
1Chronicles11:29 Hushat masha Sibehkai; Aho masha Ilai; 
1Chronicles11:30 Netohpa masha Maharai; Netohpa masha Bana a kasha Heled; 
1Chronicles11:31 Ben-yamin amyu Gibea shara na Ribai a kasha Ihtai; Pirat masha Benaia; 
1Chronicles11:32 Gasha hkaraw na Hurai; Arba masha Abiela; 
1Chronicles11:33 Baharu masha Azmawet; Shalabo masha Eliaba; 
1Chronicles11:34 Gizon masha Hashem a kasha ni; Hara masha Shage a kasha Yonahtan; 
1Chronicles11:35 Hara masha Sahkara kasha Ahiam; Ura kasha Elihpala; 
1Chronicles11:36 Mehkera masha Hehpera, Pelo masha Ahiya;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hkarmela masha Hezro: Ezbai a kasha Narai; 
1Chronicles11:38 Nahtan a kanau Yoela; Hagri a kasha Mibhara: 
1Chronicles11:39 Amon masha Zelek; Zeruia kasha Yoab a ri nhtu gun hpai ai wa Berot masha Naharai; 
1Chronicles11:40 Ihtri masha Ira; Ihtri masha Gareb; 
1Chronicles11:41 Hiti masha Urai; Alai a kasha Zabad; 
1Chronicles11:42 Rubin du amyu hta na Rubin masha Shiza a kasha Adina hte, shi hte rau nga ai marai sumshi;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Mahka a kasha Hanan, Mitni masha Yoshahpat;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Ashtera masha Uzia; Arori masha Hohtam a kasha Shama yan Yiela; 
1Chronicles11:45 Shimri a kasha Yediela hte shi a kanau Tizi masha Yoha; 
1Chronicles11:46 Mahawi masha Eliela; Elnam a kasha Yeribai yan Yoshawi; 
1Chronicles11:47 Moba masha Itma hte hpawn Eliela. Obed, Mezoba masha Yesiela hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Dawi gaw Kisha a kasha Shawlu hpe hprawng makoi nna, Zikla mare e naw nga nga yang, shi kaw sa shingbyi ai ni gaw da ndai hte rai ma ai: shanhte gaw hpyen majan hta shi hpe karum ai nden ja ai share ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:2 Shanhte gaw ndan lang nna, lakli hte nlung nwat kabai timung, ndan pala gap yang mung, pai hkra lata ma ai n rai: dai ni gaw Ben-yamin amyu hta na Shawlu a kahpu kanau ni rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:3 Agyi wa gaw Ahizera; shi hpang na ni. Gibea masha Shema a kasha Yosha; Azmawet a kasha Yezela yan Pelet; Berahka. Anahtot masha Yehu; 
1Chronicles12:4 dai marai sumshi hta lawm nna, shanhte a ntsa e rai nga ai, nden ja ai share Gibeon masha Ishmaia; Jeremia, Yahazela, Yohanan. Gedera masha Yozabad;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Yerimot, Bealia, Shemari, Haruk masha Shehpatia;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana, Ishia, Azarela, Yozera, Yashobeam, Kora masha ni," 
1Chronicles12:7 Yoela hte Gedora masha Yehoram a kasha Zebadia hte rai ma ai. 
1Chronicles12:8 Bai Dawi nga ai nam mali na hpyen dap ni hta, hprawng shingbyi nga ai, nden ja ai share ni, hpyen majan amu chye galaw nna, ri n-gang chye lang ai Gad masha ni mung lawm ma ai: shanhte a myi man gaw hkanghkyi myi man hte bung nna, bum lang ga hkan na tsu aya zawn gat laram chye ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezera gaw agyi rai nga ai; lahkawng ngu na Obadia; masum ngu na Eliaba; 
1Chronicles12:10 mali ngu na Mishman; manga ngu na Yeremia; 
1Chronicles12:11 kru ngu na Atai; sanit ngu na Eliela; 
1Chronicles12:12 matsat ngu na Yohanan; Jahku ngu na Elazaba; 
1Chronicles12:13 shi ngu na Yeremia; shi langai ngu na, Makbanai, rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ya tsun ai Dan masha ni gaw luksuk bu ni rai nga ma ai: Grau kaji ai wa gaw marai latsa hpe, grau kaba ai gaw marai hkying mi dang lu ai." 
1Chronicles12:15 Shanhte gaw Yawdan hka tung ai aten, shawng na ta hta rap sa nna, pa ga na sinpraw sinna e nga ai masha ni hpe jahtaw kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bai, Dawi nga ai hpyen dap ni de, Ben-yamin hte Yuda kashu kasha ni mung sa shingbyi ma ai rai nna," 
1Chronicles12:17 Dawi gaw shanhte hpe tau la na nga pru sa wa let, “Ngai hpe shingtau na matu nanhte ngwipyaw ai hte du sa myit dai rai yang gaw, nye a myit nanhte a myit hte makyit na li ai: shing n rai, nye hpyen ni a lata de ngai hpe ap kau na matu nanhte sa du ai rai yang, nye a lata hta hpa mara n kap ai majaw, ji wa a Karai Kasang dai hpe yu yu nna, daru kau u ga,” ngu nna shanhte hpe hkap tsun mu ai." 
1Chronicles12:18 Shaloi marai sumshi a agyi Amasai a ntsa e Wenyi dung nga nna, Dawi e, na a masha ni anhte rai nga ga ai; Yese a kasha e, nang hpang maga anhte lawm nga ga ai. Na a Karai Kasang nang hpe Karum ai majaw, “Nang hta ngwi ngwipyaw pyaw rai nga u ga law; Nang hpe karum ai ni mung ngwipyaw nga mu ga law,” ngu nna htan wu yang, Dawi shanhte hpe hkap hkalum la nhtawm, luksuk ni a bu aya dang da mu ai." 
1Chronicles12:19 Dawi gaw Hpilisti masha ni hte rau Shawlu hpe gasat na nga sa wa nga yang, Manashe masha nkau mi mung, shi hpang de hprawng shingbyi ma ai: rai timung, Hpilisti masha ni hpe karum mu ai n rai: kaning rai nme law, Hpilisti du ni gaw, Anhte hpe sat kau na matu, shi gaw shi a madu Shawlu hpang de kayin mat na ra ai, nga nna bawng nhtawm, shi hpe shabai kau dat mu ai" 
1Chronicles12:20 Shing rai Dawi gaw Zikla mare de sa wa yang, shi kaw hkan nang ai Manashe masha ni gaw Adna, Yozabad, Yediela, Mihkaela, Yozabad, Elihu, Zilihtai hte rai ma ai: dai ni gaw Manashe amyu na hkying hkying up ai bu ni rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:21 Shanhte gaw nden ja ai share ni hte, hpyen luksuk du ni rai nga nna, damya hpung ni hpe gasat na matu, Dawi hpe karum mu ai." 
1Chronicles12:22 Shing rai Karai Kasang a wunawng wuwa zawn law ai luksuk daram du hkra. Dawi hpe karum na matu, lani hte lani masha ru bang wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:23 Da ndai hte gaw, Yehowa mungga hte maren, Shawlu a mungdan, Dawi a lata de ap ya na nga, Hebron mare de shi kaw sa du ai, hpyen majan galaw na matu ri nhtu lang ai agyi ni a nambat rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles12:24 Yuda amyu hta na n-gang hte ri lang ai hpyen masha hkying kru e matsat tsa; 
1Chronicles12:25 Simun amyu hta na hpyen shang ram ai nden ja ai wa-ngan ni, hkying sanit e latsa;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Lewi kashu kasha ni hta na, hkying mali e kru tsa hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:27 Arun dap na agyi gaw Yehoiada rai nga nna, shi hte rau marai hkying masum e sanit tsa lawm ma ai;" 
1Chronicles12:28 bai, nden ja ai wa-ngan Zadok hte shi kawa a dap na hpyen du hkun lahkawng mung lawm ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:29 Shawlu a kahpu kanau Ben-yamin masha ni hta na marai hkying masum sha lawm ma ai: kaning rai nme law, dai aten du hkra shanhte law malaw gaw Shawlu nta hta naw manoi nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ehprim a kashu kasha ni hta na, tinang a kaji kawa ni a dap hta kajai gumhkawng ai nden ja ai wa-ngan ni mun lahkawng e matsat tsa;" 
1Chronicles12:31 Dawi hpe hkawhkam dang na nga, jahpan hta lawm ai Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na mun me hkying matsat hte lawm ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:32 Bai, Israela masha ni, dai aten e mai galaw na lam chye dawdan ai Yisahka kashu kasha ni hta na, agyi ni tsa mung lawm nna, shanhte a kahpu kanau ni yawng, shanhte a ga madat mara nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:33 Myit mashe n rawng nna, hpyen hking arai amyu myu hte hpyen majan lam chye shachyen nna, hpyen luksuk ni hte rau pru sa wa lu ai, Zebulun amyu hta na wa-ngan mun manga mung lawm ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:34 Naphtali amyu hta na hpyen du hkying mi, n-gang hte ri lang ai hpyen masha mun masum hkying sanit;" 
1Chronicles12:35 Hpyen majan chye galaw ai Dan amyu hta na mun lahkawng hkying matsat e kru tsa; 
1Chronicles12:36 hpyen majan chye galaw nna luksuk ni hte rau pru wa lu ai Ashe amyu hta na mun mali; 
1Chronicles12:37 Yawdan hka wora hkran na Rubin, Gad hte Manashe amyu chyen mi hta na, hpyen gasat na matu hpyen hking amyu myu lang ai marai sen me mun lahkawng lawm ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:38 Shanhte nlang hpyen majan chye galaw nna, Dawi hpe Israela hkawhkam aya dang na nga, myit langai sha hte Hebron mare de sa wa ma ai: naw ngam nga ai Israela amyu yawng hte mung, myit langai sha hte Dawi hpe hkawhkam aya dang na maw ma ai." 
1Chronicles12:39 Shanhte gaw masum ya tup dai yang e Dawi hte rau lusha let nga nga ma ai: kaning rai nme law, shanhte a kahpu kanau ni hkyen tawn ngut manu ai." 
1Chronicles12:40 Dai hta kaga grup yin htingbu manang ni mung, Yisahka, Zebulun, Naphtali tsan ai ginwang kaw nna, shanhte gaw gumra, gawla-uk, lawze, utang ni hta, lusha, ngu ai muk hte muk shadung, lakum si dik apye, tsabyi si sumbaw, tsabyi jahku, tsanlun sau ni htaw sa ma ai: sagu dumsu law law mung gawt sa ma ai: kaning rai nme law, Israela amyu hta kabu gara rai nga ai." 
1Chronicles13:1 Bai Dawi gaw, agyi ni ngu ai, hpyen masha hkying mi up ai, latsa up ai bu ni yawng hte hte bawng nna, shi gaw Israela shawa hpawng hpe," 
1Chronicles13:2 “Nanhte ra ai hte, anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa mung hkraw a yang gaw, hkinjawng ni hte Lewi masha ni de nga ai mare ni hte de a ginwang ni hta naw ngam nga ai Israela mungdan shara shagu hkan na anhte a hpunau ni gaw anhte hte rau zuphpawng nga na matu, shaga la gaw;" 
1Chronicles13:3 shing rai, anhte a Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpe anhte bai hpai la ga: Shawlu a prat e dai sumpu a man e anhte san yu ga ga ai nrai,” nga nna tsun ai ga hpe," 
1Chronicles13:4 shawa masha ni na ra mu ai rai nna, dai lam mung masha ni a man e htuk nga malu ai majaw, shing rai galaw na lam yin la ma ai." 
1Chronicles13:5 Shing rai Dawi gaw Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpe, Kiriat-yearim mare na hpai la na nga, Egutu mung na Shihora hka shi kaw nna, Hamat lamu ga jarit du hkra nga ai Israela amyu masha yawng hte hpe jahpawng la nhtawm," 
1Chronicles13:6 Hkerubim lapran e dung ai, Yehowa amying nsang hte seng ai, Karai Kasang Yehowa sakse sumpu hpe hpai la na matu, Dawi hte Israela masha ni yawng, Yuda mung na, Kiriat-yearim ngu ai Bala mare de lung wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ya shanhte gaw Karai Kasang a sumpu hpe Abinadab a nta na shapraw nhtawm, leng nnan a ntsa e mara mu ai: Uza yan Ahia gaw leng gau ma ai." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawi hte Israela masha ni yawng, mahkawn mangoi na matu, tingse, doria, chying, shupsheng hte pahtau lang let, n-gun lagaw mahkra hte Karai Kasang a man e dum nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles13:9 Shing rai shanhte gaw Hkidon a mam chyarang de du ai shaloi, usu ni kadawng ai majaw, sakse sumpu hpe jum shadang na matu, Uza lata ladawn nna jum wu ai." 
1Chronicles13:10 Shing rai sakse sumpu hpe jum ai majaw, Yehowa gaw Uza hpe masin pawt nna, dai yang e shi hpe ari jaw ai hte, shi Karai Kasang a man e si wa sai." 
1Chronicles13:11 Yehowa gaw Uza hpe anu sat kau ai majaw Dawi myit n pyaw nga ai rai nna, dai shara hpe ya du mateng Pere-Uza ngu nna shamying wu ai." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dawi gaw dai shani hta Karai Kasang hpe hkrit nna, ngai gaw Karai Kasang a sumpu hpe kaning rai hpai wa lu na kun, nga nna tsun let," 
1Chronicles13:13 shi a shara Dawi mare de sumpu hpe n hpai wa ai sha, Giti masha Obed-edom a nta de hpai koi mat wa ai." 
1Chronicles13:14 Shing rai Karai Kasang a sumpu gaw Obed-edom a nta masha ni hte rau, shi a nta hta shata masum tup rai nga ai: Yehowa mung Obed-edom a nta hte shi lu malu mahkra hpe shaman ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:1 Bai Turu hkawhkam Hiram gaw, Dawi a matu hkaw gap mu ga nga, kasa ni hte rau arit hpun, wut gaw ai ni hte laksama ni hpe shangun dat mu ai." 
1Chronicles14:2 Shing rai Yehowa gaw, shi hkum nan hpe Israela mungdan hta dang shagrin da nga ai gaw, Dawi nan chye da wu ai: kaning rai nme law, dai mungdan gaw, Israela amyu a jaw e shatsaw shagrau da ai hkrum nga ai." 
1Chronicles14:3 Bai Dawi gaw Yerusalem mare hta num bai la jat nna, shayi shadang sha hte hpe shaprat wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ya Yerusalem e shaprat ai, Dawi a kashu kasha ni a amying gaw, Shamua, Shoba, Nahtan, Shawlumon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhara, Elishua, Elpelet" 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nehpeg, Yahpia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beliada, Elipelet hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ya Dawi gaw Israela amyu ting a ntsa e hkawhkam tai na matu namman chya hkam ai lam, ai lam, Hpilisti masha ni na ma yang shanhte nlang Dawi hpe tam sa wa nga ma ai: Dawi mung dai lam na nna, shanhte hpe hkap gasat na pru sa wa ai." 
1Chronicles14:9 Hpilisti masha ni chyawm gaw Rehpim kadit e hpya lu hpya sha nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles14:10 Shaloi Dawi gaw, “Ngai Hpilisti masha ni hpe hkap gasat lu na kun? nang shanhte hpe na a lata hta ap ya na n ni?” ngu nna Karai Kasang hpe san wu yang, Yehowa gaw,” Lung wa su, ngai shanhte hpe na a lata hta ap ya na de ai,” ngu wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:11 Shing rai shanhte gaw Bala-perazim de lung nna, Dawi gaw shanhte hpe dai shara e hkap sat kau mu ai: Dawi mung, Karai Kasang gaw nye a lata hte, mawru ru ai zawn, nye a hpyen ni hpe agrawp kau wu ai, nga nna dai shara hpe Bala-perazim shamying wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:12 Shanhte gaw dai shara e tinang a hpara ni hpe kau da ma ai rai nna, dai ni hpe nat kau na, Dawi hkang da wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bai Hpilisti masha ni gaw, dai kadit e hpya lu hpya sha let, nga nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawi mung Karai Kasang hpe bai san wu ai rai nna, Karai Kasang gaw, “Nang shanhte nga ai de hkan lung lu na n rai; shanhte hpe koi kau nna, labri shalawng tawtap hku lung htim su;" 
1Chronicles14:15 Iabri hpun ni a ndung e hpyen hkawm sharat ai na ai shaloi, hpyen gasat na htim u: Hpilisti luksuk ni hpe gasat na nga, Karai Kasang gaw na a shawng e pru wa sai,” ngu nna shi hpe tsun wu ai." 
1Chronicles14:16 Karai Kasang hkang da ai hte maren Dawi galaw wu ai rai nna, Gibeon shara kaw nna, Gezera du hkra Hpilisti luksuk ni hpe hkan shaza kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles14:17 Shing rai Dawi a kajai gumhkawng ai lam mung shagu hta dan hkung wa nna, amyu shagu shi hpe hkrit mu ga nga, Yehowa shabyin wu ai." 
1Chronicles15:1 Dai hpang Dawi gaw, Dawi mare hta shi a matu nta shachyaw da wu ai; Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu matu mung shara mazing da nna sum gap wu ai." 
1Chronicles15:2 Shaloi Dawi gaw, “Lewi masha ni hta kaga, Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpe kadai mung mai hpai na n rai: Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpe hpai na hte, shi a man e tutnawng daw jau na matu, Yehowa shanhte hpe lata la mu ai,” nga ai." 
1Chronicles15:3 Dai rai nna Dawi gaw, shi mazing da ai shara de, Yehowa sakse sumpu hpe hpai tawn na nga, Israela amyu ting hpe, Yerusalem mare e jahpawng la mu ai." 
1Chronicles15:4 Bai Dawi gaw, Arun a kashu kasha ni hte Lewi masha ni hpe mung jahpawng la mu ai:" 
1Chronicles15:5 Kohat a kashu kasha ni hta na, Uriela agyi rai nga nna shi kahpu kanau ni latsa e hkun rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:6 Merari a kashu kasha ni hta na, Asaia agyi rai nga nna, shi a kahpu kanau ni ni tsa e hkun rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershom a kashu kasha ni hta na, Yoela agyi rai nga nna shi a kahpu kanau ni latsa e sumshi rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:8 Elizahpan a kashu kasha ni hta na, Shemia agyi rai nga nna, shi a kahpu kanau ni ni tsa rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebron a kashu kasha ni hta na, Eliela agyi rai nga nna shi a kahpu kanau ni matsat shi rai ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:10 Uziela kashu kasha ni hta na, Aminadab agyi rai nga nna, shi a kahpu kanau ni latsa e shi lahkawng rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:11 Bai Dawi gaw hkinjawng Zadok yan Abiahta hpe, Lewi masha ngu ai, Uriela, Asaia, Yoela, Shemia, Eliela Aminadab hte hpe shaga la nna," 
1Chronicles15:12 shanhte hpe, “Nanhte nan Lewi kaji kawa ni a dap na agyi ni rai nga myit dai, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa a sakse sumpu hpe, ngai mazing da ai shara de hpai la na matu, nanhte hte nanhte a kahpu kanau ni tinang hkun shachyoi shapra mu." 
1Chronicles15:13 Shawng de lang mi nanhte n hpai nna, tara hte maren shi hpe n tam ai majaw, anhte a Karai Kasang Yehowa anhte hpe ari jaw mi ai,” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
1Chronicles15:14 Shing rai, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa a sakse sumpu hpe hpai shalun na matu, hkinjawng ni hte Lewi masha ni tinang hkum hpe shachyoi shapra ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:15 Yehowa htet da ai ga hkan nna, Mawshe hkang da ai hte maren, Lewi kashu kasha ni gaw Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpe kandang hte tinang a lahpa hta hpai mu ai." 
1Chronicles15:16 Bai, kabu gara myit hte nsen sharawt garu let, sumpyi, doria, tingse shupsheng dum nna, mahkawn mangoi chye ai Lewi kahpu kanau ni hta na lata san da na lam, Dawi gaw Lewi agyi salang ni hpe hkang da mu ai." 
1Chronicles15:17 Shing rai Lewi agyi ni gaw, Yoela kasha Heman hte shi a kanau ni hta na Berehkia kasha Asap; shanhte a kahpu kanau Merari a kashu kasha ni hta na Kushaia kasha Ehtan hte hpe mung;" 
1Chronicles15:18 shanhte a lawu na kahpu kanau ni, Zehkaria, Ben, Yaziela, Shemiramot, Yehiela, Uni, Eliaba, Benaia, Masia, Matihtia, Elihpelehu, Miknea hte hpe mung san da mu ai: chyinghka sin ai yan Obed-Edom hte Yeiela rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:19 Shing rai mahkawn mangoi woi ai Heman, Asap, Ehtan hte gaw magri shupsheng dum shangoi ma ai;" 
1Chronicles15:20 bai, Aramut tingse dum ai ni gaw, Zehkaria, Aziela, Shemiramot, Yehiela, Uni, Eliaba, Masia, Benaia hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:21 Nsen hkum ai Sheminit tingse dum ai ni gaw, Matahtia, Elihpelehu, Miknea, Obed-edom, Yeiela, Azazia hte rai ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:22 Lewi masha ni a agyi Hkenani gaw mahkawn mangoi lam woi nga ai: shi gaw dai baw hpaji rawng ai majaw, mahkawn mangoi lam sharin ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berehkia hte Elkana gaw, sakse sumpu a chyinghka sin ai yan rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:24 Bai, hkinjawng Shebania, Yoshahpat, Nehtanela, Amasai, Zehkaria, Benaia, Elieze hte gaw, Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu man e pahtau dum ma ai: Obed- edom hte Yehia gaw sakse sumpu a chyinghka sin ai yan rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:25 Shing rai Dawi, Israela agyi salang ni hte hpyen hkying mi up ai bu ni gaw, Obed-edom a nta na Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu hpe kabu gara myit hte hpai la na nga, sa wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ya Karai Kasang gaw, Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu hpai la ai Lewi masha ni hpe karum mu ai majaw, shanhte gaw usu sanit, sagu la sanit nawng ya mu ai." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawi mung, sakse sumpu hpai ai ni mung, mahkawn mangoi ai ni hte mahkawn mangoi woi ai agyi Hkenania mung, hpraw tu ai lachyit sumpan lawai nga ma ai. dai hta kaga Dawi gaw lachyit hpahkai lawng kahtap hpun da wu ai." 
1Chronicles15:28 Shing rai Israela masha ni yawng, garu jahtau nna, pahke, pahtau, shupsheng dum ai hte, tingse, doria hpe shangoi let, Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu hpe hpai wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ya Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu Dawi mare hta shang wa yang, Shawlu a shayi sha Mihkala gaw hkuwawt hku hkap yu nna, Dawi ka let tingse dum nna wa ai hpe mu wu jang, shi hpe hkyet yu rung wu ai." 
1Chronicles16:1 Shing rai shanhte gaw Karai Kasang a sakse sumpu hpai la nna, Dawi mazing da ai sum ka-ang e tawn da nhtawm, wan nat hkungga hte mahku hkungga Karai Kasang a man e nawng ya mu ai." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ya Dawi gaw wan nat hkungga hte mahku hkungga nawng ya ngut jang, mung masha ni hpe Yehowa a mying nsang hte shaman ya mu ai." 
1Chronicles16:3 Bai shi gaw Israela masha lasha numsha shagu hpe muk tawng mi, shan tau mi hte tsabyi si pa pa karan jaw mu ai." 
1Chronicles16:4 Bai, Yehowa a sakse sumpu a man e daw jau na hte, Israela Karai Kasang Yehowa a chyeju dum nna, shi hpe shakawn kungdawn na matu, Dawi gaw Lewi masha nkau mi hpe san da mu ai:" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asap gaw agyi rai nga ai; shi a lawu e nga nna, tingse hte doria dum ai ni gaw, Zehkaria, Yeiela, Shemiramot, Yehiela, Matihtia, Eliaba, Benaia, Obed-edom, Yeiela hte rai ma ai; Asap gaw ngoi garu ai shupsheng dum nga ai;" 
1Chronicles16:6 bai hkinjawng Benaia hte Yahaziela gaw Karai Kasang a ga shaka sumpu man e tutnawng pahtau dum nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles16:7 Dai shani e Dawi gaw, Asap hte shi a kahpu kanau ni a n-gup e Yehowa a chyeju hpe shakawn kungdawn ai lam nnan tawn da wu ai." 
1Chronicles16:8 Yehowa a chyeju hpe shakawn mu, Shi a amying nsang hpe shaga mu: Shi a amu bungli amyu baw ni hpe tsun dan mu." 
1Chronicles16:9 Shi hpe mahkawn mu, shi hpe mangoi mu, Shi a mauhpa amu nlang hte hkai dan mu." 
1Chronicles16:10 Shi a chyoi pra ai amying hta kabu gumrawng nga mu: Yehowa hpe tam ai ni amyit masin kabu nga malu ga. 
1Chronicles16:11 Yehowa hte shi a n-gun atsam hpe tam san mu; Shi a myi man hpe tutnawng e hkan tam mu. 
1Chronicles16:12 Shi a mayam Israela a aru arat hte e, Shi lata la ai Yaku a kashu kasha ni e," 
1Chronicles16:13 Shi galaw dan sai lamik kumla bungli hte, Shi a mauhpa magam, shi a n-gup na pru ai tara hpe, adum nga mu." 
1Chronicles16:14 Shi Yehowa gaw anhte a Karai Kasang rai nga ai: Ga ting hta e shi a tara dara ai ga, pru nga ai." 
1Chronicles16:15 Abraham hte tawn da nga nna, Isak hpe dagam shagrin da ai ga shaka ngu ai," 
1Chronicles16:16 Prat hkying mi a matu hkang da ai mungga hpe, Prat dingnawng e adum nga mu." 
1Chronicles16:17 “Hkanan mung hpe na a sali wunli jarit matu, Ngai nang hpe jaw na nngai,” nga ai ga gaw," 
1Chronicles16:18 Yaku hte ga madat shi tawn da nna, Israela hta prat dingsa na ga shaka shatai nu ai." 
1Chronicles16:19 Nanhte hpe hti yu na mi garai n ra, Amyu kaji naw rai nga nna, dai mung e shingbyi nga ma yang," 
1Chronicles16:20 Amyu mi hta na amyu mi de, Mung mi kaw nna mung mi de, htawt hkawm ma ai shaloi e," 
1Chronicles16:21 Shanhte hpe zingri na shi n hkraw nga ai rai nna, Shanhte a majaw hkawhkam hpe pyi ari jaw nu ai." 
1Chronicles16:22 “Nye a namman chya ai ni hpe hkum hkra myit, Nye a myihtoi ni hpe hkum shatsang myit,” nga nna shi tsun nga ai." 
1Chronicles16:23 Aga ting Yehowa hpe mahkawn mangoi mu, Shi a hkye hkrang la ai lam hpe lani hte lani hkai dan mu." 
1Chronicles16:24 Masha amyu ni hpe shi a hpung shingkang, Amyu baw shagu hpe shi a mauhpa amu gawn dan mu." 
1Chronicles16:25 Yehowa gaw galu kaba nga ai rai nna, Nachying shakawn ging ai wa rai nga ai: Hpara mahkra ni hta mung shi hpe grau hkrit mai nga ai." 
1Chronicles16:26 Amyu baw ni a hpara ni, sumla hkrai rai nga ma ai; Yehowa chyawm gaw sumsing lamu hpe hpan da nu ai." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ndaw nsa hte hpung shingkang shi a man e nga nga ai, Atsam hte reng htum ai shi a shara e nga nga ai." 
1Chronicles16:28 Masha amyu dap ni e, anhte a Yehowa hpe, Rai sa, Yehowa hpe hpung shingkang hte atsam yin la mu." 
1Chronicles16:29 Yehowa a mying ningsang hpe hpung shingkang yin la mu; Lusha hkungga lang let shi a man de shang mu: Chyoi pra ai hpe mawn sumli nna, Yehowa hpe nawku mu." 
1Chronicles16:30 Mung shagu shi a man e hkrit gari nga mu ga; Gaja wa mungkan ga hpe shi tawn da nna, dai gaw shamu shamawt nga ai, n rai." 
1Chronicles16:31 Sumsing lamu kabu gara nga nna, gingding aga garu jahtau na ra ai; “Yehowa gaw Hkawhkam rai nga ai,” ngu nna masha amyu ni hpe tsun dan mu." 
1Chronicles16:32 Nammukdara hte dai hta rawng marawng, nsen kaba hte kashaw nga mu ga: Pa hte dai yang na nga manga kabu awng nga mu ga:" 
1Chronicles16:33 Shaloi maling na hpun yawng hte, Yehowa man e awng sharawng nga na mara ai; Kaning rai nme law, Lamu ga hpe tara dara na shi du ra ai." 
1Chronicles16:34 Yehowa gaw mai kaja nga ai majaw, chyeju dum mu; Shi a chyeju htani htana e anga nga ai." 
1Chronicles16:35 Nanhte gaw, Anhte hpe hkye hkrang la ai Karai Kasang e, anhte hpe hkye hkrang la mi. Na a chyoi pra ai amying hpe shakawn kungdawn nna, Nang hpe shakawn ai hta nlaw nga lu hkra, Masha amyu ni hta na anhte hpe shinggyin la nna, mawai la mi law, ngu nna tsun mu." 
1Chronicles16:36 Israela a Karai Kasang Yehowa gaw, Htani htana prat dingsa e a nga u ga law. Shaloi shawa masha ni yawng, Amen, ngu nna, Yehowa hpe shakawn kungdawn mu ai." 
1Chronicles16:37 Shing rai shi gaw, Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu man e shani shagu tutnawng daw jau na matu, Asap hte shi a kahpu kanau ni hpe mung," 
1Chronicles16:38 Obed-edom hte shi a kahpu kanau kru shi matsat hte hpe mung; chyinghka sin na matu Yeduhtun hte Hosa a kasha Obed-edom hpe mung, ga shaka sumpu man e san da mu ai;" 
1Chronicles16:39 Bai, wan nat hkungga nawng ai tawn hkungri ntsa e shani shagu jahpawt hte shana e Yehowa hpe wan nat hkungga nawng ya na matu, Gibeon a tsaw ai kawng ntsa na," 
1Chronicles16:40 Yehowa a sumpan sum man e, hkinjawng Zadok hte shi a kahpu kanau ni hpe tawn da mu ai: dai gaw, Israela masha ni hpe hkang da ai hte, Yehowa a tara hta ka da nga ai hte maren rai nga ai:" 
1Chronicles16:41 bai, Yehowa a n-gaw nwai myit htani htana agrin nga ai majaw, shi a chyeju hpe mahkawn mangoi na matu, Heman hte Yeduhtun hpe mung, Jahpan hta amying lawm ai ni hpe mung, shanhte hte rau san da mu ai:" 
1Chronicles16:42 shing rai Heman yan Yeduhtun gaw Karai Kasang hpe mahkawn mangoi na matu, pahke hte shupsheng aja awa dum shangoi ma ai: Yeduhtun a kasha ni gaw chyinghka sin nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles16:43 Shing rai shawa masha ni langai hte langai tinang a nta de wa mat ma ai: Dawi mung shi a nta hpe shaman ya na matu, bai wa ai." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ya Dawi gaw shi a hkaw e ban sa nga yang, shi gaw myihtoi Nahtan hpe, “Yu u, ngai wa gaw marau hpun nta hta rawng nga ni ai; Yehowa a ga shaka sumpu chyawm gaw sumpan sum npu e rawng nga ai,” ngu wu ai." 
1Chronicles17:2 Shaloi Nahtan gaw, “Nang myit lu ai hte maren galaw u; Karai Kasang nang hte rau rai nga ai,” ngu nna Dawi hpe htan wu ai." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ya dai shana e pyi Karai Kasang a mungga Nahtan kaw du pru nna," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Nye a shangun ma Dawi hpe sa tsun su; Yehowa ning nga ai, Nang nye a matu shanu nga na nta galaw lu na n rai:" 
1Chronicles17:5 Kaning rai nme law, Israela amyu hpe woi lung wa ai shani kaw nna, dai ni du hkra, hpunpyen nta hta ngai n rawng ai sha, sum langai hte langai hta mung, htawt rawng nga ni ai." 
1Chronicles17:6 Israela amyu ting hte ngai myu hpe bau rem na Israela tara agyi langai ngai hpe, Nanhte gaw nye a matu marau hpun nta, hpa majaw n galaw myit ta? ngu nna ga hkaw mi tsun yu n ni?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Dai re ai majaw nye a shangun ma Dawi hpe ning ngu u; Zaw nawng zaw wa up ai Yehowa ning nga ai. Nang gaw nye a amyu Israela ntsa e du tai na matu, nang sagu naw rem nga kaw nna, sagu lawng hta na ngai nang hpe lata la sade ai:" 
1Chronicles17:8 nang hkawm sa wa ai lam shagu hta ngai nang hte rau rai nga nna, nang hpe hpyen ai ni yawng hpe na a man e ngai seng kau nhtawm, ga ntsa na dan hkung ai amying rawng ai ni a amying zawn, ngai na a amying hpe mung shatai ya na de ai." 
1Chronicles17:9 Bai, ngai gaw nye a amyu Israela matu nga shara tawn da nna, shanhte gaw tinang a shara hta nga nga lu ai hte, htawm hpang e nhtawt wa lu hkra, ngai shanhte hpe shangang da na mawe ai: n hkru n hkra re ai masha ni mung, moi shawng e zawn," 
1Chronicles17:10 bai, nye a amyu Israela a ntsa e ngai tawn da ai tara agyi ni a aprat e zawn, shanhte hpe shamyit kau lu na n rai; nang hpe hpyen ai ni mahkra hpe, ngai shadip kau na nme ai. Dai hta n-ga, Yehowa na a matu nta gap da na ra ai, ngu nna ngai nang hpe tsun dan de ai." 
1Chronicles17:11 Shing rai nang aprat htum nna, na nji nwa ni kaw wa mat lu jang, na nsha ni hta na langai mi hpe ngai shagrau da nna, shi a mungdan hpe shagrin da na nngai." 
1Chronicles17:12 Shi gaw nye a matu nta galaw na ra ai; shi a tingnyang prat dingsa e ngai shagrin da na we ai. 
1Chronicles17:13 Ngai gaw shi a kawa tai nna, shi gaw nye a kasha rai na ra ai; na a shawng e nga ai wa kaw na, nye a n-gaw nwai myit ngai dawm la ai zawn, shi hta na ngai dawm la na n rai:" 
1Chronicles17:14 ngai gaw shi hpe nye a nta, nye a mungdan hta, tutnawng shagrin da nna, shi magam tingnyang gaw htani htana dinggrin anga nga na ra ai,” ngu wu ai." 
1Chronicles17:15 Shing rai Nahtan gaw ndai ga mahkra hte, ndai shingran ga mahkra Dawi e htawn tsun ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles17:16 Shaloi Dawi hkawhkam gaw nhku kata de shang nna Yehowa man e dung let, “Karai Kasang Yehowa e, nang ngai hpe ndai hte wa shagrau da ai gaw, ngai hpa hkaw ai wa rai ta? nye a nta dap mung hpa rai nga a ta?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Dai gaw Karai Kasang e, na a man e amu kaji naw rai nga ai: rai timung, Karai Kasang Yehowa e, na mayam a nta hta htawm hpang e byin na ra ai lam ni, nang tsun dan nna, ngai hpe hpung rawng ai wa zawn nawn da n hka!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Nang gaw, na a mayam Dawi hpe madun dan ai arawng sadang lam, ngai nang hpe hpa naw tsun lu na rai nga a ta? nang gaw na a mayam wa hpe chye nga ndai." 
1Chronicles17:19 Yehowa e, ndai amu kaba mahkra hpe madu dan nga u ga, na a mayam wa matu mara mung, nang myit ra ai hte maren, ndai amu kaba mahkra hpe nang shabyin nu ai." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yehowa e, anhte na lu ai mahkra hte maren, nang hte bung ai mi n nga ai, nang hta kaga Karai Kasang shaje n nga ai." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ga ntsa ting hta e, na a amyu Israela hte kadai bung nga a ta? Karai Kasang gaw shi a matu amyu shatai nna, mauhpa hte hkrithpa amu galaw let, amying nsang kaba shadan dan u ga nga, Egutu mung na nang woi lung wa ai, na amyu a man na tsasam amyu ni hpe shaden kau mu ai." 
1Chronicles17:22 Kaning rai nme law, nang gaw na a amyu Israela hpe htani htana prat dingsa na a amyu shatai nna, nang gaw Yehowa e, shanhte a Karai Kasang tai nit dai;" 
1Chronicles17:23 Ya chyawm gaw Yehowa e, nang gaw na a mayam wa hte shi a nta masha ni a lam nang tsun ai ga tutnawng grin wa u ga; nang tsun ai hte maren shadik ya mi." 
1Chronicles17:24 Zaw nawng zaw wa up ai Yehowa gaw Israela Karai Kasang rai nga ai; rai sa, Israela amyu a matu Karai Kasang rai nga ai, nga nna, htani htana e na amying nsang hpe shagrin da ai hte shagrau ai hkrum u ga law; na a mayam Dawi a amyu matu mung, na a man e tutnawng agrin nga ai," 
1Chronicles17:25 Kaning rai nme law, nye a Karai Kasang e, nang gaw nye a amyu matu shagrin da na lam, na a mayam wa hpe madun dan nit dai majaw, na a mayam wa, na a man e akyu hpyi na wam nga ai." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ya chyawm gaw Yehowa e, nang Karai Kasang rai nga nna, na a mayam wa hpe ndai mai kaja ai lam shaka da nit dai:" 
1Chronicles17:27 na a mayam wa a amyu matu ni na a man e prat dingsa grin nga lu hkra, na a mayam wa a nta hpe nang shaman ya nit dai: kaning rai nme law, nang Yehowa shaman ya nit dai majaw, dai gaw prat dingsa chyeju shaman ai hkrum nga ai,” ngu nna hpyi wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:1 Dai hpang Dawi gaw Hpilisti masha ni hpe gasat dang kau nna, Gat hte de a kahtawng ni hpe Hpilisti masha ni a lata na kashun la mu ai." 
1Chronicles18:2 Moba masha ni hpe mung shi gasat dang kau nna, shanhte gaw Dawi a mayam tai let, hkanse bang ma ai." 
1Chronicles18:3 Bai Dawi gaw Uhprat hka ginwang e shi a mungdan sa shagrin da yang, Zoba hkawhkam Hadareze hpe Hamat du hkra hkan gasat wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dawi gaw dai wa a hpyen leng hkying mi, gumra jawn ai masha hkying sanit, lagaw hkawm ai hpyen masha mun lahkawng rim la nhtawm. hpyan leng latsa a matu gumra ngam da nna hpyen leng gumra gale mahkra hpe lahkap dan kau ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ya Damasku mare na Suri masha ni gaw Zoba hkawhkam Hadareze hpe sa karum yang Dawi gaw Suri masha mun lahkwng e hkying lahkawng sat kau wu ai. 
1Chronicles18:6 Shaloi Dawi gaw Suri mung na Damasku mare hta sin langa tawn da wu ai rai nna, Suri masha ni gaw Dawi a mayam tai nna, hkanse jaw mu ai. Dawi sa wa ai lam shagu hta Yehowa makawp maga nga ai." 
1Chronicles18:7 Hadareze a mayam ni lang ai ja n-gang ni hpe Dawi kashun la nna Yerusalem mare de la wa ma ai. 
1Chronicles18:8 Dai hta kaga Dawi gaw Hadareze a mare Tibhat hte Hkun kaw na magri law law kashun la wu ai: Shawlumon gaw dai magri hte magri hka lawng, shadaw ni hte magri arai ni hpe galaw wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ya Dawi gaw Zoba hkawhkam Hadareze a hpyen luksuk ni mahkra hpe dang kau lu ai lam, Hamat hkawhkam Tau na wu yang," 
1Chronicles18:10 shi gaw hkawhkam Dawi hpe hkap shachyen na hte shaman ya na matu, shi a kasha Hadoram hpe shangun dat wu ai: kaning rai nme law, Hadareze mung tau hte hpyen majan rai nga ai; Hadareze mung tau hpe ya sha gasat sat di wu ai; Hadora gaw aja, gumhpraw, magri arai amyu myu hpe la sa wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:11 Hkawhkam Dawi gaw dai arai ni hpe mung, Edom, Moba, Ammon a kashu kasha ni, Hpilisti hte Amalek masha ni kaw na lahkawn wa ai aja gumhpraw hte rau Yehowa hpe nawng ya wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:12 Dai hta n-ga Zeruia kasha Abishai gaw Jum Kadit e Edom masha mun me hkying matsat sat kau wu ai. 
1Chronicles18:13 Edom mung hta e, shi sin langa tawn da nna, Edom masha ni mahkra gaw Dawi a mayam ni tai nga ma ai. Yehowa mung Dawi a hkawm mahkawm hta shi hpe makawp maga da wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:14 Shing rai Dawi gaw Israela mungdan ting hpe up nna, shi a mung masha ni mahkra hpe tara dara ai hte dinghpring ai hku jeyang wu ai." 
1Chronicles18:15 Zeruia kasha Yoab gaw shi a jaubu kaba rai nga ai; Ahiluda kasha Yahosahpat gaw labau ka da ai wa rai nga ai. 
1Chronicles18:16 Ahitob a kasha Zadok yan Abiahta a kasha Abimelek, hkinjawng rai nga ma ai; Shawsha gaw, kunhting chyare rai nga ai;" 
1Chronicles18:17 Yehoiada kasha Benaia gaw Hkrehte yan Pelehti ni hpe up nga ai: Dawi a kasha ni gaw Hkawhkam a hkringmang ni rai nga ma ai. 
1Chronicles19:1 Dai hpang Ammon a kashu kasha ni a hkawhkam Nahat gaw si mat nna, shi a kasha, kawa a malai hkaw dung nga ai." 
1Chronicles19:2 Shaloi Dawi gaw, Hanun a kawa Nahat ngai hpe chyeju madun ai majaw, “Ngai mung Hanun hpe chyeju htang na we ai,” nga nna kawa a yawn hta na shi hpe shalan shabran na nga, kasa shangun dat wu ai. Dawi a ali ama ni mung Ammon a kashu kasha ni a mung hta, Hanun hpe shalan shabran na matu, shi kaw du ma ai." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ammon a kashu kasha ni a agyi salang ni chyawm gaw Hanun hpe, “Nang kaw shalan shabran ai masha sa du ai gaw, Dawi na a kawa hpe hkungga lara ai zawn, nawn da wu ni? Ndai mungdan hpe sawk yu nna, kin-yu yu ai hte hpya kau na matu, shi a shangun ma ni nang kaw sa du ai, n rai nga a ni?” ngu nna tsun mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:4 Dai rai nna Hanun gaw Dawi a shangun ma ni hpe rim la nna, mun shangun kau ya ai hte, dangbau du hkra shanhte a hpun palawng rep di kau ya nhtawm, dat dat mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ya shanhte hpa hkrum ai lam, masha nkau mi Dawi hpe sa shana ya mu ai. Shanhte kaya kahpa kaba hkrum ai majaw, Dawi gaw shangun ma dat dat nna, hkawhkam wa gaw shanhte hpe, “Nanhte a nmun garai n galu dingsa, Yerihko mare e naw nga ga nna, dai hpang e she wa marit,” ngu dat mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ammon a kashu kasha ni gaw Dawi a man e matsat shabat rai nga ai lam, shanhte dum chye la jang, Hanun hte Ammon a kashu kasha ni gaw, hpyen leng hte gumra jawn ai masha shaga na matu, Mesopotami mung, Aram-mahka mung hte Zoba mung de gumhpraw joi hkying mi shagun dat mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:7 Shing rai shanhte gaw hpyen leng mun masum hkying lahkawng hpe mung, Mahka hkawhkam hte shi a masha ni hpe mung shaga la nna, dai ni gaw Medeba mare tawtap e sa but nga ma ai. Ammon a kashu kasha ni mung zuphpawng nga nna, tinang a mare ni kaw na gasat na pru wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dai lam Dawi na wu jang shi gaw Yoab hte shi a share luksuk ni mahkra hpe shangun dat mu ai. 
1Chronicles19:9 Shing rai Ammon a kashu kasha ni mung pru nna, mare chyinghka lam e hpyen gasat hkyen nga ma ai: sa karum ai hkawhkam ni gaw pa ga e kaga hkrai rai nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles19:10 Ya Yoab gaw shi a shingdu aman hpyen man lahkawng tai nga ai mu jang, Israela masha ni mahkra hta na grau share ai ni yawng hpe lata la nna, Suri masha ni a hpang maga de hkyen tawn shangun mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:11 Naw ngam nga ai masha ni hpe shi a kanau Abishai a lata de ap ya wu ai rai nna, shanhte gaw Ammon masha ni a hpang maga de hkyen nga ma ai." 
1Chronicles19:12 Bai Yoab gaw, Suri masha ni ngai hpe dang wa jang ngai e sa karum e; Ammon a kashu kasha ni nang hpe dang kau yang, ngai nang hpe karum na de ai." 
1Chronicles19:13 Dakan nga u; anhte a amyu hte anhte a Karai Kasang a mare ninghtawn ni a matu n-gun marai dat ga; Yehowa gaw shi ra ai hku hte maren, galaw u ga, ngu wu ai." 
1Chronicles19:14 Shing rai Yoab gaw shi a masha ni hte rau Suri dap hpe gasat na htim mu ai rai nna, Suri masha ni shi a man na hprawng mat wa ma ai." 
1Chronicles19:15 Suri masha ni hprawng mat wa ai hpe Ammon a kashu kasha ni mu jang, shanhte mung shi a kanau Abishai a man na hprawng nna, mare de hprawng wa ma ai. Shaloi Yoab gaw Yerusalem mare de wa mat ai." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ya Suri masha ni gaw Israela masha ni a man e sum mat ai mu chye jang, shanhte gaw kasa shangun dat nna, hka wora hkran na Hadareze san da ai hpyen du Shohpak hte shi up ai Suri masha ni hpe shaga mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:17 Dai lam Dawi na wu jang, Israela masha ni yawng hte hpe jahpawng la nhtawm, Yawdan hka rap nna, shanhte nga ai de du jang hpyen gasat na hkyen tawn mu ai. Shing rai Dawi gaw hpyen gasat na hkyen ngut jang, Suri masha ni shi hpe hkap gasat mu ai." 
1Chronicles19:18 Suri masha ni mung Israela masha ni a man na hprawng wa ma ai rai nna, Dawi gaw Suri hpyen leng masha hkying sanit, lagaw hkawm ai hpyen masha mun mali hpe sat kau ai hte, hpyen du Shohpak hpe mung sat kau wu ai." 
1Chronicles19:19 Shanhte gaw Israela man e sum mat ai hpe, Hadareze a ali ama ni mu jang, shanhte Dawi hte htinglu nna, shi kaw yamnga ma ai; Suri masha ni gaw htawm hpang e Ammon a kashu kasha ni hpe n karum manu ai."
